  }

  let topWindow, topDoc;
  try { topWindow = (window.parent !== window) ? window.parent : window; topDoc = topWindow.document; } catch (e) { topWindow = window; topDoc = document; }

  function log(...a) { console.log('[🦊]', ...a); }
  function getFn(n) { return topWindow?.[n] || window?.[n]; }
  const getPreset = (...args) => getFn('getPreset')?.(...args);
  const updatePresetWith = (...args) => getFn('updatePresetWith')?.(...args);
  const eventOn = (...args) => getFn('eventOn')?.(...args);
  const getPresetNames = (...args) => getFn('getPresetNames')?.(...args);
  const replacePreset = (...args) => getFn('replacePreset')?.(...args);
  const setPreset = (...args) => getFn('setPreset')?.(...args);
  const createChatMessages = (...args) => getFn('createChatMessages')?.(...args);
  const eventEmit = (...args) => getFn('eventEmit')?.(...args);

  const tavern_events = getFn('tavern_events') || {
    GENERATION_STARTED: 'generation_started',
    GENERATION_ENDED: 'generation_ended',
    CHARACTER_EDITED: 'character_edited',

    MESSAGE_SENT: 'message_sent',
    MESSAGE_RECEIVED: 'message_received',
    CHAT_CHANGED: 'chat_id_changed',

    CHAT_COMPLETION_PROMPT_READY: 'chat_completion_prompt_ready',
    GENERATE_AFTER_DATA: 'generate_after_data',
    GENERATE_AFTER_COMBINE_PROMPTS: 'generate_after_combine_prompts',
  };
  function toast(msg, type = 'info') { try { const t = topWindow?.toastr || window.toastr; if (t && t[type]) { t.clear(); t[type](msg, '🦊玄狐', { timeOut: type === 'error' ? 8000 : (type === 'warning' ? 5000 : 3000), extendedTimeOut: 2000, closeButton: true, newestOnTop: true, positionClass: 'toast-top-right', preventDuplicates: true }); } } catch { } }
  // ==================== 额外 API 请求中断控制 ====================


  // ==================== 额外 API 请求中断控制：稳定版 ====================

  const ssActiveTasks = new Map();

  function ssMakeGenerationId(taskName) {
    return `xuanhu_${taskName}_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
  }

  function ssIsTaskRunning(taskName) {
    return ssActiveTasks.has(taskName);
  }

  function ssStartTask(taskName, label = '') {
    const generationId = ssMakeGenerationId(taskName);

    ssActiveTasks.set(taskName, {
      generationId,
      label,
      cancelled: false,
      startedAt: Date.now(),
      abortController: null,
    });

    return generationId;
  }

  function ssAttachAbortController(taskName, controller) {
    const task = ssActiveTasks.get(taskName);
    if (task) task.abortController = controller;
  }

  function ssEndTask(taskName) {
    ssActiveTasks.delete(taskName);
    ssClearTaskToast(taskName);
  }

  function ssCancelTask(taskName, reason = '用户手动中断') {
    const task = ssActiveTasks.get(taskName);
    if (!task) return false;

    task.cancelled = true;

    try {
      if (task.abortController && typeof task.abortController.abort === 'function') {
        task.abortController.abort();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('AbortController 中断失败', e);
    }

    try {
      const stopById = getFn('stopGenerationById');
      const stopAll = getFn('stopAllGeneration');

      if (typeof stopById === 'function' && task.generationId) {
        stopById(task.generationId);
      } else if (typeof stopAll === 'function') {
        stopAll();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('stopGeneration 中断失败', e);
    }

    ssEndTask(taskName);
    toast(`⛔ 已中断：${reason}`, 'warning');
    return true;
  }

  async function ssGenerateRaw(taskName, params, label = '') {
    const gr = getFn('generateRaw');
    if (typeof gr !== 'function') throw new Error('无 generateRaw');

    let task = ssActiveTasks.get(taskName);
    let createdHere = false;

    if (!task) {
      const generationId = ssStartTask(taskName, label);
      task = ssActiveTasks.get(taskName);
      createdHere = true;
      params = { ...params, generation_id: generationId };
    } else {
      params = { ...params, generation_id: task.generationId };
    }

    try {
      const r = await gr(params);
      return r;
    } finally {
      if (createdHere) ssEndTask(taskName);
    }
  }

  function ssSetRunningButton(btn, text = '⏳ 运行中，再点中断') {
    if (!btn) return;
    if (!btn.dataset.oldText) btn.dataset.oldText = btn.textContent || '';
    btn.textContent = text;
    btn.disabled = false;
  }

  function ssRestoreButton(btn) {
    if (!btn) return;
    if (btn.dataset.oldText) btn.textContent = btn.dataset.oldText;
    delete btn.dataset.oldText;
    btn.disabled = false;
  }

  const ssTaskToasts = new Map();

  function ssClearTaskToast(taskName) {
    const el = ssTaskToasts.get(taskName);
    ssTaskToasts.delete(taskName);
    try {
      const t = topWindow?.toastr || window.toastr;
      if (el && t?.clear) t.clear(el);
      else if (el?.remove) el.remove();
    } catch {
      try { el?.remove?.(); } catch { }
    }
  }

  function ssTaskToast(taskName, text) {
    ssClearTaskToast(taskName);
    let el = null;

    try {
      const t = topWindow?.toastr || window.toastr;
      if (t?.info) {
        t.info(`${text}<br><button class="ss-toast-cancel" data-task="${escapeHtml(taskName)}" style="margin-top:8px;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.35);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.22);color:#ffd0c0;cursor:pointer;">⛔ 中断</button>`, '🦊玄狐', {
          timeOut: 0,
          extendedTimeOut: 0,
          closeButton: true,
          tapToDismiss: false,
          newestOnTop: true,
          preventDuplicates: true,
          escapeHtml: false,
        });

        el = topDoc.querySelector('#toast-container .toast-info:last-child') || topDoc.querySelector('.toast-info');
        if (el) ssTaskToasts.set(taskName, el);

        const cancelBtn = el?.querySelector?.('.ss-toast-cancel');
        if (cancelBtn) {
          cancelBtn.onclick = (ev) => {
            ev.preventDefault();
            ev.stopPropagation();
            ssCancelTask(taskName);
            ssClearTaskToast(taskName);
          };
        }
      }
    } catch { }

    return el;
  }

  // ==================== 🦊 自动任务全局队列：防止狐搜/狐忆/狐构/平行世界同时 generateRaw 冲突 ====================
  const xhAutoQueue = {
    chain: Promise.resolve(),
    pending: new Set(),
  };

  function xhIsAbortLike(e) {
    const msg = e?.message || String(e || '');
    return /abort|aborted|cancel|取消|中断/i.test(msg);
  }

  async function xhWaitForIdleBeforeAuto(timeoutMs = 180000) {
    const start = Date.now();

    while (ssActiveTasks.size > 0 || state.husouIsRunning || state.foxAnalyzing || state.outlineIsCorrecting || state.outlineIsGenerating || pwState?.running) {
      if (Date.now() - start > timeoutMs) {
        throw new Error('等待其他玄狐任务结束超时');
      }

      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 350));
    }
  }

  function xhEnqueueAutoTask(taskKey, label, runner, opts = {}) {
    const key = String(taskKey || label || 'auto_task');
    const dedupe = opts.dedupe !== false;

    if (dedupe && xhAutoQueue.pending.has(key)) {
      log(`[自动任务队列] 已存在待执行任务，跳过重复入队：${label}`);
      return xhAutoQueue.chain;
    }

    xhAutoQueue.pending.add(key);

    xhAutoQueue.chain = xhAutoQueue.chain
      .catch(() => { })
      .then(async () => {
        await xhWaitForIdleBeforeAuto();

        log(`[自动任务队列] 开始：${label}`);

        try {
          await runner();
          log(`[自动任务队列] 完成：${label}`);
        } catch (e) {
          if (xhIsAbortLike(e)) {
            log(`[自动任务队列] 已中断：${label}`, e);
          } else {
            log(`[自动任务队列] 失败：${label}`, e);
            toast(`❌ ${label}失败：${e?.message || e}`, 'error');
          }
        } finally {
          xhAutoQueue.pending.delete(key);
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 250));
        }
      });

    return xhAutoQueue.chain;
  }

  function escapeHtml(s) { return String(s ?? '').replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/\"/g, '"'); }
