      { selector: ['#outline-filter-enable', '.outline-inc-tag-module', '.outline-exc-tag-module', '#outline-filter-save'], text: '🦊这里是狐构上下文标签过滤（啊……好像没框上呢……唔你自己点开折叠看看叭，麻烦你咯……我很懒的啦……）。狐构默认读取完整上下文，只排除思维链和检查块，无特殊格式不需要配置，直接使用即可。' },
      { selector: ['#ss-outline-mgmt-mask', '#ss-outline-edit-textarea', '#outline-save-btn', '#outline-clear-btn'], text: '🦊这里是大纲管理区。默认遮住是为了防剧透；点开后可以手动编辑当前大纲，保存会写入本地大纲，清除会删除当前角色卡的大纲。' },
      { selector: '#outline-save-bottom-btn', text: '🦊这个按钮用于不打开剧透正文也能保存设置。你只改自动修正、读取楼层或注入方式时，直接点这里即可，不会强迫你查看大纲内容。' }
    ],

    foxmemory: [
      { selector: ['#foxmem-auto-mode', '#foxmem-auto-interval', '#foxmem-analyze-now'], text: '🦊这里控制狐忆什么时候生成记忆。“仅手动”最稳；“每次回复自动分析”会持续更新；“每隔 N 次回复”适合长聊。立即分析会立刻读取当前上下文并更新记忆库。' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-current-prompt-toggle', '#foxmem-inject-toggle', '#foxmem-manual-inject'], text: '🦊这里决定记忆注入方式。推荐打开“插入到当前提示词”；“注入到预设”会写进预设条目，慎用；手动同步只在你明确要把当前记忆写入预设时使用。' },
      { selector: '#foxmem-recall', text: '🦊召回楼层数用于自动推进时读取最近多少楼。数字越大，推进时参考越多，但也更容易带入旧内容；普通使用保持默认即可。' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-autopush-toggle', '#foxmem-auto-send', '#foxmem-combine-husou', '#foxmem-push-mode'], text: '🦊这里是自动推进。开启后，发送前会先整理你的输入并召回相关记忆；自动发送打开时会直接发送，关闭时只把处理结果填进输入框；推进模式建议用“思考方向”，它不会替你写死剧情。' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-fixed-torture', '#foxmem-detail-level', '#foxmem-max-words'], text: '🦊这里是推进注意事项。固定拷打写每次都要提醒模型的规则，例如不抢用户动作、不跳时间、不替用户说话；详细度和字数上限控制自动推进生成的提示长度。' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-content-filter', '.foxmem-inc-tag-module', '.foxmem-exc-tag-module'], text: '🦊这里是标签过滤……嗯？怎么又没框上啊……算了算了，唔……你会点开折叠出来看的吧？总之就是标签过滤咯，匹配开始标签+结束标签，排除就是删除里面的内容，保留就是只保留标签里的内容，默认不需要动哦，已经配置好啦……' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-api-type', '#foxmem-custom-api-section'], text: '🦊这里配置狐忆分析用的 API。用酒馆当前 API 最省事；自定义 API 适合单独给狐忆配模型。它影响记忆提取质量，不影响主模型正常回复。' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-add-btn', '.foxmem-cat-tab', '#foxmem-search', '#foxmemory-list'], text: '🦊这里是记忆管理。分类按钮用于筛人物、情节、物品、场景和概念；搜索框按关键词查记忆；列表里的编辑按钮可修改条目，删除按钮会移除单条记忆。' },
      { selector: ['#foxmem-save-config', '#foxmem-export-btn', '#foxmem-import-btn', '#foxmem-clear-btn'], text: '🦊底部是数据操作。保存全部配置会写入当前设置；导出/导入用于备份迁移；清空会删除当前角色卡当前聊天的记忆库，操作前确认不要误删。' }
    ],

    hushen: [
      { selector: ['#hushen-config-style', '#hushen-config-min', '#hushen-config-max'], text: '🦊这里设置狐析总结风格。详细模式会把偏好展开得更完整；简洁模式只保留核心点。最小和最大字数控制每个偏好模块的分析长度。' },
      { selector: ['#hushen-reset-btn', '#hushen-clear-all-btn'], text: '🦊这里是重置区。重新开始对话会清空当前狐析聊天流程；清除所有注入会把已经写进预设的狐析偏好全部清掉，适合重做用户画像。' },
      { selector: ['#hushen-chat-messages', '#hushen-chat-input', '#hushen-chat-send'], text: '🦊这里是偏好对话区。按狐析提问回答你的文风、节奏、人物描写、互动方式和雷区。每条消息旁的编辑、重 roll、回退用于修正对话过程。' },
      { selector: ['#hushen-summary-btn', '#hushen-summary-preview', '#hushen-inject-btn'], text: '🦊这里把对话整理成可注入的偏好总结。先生成总结并预览，确认内容没跑偏后再注入到预设；预览框可以手动改，改完再保存。' },
      { selector: ['#hushen-module-manager', '#hushen-module-refresh-all', '#hushen-module-enable-all', '#hushen-module-disable-all', '#hushen-module-clear-all'], text: '🦊这里是模块管理。可以单独刷新、启用、关闭或清空每个偏好条目。你不想走对话流程时，也可以直接在模块里写偏好并保存。' },
      { selector: '.hushen-module-card', text: '🦊每张模块卡对应一个预设偏好条目。上方写补充意见，下方是当前注入内容；“分析/重生成”会根据已有内容和补充意见重写该模块，“保存到预设”会立即生效。' }
    ],

    pw: [
      { selector: ['#pw-enabled', '#pw-open-state'], text: '🦊这里控制平行世界是否进入主线。打开主线注入后，后台事件会被写进当前提示词；状态小悬浮窗用于随时查看当前后台世界，不必每次打开完整面板。' },
      { selector: ['#pw-auto-mode', '#pw-auto-interval'], text: '🦊这里控制推进方式，“仅手动”不会自动更新哦，需要自己手动点；“每次合格回复后自动推进”适合动态世界；每隔 N 次适合长线剧情，看着选就好……' },
      { selector: ['#pw-module-count', '#pw-detail-level', '#pw-summary-max', '#pw-max-inject-modules', '#pw-max-inject-chars', '#pw-impact-mode', '#pw-max-urgent-events', '#pw-auto-delay'], text: '🦊这里是生成规模和影响强度。模块数决定后台镜头数量；细节程度决定内容展开；影响强度决定高危后台事件是否必须进入主线；注入上限用于控制提示词长度。' },
      { selector: '#pw-user-guide', text: '🦊这里写你对平行世界的补充要求。例如让远方 NPC 独立行动、加强组织斗争、不要让所有事件围着用户转。这里会影响后台模拟方向。' },
      { selector: ['#pw-api-type', '#pw-proxy-preset', '#pw-api-url', '#pw-api-key', '#pw-model', '#pw-fetch-models'], text: '🦊这里配置平行世界使用的模型。随主模型最简单；自定义 API 可以让平行世界单独使用另一个模型。代理预设会读取酒馆已有代理配置。' },
      { selector: ['#pw-save', '#pw-run', '#pw-summary-only', '#pw-copy-inject', '#pw-clear'], text: '🦊这里是主要操作按钮。保存配置只保存设置；推进一次会生成新的后台世界；重压缩摘要只刷新注入内容；复制摘要用于调试；清空会删除当前聊天的平行世界数据。' },
      { selector: ['#pw-inject-manager', '#pw-save-inject-text', '#pw-reset-inject-text'], text: '🦊这里管理实际注入主线的摘要。你可以手写覆盖注入内容；保存后会优先使用手写摘要；清除手写摘要后恢复 AI 自动生成的摘要。' },
      { selector: ['#pw-status', '.pw-main-card', '.pw-card'], text: '🦊这里显示当前后台世界。整体状态说明世界局势；每张卡是一个 NPC、组织、地点或事件线程；带进度条和高影响标记的内容，后续会更强地影响主线。' }
    ],

    novel: [
      { selector: '#novel-polish-toggle', text: '🦊这里切换普通小说模式和润色模式。普通模式会启用小说大纲/正文流程；润色模式会关闭大纲流程，改用“只润色、保持原意”的规则。' },
      { selector: ['#novel-source-text', '#novel-inject-source', '#novel-clear-source', '#novel-analyze-all'], text: '🦊这里放小说原文或待润色文本。注入原文会写入小说原文条目；一键分析会从原文中提取文风、格式、人物和情节规则；清空只清这里的原文内容。' },
      { selector: ['#novel-enable-all', '#novel-disable-all'], text: '🦊这里是一键模式切换。进入当前模式会按普通/润色状态启用对应小说条目，并关闭冲突的普通文风、抢话、转述和思维链；恢复默认会还原进入小说模式前的预设开关。' },
      { selector: '.novel-entry-card', text: '🦊每张卡都是一个小说模式条目。上方是当前预设内容，可直接编辑保存；下方是分析结果子框，可把分析结果覆盖或追加到上方条目。' },
      { selector: ['#novel-clear-all'], text: '🦊这里用于清空全部小说模式条目内容。它默认只清内容，不负责恢复预设开关；如果要退出小说模式，用上方“恢复默认并关闭”。' }
    ]
  };
  function xhGuideBuildPanelSteps(root, type) {
    const steps = [];
    const intro = XH_GUIDE_TEXT[type];
    if (intro) steps.push(xhGuideStep(intro, root, root, root));
    const blocks = root ? [...root.children].filter(el => {
      if (el.classList?.contains?.('xh-guide-help') || el.id?.startsWith('xh-guide')) return false;
      const s = el.getAttribute?.('style') || '';
      const r = el.getBoundingClientRect?.();
      return r && r.width > 30 && r.height > 20 && (/border/.test(s) || /padding/.test(s) || r.width > 60);
    }) : [];
    for (const block of blocks) {
      const label = block.querySelector('strong,summary,div:first-child,label:first-child,span:first-child')?.textContent?.trim()?.slice(0, 40) || block.id || block.className?.slice(0, 20) || '区域';
      const controls = 'button,input,select,textarea,label,a';
      const targets = [...block.querySelectorAll(controls)].filter(t => t.offsetParent !== null);
      if (targets.length) steps.push(xhGuideStep(`🦊「${label}」——点这里任意按钮/开关/输入继续。`, targets.map(t => t.id ? `#${CSS.escape(t.id)}` : t.tagName).filter(Boolean).join(','), block, root));
      else if (block.querySelector('textarea')) steps.push(xhGuideStep(`🦊「${label}」——点输入框继续。`, 'textarea', block, root));
      else steps.push(xhGuideStep(`🦊「${label}」——点此区域继续。`, 'div', block, root));
    }
    return steps.filter((s, i, a) => a.indexOf(s) === i);
  }

  function xhGuideEnsureStyle() {
    let style = topDoc.getElementById('xh-guide-style');
    if (!style) {
      style = topDoc.createElement('style');
      style.id = 'xh-guide-style';
      topDoc.head.appendChild(style);
    }

    style.textContent = `
.xh-guide-help{
  width:28px!important;height:28px!important;min-width:28px!important;max-width:28px!important;
  min-height:28px!important;max-height:28px!important;flex:0 0 28px!important;
  margin-left:auto!important;margin-right:0!important;padding:0!important;border-radius:8px!important;
  border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,.42)!important;background:rgba(232,120,74,.14)!important;
  color:#f0a070!important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(232,120,74,.14)!important;
  font:800 14px/26px inherit!important;text-align:center!important;cursor:pointer!important;
  appearance:none!important;-webkit-appearance:none!important;z-index:10!important;
}
.xh-guide-help:hover{background:rgba(232,120,74,.24)!important;color:#ffd8b8!important;}
.xh-guide-help-slot{position:absolute!important;top:14px!important;right:48px!important;z-index:20!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:flex-end!important;width:28px!important;height:28px!important;pointer-events:auto!important;}
.xh-guide-help-slot .xh-guide-help{margin-left:0!important;}

.xh-guide-blur{position:fixed!important;background:rgba(4,3,5,.34)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)!important;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px)!important;z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z}!important;pointer-events:none!important;}
.xh-guide-focus{position:fixed!important;border:2px solid rgba(255,176,106,.95)!important;border-radius:12px!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(232,120,74,.20),0 0 24px rgba(232,120,74,.42)!important;z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z + 1}!important;pointer-events:none!important;transition:all .18s ease!important;}
.xh-guide-line{position:fixed!important;height:2px!important;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,176,106,.95),rgba(255,176,106,0))!important;transform-origin:0 50%!important;z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z + 2}!important;pointer-events:none!important;}

.xh-guide-card{
  position:fixed!important;z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z + 3}!important;
  background:rgba(22,18,20,.985)!important;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,.42)!important;
  border-radius:14px!important;padding:14px 16px!important;color:#e8ddd4!important;
  box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.68),0 0 24px rgba(232,120,74,.18)!important;
  font-size:13px!important;line-height:1.65!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;
  pointer-events:auto!important;max-width:calc(100vw - 24px)!important;
}
.xh-guide-text{white-space:pre-wrap!important;word-break:break-word!important;color:#e8ddd4!important;}
.xh-guide-moving{opacity:.82!important;transform:translateY(2px)!important;transition:all .16s ease!important;}

.xh-guide-actions{display:flex!important;justify-content:flex-end!important;align-items:center!important;gap:8px!important;margin-top:12px!important;}
.xh-guide-actions button{
  flex:0 0 92px!important;width:92px!important;min-width:92px!important;max-width:92px!important;
  height:34px!important;min-height:34px!important;max-height:34px!important;padding:0!important;
  border-radius:9px!important;font-size:12px!important;line-height:34px!important;text-align:center!important;
  cursor:pointer!important;appearance:none!important;-webkit-appearance:none!important;
}
.xh-guide-next{border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,.45)!important;background:rgba(232,120,74,.18)!important;color:#f0a070!important;}
.xh-guide-skip{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10)!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035)!important;color:#a09088!important;}
.xh-guide-next:hover{background:rgba(232,120,74,.28)!important;color:#ffd8b8!important;}
.xh-guide-skip:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)!important;color:#e8ddd4!important;}

@media(max-width:720px){
  .xh-guide-card{left:12px!important;right:12px!important;width:auto!important;font-size:12px!important;}
  .xh-guide-actions{justify-content:flex-end!important;}
  .xh-guide-actions button{flex:0 0 92px!important;width:92px!important;min-width:92px!important;max-width:92px!important;height:34px!important;min-height:34px!important;max-height:34px!important;padding:0!important;}
}`;
  }


  function xhGuideEnd() {
    if (xhGuideState?.cleanup) xhGuideState.cleanup();
    xhGuideState = null;
    topDoc.querySelectorAll('.xh-guide-blur,.xh-guide-focus,.xh-guide-card,.xh-guide-line').forEach(el => el.remove());
  }

  function xhGuideViewport() {
    return {
      w: topWindow.innerWidth || topDoc.documentElement.clientWidth || 800,
      h: topWindow.innerHeight || topDoc.documentElement.clientHeight || 600
    };
  }

  function xhGuideClamp(v, min, max) {
    return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v));
  }

  function xhGuideRectFor(elements) {
    const rects = [...elements].map(el => el?.getBoundingClientRect?.()).filter(r => r && r.width > 1 && r.height > 1);
    if (!rects.length) return null;
    const v = xhGuideViewport();
    const left = xhGuideClamp(Math.min(...rects.map(r => r.left)) - 8, 8, v.w - 24);
    const top = xhGuideClamp(Math.min(...rects.map(r => r.top)) - 8, 8, v.h - 24);
    const right = xhGuideClamp(Math.max(...rects.map(r => r.right)) + 8, 24, v.w - 8);
    const bottom = xhGuideClamp(Math.max(...rects.map(r => r.bottom)) + 8, 24, v.h - 8);
    return { left, top, width: Math.max(20, right - left), height: Math.max(20, bottom - top), right, bottom };
  }

  function xhGuideFindTargets(step) {
    const selectors = Array.isArray(step.selector) ? step.selector : [step.selector];
    const root = step.root || topDoc;
    const found = [];
    for (const sel of selectors.filter(Boolean)) {
      if (typeof sel === 'string') found.push(...root.querySelectorAll(sel));
      else if (sel?.nodeType === 1) found.push(sel);
    }
    if (!found.length && step.fallback?.nodeType === 1) found.push(step.fallback);
    return [...new Set(found)].filter(el => topDoc.documentElement.contains(el));
  }

  function xhGuidePlace(rect) {
    const card = topDoc.getElementById('xh-guide-card');
    const line = topDoc.getElementById('xh-guide-line');
    const v = xhGuideViewport();
    if (!card || !line || !rect) return;
    const cw = Math.min(330, v.w - 24);
    const ch = card.offsetHeight || 140;
    let left = rect.right + 18;
    let top = rect.top + (rect.height - ch) / 2;
    if (left + cw > v.w - 12) left = rect.left - cw - 18;
    if (left < 12) left = xhGuideClamp(rect.left, 12, Math.max(12, v.w - cw - 12));
    if (v.w <= 720 || rect.width > v.w * 0.72) {
      left = 12;
      top = rect.bottom + 12;
      if (top + ch > v.h - 12) top = Math.max(12, rect.top - ch - 12);
    }
    top = xhGuideClamp(top, 12, Math.max(12, v.h - ch - 12));
    card.style.left = `${left}px`;
    card.style.top = `${top}px`;
    card.style.width = `${cw}px`;
    const sx = left > rect.left ? rect.right : rect.left;
    const sy = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
    const ex = left > rect.left ? left : left + cw;
    const ey = top + ch / 2;
    const dx = ex - sx;
    const dy = ey - sy;
    line.style.left = `${sx}px`;
    line.style.top = `${sy}px`;
    line.style.width = `${Math.max(16, Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy))}px`;
    line.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.atan2(dy, dx) * 180 / Math.PI}deg)`;
  }

  function xhGuidePaint(rect) {
    const v = xhGuideViewport();
    const pieces = ['top', 'left', 'right', 'bottom'].map(id => topDoc.getElementById(`xh-guide-blur-${id}`));
    if (!pieces.every(Boolean) || !rect) return;
    const [top, left, right, bottom] = pieces;
    top.style.cssText = `position:fixed;background:rgba(4,3,5,.34);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z};left:0;top:0;width:${v.w}px;height:${rect.top}px;`;
    left.style.cssText = `position:fixed;background:rgba(4,3,5,.34);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z};left:0;top:${rect.top}px;width:${rect.left}px;height:${rect.height}px;`;
    right.style.cssText = `position:fixed;background:rgba(4,3,5,.34);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z};left:${rect.right}px;top:${rect.top}px;width:${Math.max(0, v.w - rect.right)}px;height:${rect.height}px;`;
    bottom.style.cssText = `position:fixed;background:rgba(4,3,5,.34);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:${XH_GUIDE_Z};left:0;top:${rect.bottom}px;width:${v.w}px;height:${Math.max(0, v.h - rect.bottom)}px;`;
    const focus = topDoc.getElementById('xh-guide-focus');
    if (focus) {
      focus.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
      focus.style.top = `${rect.top}px`;
      focus.style.width = `${rect.width}px`;
      focus.style.height = `${rect.height}px`;
    }
    xhGuidePlace(rect);
  }

  function xhGuideScrollTo(targets) {
    const first = targets.find(Boolean);
    if (!first) return;
    try { first.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center', inline: 'nearest', behavior: 'smooth' }); } catch { }
  }

  function xhGuideRenderStep() {
    const st = xhGuideState;
    if (!st) return;
    const step = st.steps[st.index];
    if (!step) return xhGuideEnd();
    const targets = xhGuideFindTargets(step);
    xhGuideScrollTo(targets);
    const card = topDoc.getElementById('xh-guide-card');
    if (card) {
      card.classList.add('xh-guide-moving');
      card.querySelector('.xh-guide-text').textContent = step.text;
      card.querySelector('.xh-guide-next').textContent = st.index >= st.steps.length - 1 ? '完成' : '下一步';
      setTimeout(() => card.classList.remove('xh-guide-moving'), 160);
    }
    setTimeout(() => {
      const latestTargets = xhGuideFindTargets(step);
      const rect = xhGuideRectFor(latestTargets) || xhGuideRectFor([step.fallback || topDoc.body]);
      xhGuidePaint(rect);
    }, 160);
  }

  function xhGuideAdvance() {
    if (!xhGuideState) return;
    xhGuideState.index += 1;
    xhGuideRenderStep();
  }

  function xhGuideStart(steps) {
    const validSteps = (steps || []).filter(Boolean);
    if (!validSteps.length) return;
    xhGuideEnd();
    xhGuideEnsureStyle();
    ['top', 'left', 'right', 'bottom'].forEach(id => {
      const el = topDoc.createElement('div');
      el.id = `xh-guide-blur-${id}`;
      el.className = 'xh-guide-blur';
      topDoc.body.appendChild(el);
    });
    const focus = topDoc.createElement('div');
    focus.id = 'xh-guide-focus';
    focus.className = 'xh-guide-focus';
    topDoc.body.appendChild(focus);
    const line = topDoc.createElement('div');
    line.id = 'xh-guide-line';
    line.className = 'xh-guide-line';
    topDoc.body.appendChild(line);
    const card = topDoc.createElement('div');
    card.id = 'xh-guide-card';
    card.className = 'xh-guide-card';
    card.innerHTML = `<div class="xh-guide-text"></div><div class="xh-guide-actions"><button type="button" class="xh-guide-next">下一步</button><button type="button" class="xh-guide-skip">跳过</button></div>`;
    topDoc.body.appendChild(card);
    const maybeAdvanceByEvent = (ev) => {
      const st = xhGuideState;
      if (!st) return;
      const step = st.steps[st.index];
      if (!step?.advanceOnClick) return;
      if (step._advancing) return;
      const targets = xhGuideFindTargets(step);
      const hit = targets.some(el => el === ev.target || el.contains(ev.target));
      if (hit) {
        step._advancing = true;
        setTimeout(() => {
          if (xhGuideState === st && xhGuideState.steps[xhGuideState.index] === step) xhGuideAdvance();
          step._advancing = false;
        }, 180);
      }
    };
    const onResize = () => xhGuideRenderStep();
    topDoc.addEventListener('click', maybeAdvanceByEvent, true);
    topDoc.addEventListener('change', maybeAdvanceByEvent, true);
    topDoc.addEventListener('input', maybeAdvanceByEvent, true);
    topWindow.addEventListener('resize', onResize);
    topWindow.addEventListener('scroll', onResize, true);
    xhGuideState = {
      steps: validSteps,
      index: 0,
      cleanup: () => {
        topDoc.removeEventListener('click', maybeAdvanceByEvent, true);
        topDoc.removeEventListener('change', maybeAdvanceByEvent, true);
        topDoc.removeEventListener('input', maybeAdvanceByEvent, true);
        topWindow.removeEventListener('resize', onResize);
        topWindow.removeEventListener('scroll', onResize, true);
      }
    };
    card.querySelector('.xh-guide-next').onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); xhGuideAdvance(); };
    card.querySelector('.xh-guide-skip').onclick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); xhGuideEnd(); };
    xhGuideRenderStep();
  }

  function xhGuideStep(text, selector, fallback, root) {
    return { text, selector, fallback, root: root || topDoc, advanceOnClick: true };
  }

  function xhGuideGetBlocks(root) {
    if (!root) return [];
    const direct = [...root.children].filter(el => !el.classList?.contains?.('xh-guide-help'));
    const contentRoot = direct.length === 1 && direct[0].children?.length > 2 ? direct[0] : root;
    return [...contentRoot.children].filter(el => {
      if (el.classList?.contains?.('xh-guide-help') || el.id?.startsWith('xh-guide')) return false;
      const r = el.getBoundingClientRect?.();
      if (!r || r.width < 30 || r.height < 18) return false;
      const controls = [...el.querySelectorAll('button,input,select,textarea,label,a,summary')].filter(x => {
        if (x.classList?.contains?.('xh-guide-help')) return false;
        if (x.closest?.('.xh-guide-help')) return false;
        if (String(x.id || '').startsWith('xh-guide')) return false;
        if (x.closest?.('[id^="xh-guide"]')) return false;
        return true;
      });

      return controls.length > 0;
    });
  }

  function xhGuideBuildPanelSteps(root, type) {
    const steps = [];
    const intro = XH_GUIDE_TEXT[type] || `🦊这里是当前面板。狐神抚会按功能区说明每个设置的用途、推荐用法和需要注意的地方。`;

    steps.push(xhGuideStep(intro, root, root, root));

    const fixedSteps = XH_GUIDE_PANEL_STEPS[type] || [];

    if (fixedSteps.length) {
      for (const item of fixedSteps) {
        steps.push(xhGuideStep(item.text, item.selector, root, root));
      }

      return steps;
    }

    for (const block of xhGuideGetBlocks(root)) {
      const title = block.querySelector('strong,summary,[style*="font-weight"],label,span')?.textContent?.trim()?.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').slice(0, 48) || block.id || '设置区域';

      const targets = [...block.querySelectorAll('button,input,select,textarea,label,a,summary')].filter(el => {
        if (el.classList?.contains?.('xh-guide-help')) return false;
        if (el.closest?.('.xh-guide-help')) return false;
        if (String(el.id || '').startsWith('xh-guide')) return false;
        if (el.closest?.('[id^="xh-guide"]')) return false;

        const r = el.getBoundingClientRect?.();
        return r && r.width > 4 && r.height > 4;
      });

      if (!targets.length) continue;

      const names = targets
        .map(el => (el.textContent || el.getAttribute?.('placeholder') || el.getAttribute?.('title') || el.id || el.tagName || '').trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
        .slice(0, 5)
        .join('、');

      steps.push(xhGuideStep(`🦊「${title}」区域包含：${names || '可操作控件'}。这一组控件需要按同一功能理解：先确认开关状态，再填写参数，最后使用保存或执行按钮生效。`, targets, block, root));
    }

    return steps;
  }

  function xhGuideAddButton(target, title, steps, opts = {}) {
    if (!target) return;

    xhGuideEnsureStyle();

    target.querySelectorAll('.xh-guide-help,.xh-guide-help-slot').forEach(el => el.remove());

    const btn = topDoc.createElement('button');
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.className = 'xh-guide-help';
    btn.textContent = '?';
    btn.title = `${title}教程`;
    btn.onclick = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      xhGuideStart(typeof steps === 'function' ? steps() : steps);
    };

    const close = target.querySelector(opts.closeSelector || '[id$="-close"],.pw-close');

    if (close?.parentElement) {
      const parent = close.parentElement;

      parent.style.display = 'flex';
      parent.style.alignItems = 'center';
      parent.style.gap = '8px';
      parent.style.justifyContent = 'flex-start';

      btn.style.marginLeft = 'auto';
      btn.style.order = '998';
      close.style.order = '999';

      parent.insertBefore(btn, close);
      return;
    }

    const ps = getComputedStyle(target);
    if (ps.position === 'static') {
      target.style.position = 'relative';
    }

    const slot = topDoc.createElement('div');
    slot.className = 'xh-guide-help-slot';
    slot.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:14px;right:48px;z-index:8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;width:28px;height:28px;pointer-events:auto;';
    slot.appendChild(btn);
    target.appendChild(slot);
  }
  function xhGuideEnhancePanel(panel, type, title) {
    if (!panel) return;
    panel.querySelectorAll('.xh-guide-help').forEach(el => el.remove());
    xhGuideAddButton(panel, title, () => xhGuideBuildPanelSteps(panel, type));
  }

  // ==================== 注入内容标签包裹工具 ====================

  function ssWrapTaggedContent(tagName, innerText, intro = '', outro = '') {
    const inner = String(innerText || '').trim();

    if (!inner) return '';

    return `<${tagName}>
${intro ? intro.trim() + '\n\n' : ''}${inner}${outro ? '\n\n' + outro.trim() : ''}
</${tagName}>`;
  }

  function ssUnwrapTaggedContent(text, tagName) {
    const raw = String(text || '');
    const re = new RegExp(`<${tagName}>\\s*([\\s\\S]*?)\\s*<\\/${tagName}>`, 'i');
    const m = raw.match(re);

    if (!m) return raw.trim();

    let inner = m[1].trim();

    // 去掉常见开头/结尾说明，只保留真正内容。
    // 这里是宽松处理，不要求完全匹配。
    inner = inner
      .replace(/^以下是[\s\S]*?\n\n/, '')
      .replace(/\n\n以上内容[\s\S]*$/i, '')
      .replace(/\n\n大纲结束[\s\S]*$/i, '')
      .replace(/\n\n记忆结束[\s\S]*$/i, '')
      .replace(/\n\n拷打记录结束[\s\S]*$/i, '')
      .trim();

    return inner;
  }

  function ssBuildOutlineInject(rawOutline) {
    return ssWrapTaggedContent(
      'fox_outline',
      rawOutline,
      '以下是用户撰写的剧情大纲。接下来的剧情请你参考并按照大纲的走向进行剧情推进。若当前聊天上下文与大纲发生冲突，请优先服从当前上下文的剧情走向，并在不剧透、不生硬照搬的前提下参考大纲方向，如果当前剧情偏移了大纲方向，请将其自然、温和地引导回到大纲的方向。',
      '大纲结束。请不要直接复述大纲内容，而是在后续剧情中自然参考其走向。'
    );
  }

  function ssBuildFoxMemoryInject(memoryText) {
    return ssWrapTaggedContent(
      'fox_memory',
      memoryText,
      '以下是当前角色卡对应的长期记忆库。请在后续剧情中参考这些人物、情节、物品、场景、概念与世界观信息。若与当前上下文冲突，请优先服从当前上下文。',
      '记忆结束。请不要机械复述记忆内容，只在相关时自然参考。'
    );
  }

  function ssBuildBeatBadInject(recordText) {
    return ssWrapTaggedContent(
      'fox_beat_memory',
      recordText,
      '以下是长期拷打记录，记录了 AI 曾经写崩、违规或不符合用户预期的地方。后续输出时请主动避免重复这些问题。',
      '拷打记录结束。请将这些内容作为避坑规则参考，不要在正文中复述。'
    );
  }

  function ssBuildBeatGoodInject(recordText) {
    return ssWrapTaggedContent(
      'fox_good_memory',
      recordText,
      '以下是长期成功经验记录，记录了用户认可的优秀输出特征。后续输出时请参考这些经验，保持类似优点。',
      '成功经验记录结束。请将这些内容作为写作参考，不要在正文中复述。'
    );
  }

  function ssBuildSearchResultsInject(searchText) {
    return ssWrapTaggedContent(
      'SearchResults',
      searchText,
      '以下信息是通过网页搜索后得到的信息',
      '以上内容只是通过搜索得来！具体信息以上下文中的角色信息描述为准！\n如果没有内容，跳过即可。'
    );
  }

  // ==================== 🦊 统一当前请求体注入系统 ====================
  // 统一顺序：
  // 1. 狐搜搜索内容
  // 2. 狐忆长期记忆
  // 3. 狐构剧情大纲
  //
  // 插入位置：
  // 优先插入到 </fox_extra> 之后。
  // 如果没有 <fox_extra>，则插入到请求体最前方的 system 消息。

  const SS_CURRENT_INJECT_START = '<!-- XUANHU_CURRENT_PROMPT_INJECT_START -->';
  const SS_CURRENT_INJECT_END = '<!-- XUANHU_CURRENT_PROMPT_INJECT_END -->';
  const SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_START = '<!-- XUANHU_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_START -->';
  const SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_END = '<!-- XUANHU_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_END -->';

  function ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock(text) {
    return String(text || '').replace(
      new RegExp(
        `\\n*${SS_CURRENT_INJECT_START.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')}[\\s\\S]*?${SS_CURRENT_INJECT_END.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')}\\n*`,
        'g'
      ),
      ''
    );
  }

  function ssGetHusouPendingInjectText() {
    try {
      const s = state.husouSettings || (state.husouSettings = loadHusouSettings());

      if (!s.injectCurrentPrompt) return '';

      // 1. 优先注入本轮刚搜索出来的 pending 内容
      if (state.husouPendingInject?.size) {
        state.husouPendingConsumed = true;
        return husouBuildInjectBlock(state.husouPendingInject).trim();
      }

      // 2. 如果没有 pending，则按当前角色卡 localStorage 注入
      // 这样狐搜以 localStorage 为准，切角色卡不会串。
      if (typeof husouLoadLocalText === 'function') {
        const localText = husouLoadLocalText();

        if (localText?.trim()) {
          return ssBuildSearchResultsInject(localText.trim()).trim();
        }
      }

      return '';
    } catch (e) {
      log('[统一注入] 获取狐搜注入失败', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  function ssGetFoxMemoryCurrentInjectText() {
    try {
      foxMemoryConfig = loadFoxMemoryConfig();

      if (!foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt) {
        log('[统一注入] 狐忆当前提示词注入未开启');
        return '';
      }

      const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();

      if (!memories.length) {
        log('[统一注入] 狐忆记忆库为空，跳过注入');
        return '';
      }

      const memoryBody = foxMemoryBuildMemoryBodyForInject(memories, {
        maxPlotChunks: 3,
      });

      if (!memoryBody.trim()) {
        log('[统一注入] 狐忆记忆筛选后为空，跳过注入');
        return '';
      }

      const injectText = ssBuildFoxMemoryInject(memoryBody).trim();
      log(`[统一注入] 狐忆注入已构建，记忆数=${memories.length}，长度=${injectText.length}`);
      return injectText;
    } catch (e) {
      log('[统一注入] 获取狐忆注入失败', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  function ssGetOutlineCurrentInjectText() {
    try {
      if (localStorage.getItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_INJECT_CURRENT_KEY) === 'false') {
        log('[统一注入] 狐构当前提示词注入未开启');
        return '';
      }

      const raw = outlineLoadLocalRaw();

      if (!raw?.trim()) return '';

      // 狐构：默认直接插入当前请求体；如果用户打开“注入预设”，也允许预设里存在。
      // 这里仍然插入当前请求体，确保它跟随角色卡本地大纲。
      return ssBuildOutlineInject(raw).trim();
    } catch (e) {
      log('[统一注入] 获取狐构注入失败', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  function ssBuildCurrentPromptInjectBlock() {
    const parts = [];

    // 1. 狐搜搜索内容
    const searchText = ssGetHusouPendingInjectText();
    if (searchText) parts.push(searchText);

    // 2. 狐忆长期记忆
    const memoryText = ssGetFoxMemoryCurrentInjectText();
    if (memoryText) parts.push(memoryText);

    // 3. 狐构剧情大纲
    const outlineText = ssGetOutlineCurrentInjectText();
    if (outlineText) parts.push(outlineText);

    // 4. 平行世界后台摘要
    const parallelText = typeof ssGetParallelWorldCurrentInjectText === 'function'
      ? ssGetParallelWorldCurrentInjectText()
      : '';

    if (parallelText) parts.push(parallelText);

    if (!parts.length) return '';

    return `
${SS_CURRENT_INJECT_START}
${parts.join('\n\n')}
${SS_CURRENT_INJECT_END}`.trim();
  }

  // ==================== 🦊 跨模块联动补充：狐构 / 狐搜 / 平行世界 ====================
  // 说明：
  // - 这里只联动狐搜、狐构、平行世界。
  // - 不读取狐忆，不调用 foxMemoryGetCurrent，不调用 ssGetFoxMemoryCurrentInjectText。
  // - 目的：避免狐忆长期记忆混入大纲/搜索/平行世界后台，保持狐忆只服务主线。

  function ssGetHusouCrossModuleSupplementText() {
    try {
      const parts = [];

      // 1. 本轮刚搜索出来、还没清理的 pending 狐搜结果
      // 注意：这里不调用 ssGetHusouPendingInjectText()，避免把 pending 标记为 consumed。
      if (state.husouPendingInject?.size && typeof husouBuildInjectBlock === 'function') {
        const pendingText = husouBuildInjectBlock(state.husouPendingInject).trim();

        if (pendingText) {
          parts.push(`【本轮临时狐搜结果】\n${pendingText}`);
        }
      }

      // 2. 当前角色卡 localStorage 里的狐搜资料库
      if (typeof husouLoadLocalText === 'function') {
        const localText = husouLoadLocalText();

        if (localText?.trim()) {
          parts.push(`【当前角色卡狐搜资料库】\n${ssBuildSearchResultsInject(localText.trim())}`);
        }
      }

      const body = parts.join('\n\n').trim();

      if (!body) return '';

      return `<linked_husou_reference>
${body}
</linked_husou_reference>`;
    } catch (e) {
      log('[跨模块联动] 获取狐搜补充失败', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  function ssGetParallelWorldCrossModuleSupplementText() {
    try {
      // 平行世界主线注入关闭时，默认不让其他模块读取它。
      // 如果你希望即使关闭主线注入也让狐构/狐搜读取平行世界，
      // 可以删除下面这段 enabled 判断。
      if (typeof pwLoadConfig === 'function') {
        const cfg = pwLoadConfig();

        if (cfg && cfg.enabled === false) return '';
      }

      if (typeof pwBuildInjectPlainText !== 'function') return '';

      const plain = pwBuildInjectPlainText();

      if (!plain?.trim()) return '';

      return `<linked_parallel_world_reference>
【平行世界后台补充】
以下内容来自平行世界/动态世界模块。它只作为狐构与狐搜判断用的补充资料：

- 不能覆盖当前主线聊天记录；
- 不能把尚未进入主线的后台事件当成主线已经发生；
- 如果与主线冲突，永远以当前主线 chatHistory 为准；
- 可以用于补充后台威胁、NPC独立行动、组织动向、远处事件、可能影响主线的伏笔。

${plain.trim()}
</linked_parallel_world_reference>`;
    } catch (e) {
      log('[跨模块联动] 获取平行世界补充失败', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  function ssGetOutlineCrossModuleSupplementText() {
    try {
      if (typeof outlineLoadLocalRaw !== 'function') return '';

      const raw = outlineLoadLocalRaw();

      if (!raw?.trim()) return '';

      return `<linked_outline_reference>
【当前狐构大纲补充】
以下内容来自狐构当前角色卡本地大纲。它只作为平行世界后台推进的方向参考：

- 平行世界可以参考大纲里的长期走向、潜在冲突和伏笔；
- 但平行世界仍应保持 NPC / 组织 / 地点 / 远方事件的独立行动；
- 如果大纲与当前主线冲突，以当前主线为准。

${raw.trim()}
</linked_outline_reference>`;
    } catch (e) {
      log('[跨模块联动] 获取狐构大纲补充失败', e);
      return '';
    }
  }

  function ssBuildOutlineLinkedSupplementPrompt(action = '生成/修正') {
    const parts = [];

    const husouText = ssGetHusouCrossModuleSupplementText();
    if (husouText) parts.push(husouText);

    const parallelText = ssGetParallelWorldCrossModuleSupplementText();
    if (parallelText) parts.push(parallelText);

    if (!parts.length) return null;

    return {
      role: 'system',
      content: `【狐构跨模块补充资料｜用于大纲${action}】

下面内容来自狐搜与平行世界，只能作为大纲${action}的补充资料。

优先级：
1. 当前聊天记录、角色卡、世界书、玩家设定永远最高。
2. 用户在狐构面板里写的补充要求次之。
3. 狐搜资料用于补足外部设定、作品资料、名词解释。
4. 平行世界用于补足主线外正在独立发展的后台事件、NPC动向、组织冲突、远处威胁。
5. 若狐搜/平行世界与当前主线冲突，必须服从当前主线，不得强行改写已发生剧情。
6. 禁止把平行世界尚未进入主线的事件写成“主线已经发生”；只能写成后续可能影响、后台正在逼近、伏笔或阶段风险。
7. 禁止读取狐忆。狐忆长期记忆只服务主线，不参与狐构大纲判断。

${parts.join('\n\n')}`
    };
  }

  function ssBuildSearchLinkedSupplementText() {
    const parts = [];

    const parallelText = ssGetParallelWorldCrossModuleSupplementText();

    if (parallelText) {
      parts.push(`【平行世界补充参考】\n${parallelText}`);
    }

    return parts.join('\n\n').trim();
  }

  function ssBuildParallelWorldLinkedSupplementPrompt() {
    const parts = [];

    const outlineText = ssGetOutlineCrossModuleSupplementText();
    if (outlineText) parts.push(outlineText);

    const husouText = ssGetHusouCrossModuleSupplementText();
    if (husouText) parts.push(husouText);

    if (!parts.length) return null;

    return {
      role: 'system',
      content: `【平行世界跨模块补充资料】

下面内容来自狐构大纲与狐搜资料，只能作为平行世界后台推进的补充参考。

注意：
1. 平行世界仍然要保持角色、组织、地点、远方事件的独立性。
2. 狐构大纲只提供长期方向，不要求平行世界机械照抄。
3. 狐搜资料只补充外部设定、名词和作品信息。
4. 如果与当前主线聊天记录冲突，以当前主线为准。
5. 禁止接入狐忆长期记忆；狐忆只服务主线，不参与平行世界后台判断。

${parts.join('\n\n')}`
    };
  }

  function ssInsertBlockAfterFoxExtra(content, block) {
    let text = ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock(String(content || ''));

    if (!block?.trim()) return text;

    const injectBlock = `\n\n${block.trim()}\n`;

    // 优先插入到 </fox_extra> 之后
    const closeRe = /<\/fox_extra>/i;
    if (closeRe.test(text)) {
      return text.replace(closeRe, m => `${m}${injectBlock}`);
    }

    // 如果只有 <fox_extra> 开始标签但没有结束标签，插入到开始标签后
    const openRe = /<fox_extra>/i;
    if (openRe.test(text)) {
      return text.replace(openRe, m => `${m}${injectBlock}`);
    }

    // 没有 fox_extra：插入到当前内容最前
    return `${injectBlock}\n${text}`.trim();
  }

  function ssStripFoxJudgeInjectBlock(text) {
    return String(text || '').replace(
      new RegExp(
        `\\n*${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_START.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')}[\\s\\S]*?${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_END.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')}\\n*`,
        'g'
      ),
      ''
    );
  }

  async function ssInjectIntoPromptArrayByFoxExtra(arr) {
    if (!Array.isArray(arr)) return false;

    // 先清除旧标记，防止多个事件重复注入。
    // 如果上一轮是独立注入 user 消息，清空后内容为空，则直接移除。
    for (let i = arr.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const msg = arr[i];

      if (msg && typeof msg.content === 'string') {
        const before = msg.content;
        const after = ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock(before);

        msg.content = after;

        if (before !== after && !after.trim()) {
          arr.splice(i, 1);
        }
      }
    }

    // 清除旧的狐裁思维链注入标记，防止重复注入
    for (let i = arr.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const msg = arr[i];

      if (msg && typeof msg.content === 'string') {
        const before = msg.content;
        const after = ssStripFoxJudgeInjectBlock(before);

        msg.content = after;

        if (before !== after && !after.trim()) {
          arr.splice(i, 1);
        }
      }
    }

    const block = ssBuildCurrentPromptInjectBlock();

    if (!block) {
      try {
        const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
        if (cfg.enabled && foxJudgeLastCombined) {
          const cleanedForMainPrompt = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(foxJudgeLastCombined);
          arr.push({ role: 'assistant', content: `${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_START}\n${cleanedForMainPrompt}\n${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_END}` });
          log('[狐裁] 思维链已注入到prompt数组最底部（assistant身份）');
        }
      } catch (e) {
        log('[狐裁] 注入思维链失败', e);
      }
      return false;
    }

    // 优先找包含 fox_extra 的消息，将 user 注入消息插在它后面。
    let targetIndex = arr.findIndex(m =>
      typeof m?.content === 'string' &&
      /<fox_extra>|<\/fox_extra>/i.test(m.content)
    );

    // 找不到 fox_extra，则插到第一条 system 后面。
    if (targetIndex < 0) {
      targetIndex = arr.findIndex(m =>
        m?.role === 'system' &&
        typeof m.content === 'string'
      );
    }

    const insertIndex = targetIndex >= 0 ? targetIndex + 1 : 0;

    arr.splice(insertIndex, 0, {
      role: 'user',
      content: block,
    });

    log('[统一注入] 已以 user 身份注入：狐搜 → 狐忆 → 狐构 → 平行世界');

    try {
      const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      if (cfg.enabled && foxJudgeLastCombined) {
        const cleanedForMainPrompt = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(foxJudgeLastCombined);
        arr.push({ role: 'assistant', content: `${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_START}\n${cleanedForMainPrompt}\n${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_END}` });
        log('[狐裁] 思维链已注入到prompt数组最底部（assistant身份）');
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 注入思维链失败', e);
    }

    return true;
  }
  function ssInjectIntoPromptStringByFoxExtra(promptText) {
    let result = String(promptText || '');

    const block = ssBuildCurrentPromptInjectBlock();
    if (block) {
      result = ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock(result);
      result = ssInsertBlockAfterFoxExtra(result, block);
    }

    result = ssStripFoxJudgeInjectBlock(result);

    try {
      const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      if (cfg.enabled && foxJudgeLastCombined) {
        const cleanedForMainPrompt = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(foxJudgeLastCombined);
        result += `\n\n${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_START}\n${cleanedForMainPrompt}\n${SS_FOXJUDGE_INJECT_END}`;
        log('[狐裁] 思维链已追加到string prompt末尾');
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] string prompt注入思维链失败', e);
    }

    log('[统一注入] 已注入 string prompt：狐搜 → 狐忆 → 狐构 → 平行世界');
    return result;
  }
  // ==================== 统一标签过滤工具：一行 = 一组开始/结束标签 ====================

  function ssDefaultIncludeTagPairs() {
    return [
      { start: '<All_Context>', end: '</All_Context>' },
      { start: '<content>', end: '</content>' },
    ];
  }

  function ssDefaultExcludeTagPairs() {
    return [
      { start: '<stage_2_pre_output_check>', end: '</stage_2_pre_output_check>' },
      { start: '<stage_1_base_requirements>', end: '</stage_1_base_requirements>' },
      { start: '<think_fox~>', end: '</think_fox~>' },
    ];
  }

  function ssPairsToLines(pairs, side) {
    return (pairs || []).map(p => side === 'start' ? (p.start || '') : (p.end || '')).join('\n');
  }

  function ssLinesToPairs(startText, endText) {
    const starts = String(startText ?? '').split('\n').map(x => x.trim());
    const ends = String(endText ?? '').split('\n').map(x => x.trim());
    const max = Math.max(starts.length, ends.length);
    const pairs = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < max; i++) {
      const start = starts[i] || '';
      const end = ends[i] || '';

      // 两边都空才跳过；允许“只填开始”或“只填结束”
      if (!start && !end) continue;

      pairs.push({ start, end });
    }

    return pairs;
  }

  function ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings(settings = {}) {
    const s = { ...settings };

    // 新版优先：includeTagPairs / excludeTagPairs
    if (!Array.isArray(s.includeTagPairs)) {
      if (typeof s.includeTagStarts === 'string' || typeof s.includeTagEnds === 'string') {
        s.includeTagPairs = ssLinesToPairs(s.includeTagStarts || '', s.includeTagEnds || '');
      } else {
        s.includeTagPairs = ssDefaultIncludeTagPairs();
      }
    }

    if (!Array.isArray(s.excludeTagPairs)) {
      if (typeof s.excludeTagStarts === 'string' || typeof s.excludeTagEnds === 'string') {
        s.excludeTagPairs = ssLinesToPairs(s.excludeTagStarts || '', s.excludeTagEnds || '');
      } else {
        s.excludeTagPairs = ssDefaultExcludeTagPairs();
      }
    }

    // 兼容旧版错误默认值
    const incStarts = String(s.includeTagStarts || '').trim();
    const incEnds = String(s.includeTagEnds || '').trim();

    if (
      incStarts === '<content\n<All_Context\n<SearchResults' ||
      incStarts === '<content\r\n<All_Context\r\n<SearchResults'
    ) {
      s.includeTagPairs = ssDefaultIncludeTagPairs();
    }

    if (
      incEnds === 'content>\nAll_Context>\nSearchResults>' ||
      incEnds === 'content>\r\nAll_Context>\r\nSearchResults>'
    ) {
      s.includeTagPairs = ssDefaultIncludeTagPairs();
    }

    // 兼容旧版把 <think_fox~> 填到排除开始标签的错误配置
    if (
      String(s.excludeTagStarts || '').trim() === '<think_fox~>' &&
      !String(s.excludeTagEnds || '').trim()
    ) {
      s.excludeTagPairs = ssDefaultExcludeTagPairs();
    }

    if (
      String(s.excludeTagStarts || '').trim() === '<think_fox~' &&
      !String(s.excludeTagEnds || '').trim()
    ) {
      s.excludeTagPairs = ssDefaultExcludeTagPairs();
    }

    // 同步旧字段，方便旧逻辑/导出备份兼容
    s.includeTagStarts = ssPairsToLines(s.includeTagPairs, 'start');
    s.includeTagEnds = ssPairsToLines(s.includeTagPairs, 'end');
    s.excludeTagStarts = ssPairsToLines(s.excludeTagPairs, 'start');
    s.excludeTagEnds = ssPairsToLines(s.excludeTagPairs, 'end');

    return s;
  }

  function ssMergeRanges(ranges) {
    const arr = ranges
      .filter(r => Array.isArray(r) && r.length === 2 && r[0] < r[1])
      .sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);

    if (!arr.length) return [];

    const merged = [arr[0]];

    for (let i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
      const last = merged[merged.length - 1];
      const cur = arr[i];

      if (cur[0] <= last[1]) {
        last[1] = Math.max(last[1], cur[1]);
      } else {
        merged.push(cur);
      }
    }

    return merged;
  }

  function ssRemoveRanges(text, ranges) {
    const raw = String(text || '');
    const merged = ssMergeRanges(ranges);

    if (!merged.length) return raw;

    let result = '';
    let last = 0;

    for (const [s, e] of merged) {
      if (s > last) result += raw.slice(last, s);
      last = Math.max(last, e);
    }

    result += raw.slice(last);
    return result;
  }

  function ssFindTagRanges(text, startTag, endTag, mode = 'include') {
    const raw = String(text || '');
    const ranges = [];

    const start = String(startTag || '');
    const end = String(endTag || '');

    // 开始 + 结束
    if (start && end) {
      let pos = 0;

      while (pos < raw.length) {
        const sIdx = raw.indexOf(start, pos);
        if (sIdx < 0) break;

        const contentStart = sIdx + start.length;
        const eIdx = raw.indexOf(end, contentStart);
        if (eIdx < 0) break;

        if (mode === 'exclude') {
          ranges.push([sIdx, eIdx + end.length]);
        } else {
          ranges.push([contentStart, eIdx]);
        }

        pos = eIdx + end.length;
      }

      return ranges;
    }

    // 只填开始：从开始标签到末尾
    if (start && !end) {
      const sIdx = raw.indexOf(start);

      if (sIdx >= 0) {
        if (mode === 'exclude') ranges.push([sIdx, raw.length]);
        else ranges.push([sIdx + start.length, raw.length]);
      }

      return ranges;
    }

    // 只填结束：从开头到结束标签
    if (!start && end) {
      const eIdx = raw.indexOf(end);

      if (eIdx >= 0) {
        if (mode === 'exclude') ranges.push([0, eIdx + end.length]);
        else ranges.push([0, eIdx]);
      }

      return ranges;
    }

    return ranges;
  }

  function ssApplyExcludeToChunk(fullText, chunkStart, chunkEnd, excludeRanges) {
    const localRanges = [];

    for (const [s, e] of excludeRanges) {
      const ss = Math.max(s, chunkStart);
      const ee = Math.min(e, chunkEnd);

      if (ss < ee) {
        localRanges.push([ss - chunkStart, ee - chunkStart]);
      }
    }

    const chunk = String(fullText || '').slice(chunkStart, chunkEnd);
    return ssRemoveRanges(chunk, localRanges).trim();
  }

  function ssFilterByTagPairs(rawMessage, settings, opts = {}) {
    const raw = String(rawMessage || '');
    if (!raw.trim()) return '';

    const s = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings(settings || {});
    if (s.enableContentFilter === false) return raw.trim();

    const includePairs = Array.isArray(s.includeTagPairs) ? s.includeTagPairs : [];
    const excludePairs = Array.isArray(s.excludeTagPairs) ? s.excludeTagPairs : [];

    let excludeRanges = [];

    for (const pair of excludePairs) {
      excludeRanges.push(
        ...ssFindTagRanges(raw, pair.start, pair.end, 'exclude')
      );
    }

    excludeRanges = ssMergeRanges(excludeRanges);

    // 没有包含标签：读取全文，但扣掉排除标签
    if (!includePairs.length) {
      return ssRemoveRanges(raw, excludeRanges).trim();
    }

    let includeRanges = [];

    for (const pair of includePairs) {
      includeRanges.push(
        ...ssFindTagRanges(raw, pair.start, pair.end, 'include')
      );
    }

    includeRanges = ssMergeRanges(includeRanges);

    // ✅ 严格模式：
    // 只要配置了包含标签，就只允许读取匹配到的包含标签内容。
    // 没匹配到时默认返回空，绝不回退全文。
    if (!includeRanges.length) {
      return opts.fallbackToFullText === true
        ? ssRemoveRanges(raw, excludeRanges).trim()
        : '';
    }

    const parts = [];

    for (const [sIdx, eIdx] of includeRanges) {
      const chunk = ssApplyExcludeToChunk(raw, sIdx, eIdx, excludeRanges);
      if (chunk) parts.push(chunk);
    }

    // ✅ 即使包含标签内部被排除标签删空，也不回退全文
    return parts.join('\n\n').trim();
  }

  function ssCreateTagPairsEditorHtml(prefix, title, pairs, hint = '') {
    const safePairs = Array.isArray(pairs) && pairs.length ? pairs : [{ start: '', end: '' }];

    const rows = safePairs.map((p, i) => `
      <div class="${prefix}-tag-row" data-index="${i}" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px;">
        <input class="${prefix}-tag-start" value="${escapeHtml(p.start || '')}" placeholder="开始标签，可留空" style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.18);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;box-sizing:border-box;">
        <input class="${prefix}-tag-end" value="${escapeHtml(p.end || '')}" placeholder="结束标签，可留空" style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.18);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;box-sizing:border-box;">
        <button type="button" class="${prefix}-tag-remove" style="padding:5px 9px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.35);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.16);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">-</button>
      </div>
    `).join('');

    return `
      <div class="${prefix}-tag-module" style="border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.14);border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.018);padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:#e8ddd4;font-weight:600;">${escapeHtml(title)}</div>
            ${hint ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:#706058;margin-top:3px;line-height:1.5;">${hint}</div>` : ''}
          </div>
          <button type="button" class="${prefix}-tag-add" style="padding:5px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">+</button>
        </div>

        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:5px;font-size:10px;color:#706058;">
          <div>开始标签</div>
          <div>结束标签</div>
          <div>删除</div>
        </div>

        <div class="${prefix}-tag-list">
          ${rows}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function ssBindTagPairsEditor(prefix, root = topDoc) {
    const module = root.querySelector?.(`.${prefix}-tag-module`);
    if (!module || module.dataset.bound === '1') return;
    module.dataset.bound = '1';

    const list = module.querySelector(`.${prefix}-tag-list`);
    const addBtn = module.querySelector(`.${prefix}-tag-add`);

    const createRow = (start = '', end = '') => {
      const row = topDoc.createElement('div');
      row.className = `${prefix}-tag-row`;
      row.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px;';
      row.innerHTML = `
        <input class="${prefix}-tag-start" value="${escapeHtml(start)}" placeholder="开始标签，可留空" style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.18);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;box-sizing:border-box;">
        <input class="${prefix}-tag-end" value="${escapeHtml(end)}" placeholder="结束标签，可留空" style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.18);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;box-sizing:border-box;">
        <button type="button" class="${prefix}-tag-remove" style="padding:5px 9px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.35);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.16);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">-</button>
      `;
      return row;
    };

    addBtn.onclick = () => {
      list.appendChild(createRow());
    };

    list.onclick = (e) => {
      const btn = e.target?.closest?.(`.${prefix}-tag-remove`);
      if (!btn) return;

      const row = btn.closest(`.${prefix}-tag-row`);
      if (!row) return;

      const rows = list.querySelectorAll(`.${prefix}-tag-row`);
      if (rows.length <= 1) {
        row.querySelector(`.${prefix}-tag-start`).value = '';
        row.querySelector(`.${prefix}-tag-end`).value = '';
        return;
      }

      row.remove();
    };
  }

  function ssReadTagPairsEditor(prefix, root = topDoc) {
    const rows = root.querySelectorAll?.(`.${prefix}-tag-row`) || [];
    const pairs = [];

    rows.forEach(row => {
      const start = row.querySelector(`.${prefix}-tag-start`)?.value?.trim() || '';
      const end = row.querySelector(`.${prefix}-tag-end`)?.value?.trim() || '';

      if (!start && !end) return;
      pairs.push({ start, end });
    });

    return pairs;
  }

  // ==================== 主模型请求体抓取 + 严格标签过滤 ====================

  function ssMessageArrayToContextText(messages = [], filterSettings = null, opts = {}) {
    const arr = Array.isArray(messages) ? messages : [];
    if (!arr.length) return '';

    const s = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings(filterSettings || {});
    const skipRoleLabels = opts.skipRoleLabels === true;

    const fullRawPrompt = arr
      .map(msg => {
        const role = msg?.role || 'system';
        const content = String(msg?.content ?? msg?.message ?? '');
        if (!content.trim()) return '';
        return skipRoleLabels ? content : `【${role}】\n${content}`;
      })
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join('\n\n');

    if (!fullRawPrompt.trim()) return '';

    let cleanedPrompt = fullRawPrompt
      .replace(new RegExp(`${CONFIG.SUMMARY_FLOOR_START}[\\s\\S]*?${CONFIG.SUMMARY_FLOOR_END}`, 'g'), '')
      .replace(new RegExp(`${FULL_SUMMARY_FLOOR_MARK}[\\s\\S]*`, 'g'), '')
      .replace(/<fox_outline>[\s\S]*?<\/fox_outline>/gi, '')
      .replace(/<fox_memory>[\s\S]*?<\/fox_memory>/gi, '')
      .replace(/<SearchResults>[\s\S]*?<\/SearchResults>/gi, '');

    try {
      if (typeof ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock === 'function') {
        cleanedPrompt = ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock(cleanedPrompt);
      }
    } catch { }

    log('[完整原始请求体进入过滤预览]', cleanedPrompt.slice(0, 300000));

    const filtered = ssFilterByTagPairs(cleanedPrompt, s, {
      fallbackToFullText: opts.fallbackToFullText === true,
    });

    if (filtered?.trim()) {
      log('[过滤后上下文预览]', filtered.slice(0, 300000));
      return filtered.trim();
    }

    if (opts.fallbackToFullText === true) {
      return cleanedPrompt.trim();
    }

    return '';
  }


  async function ssCaptureMainRequestMessages(taskName = '上下文抓取', filterSettings = null) {
    // ✅ 直接请求一次当前 in_use 预设组合后的完整请求体。
    // ✅ 只监听酒馆正常生成流程里的 prompt 事件。
    // ✅ 不 stop，不缓存，不手动读楼层，不改聊天文件。
    // ✅ 让静默 generate 自然结束，避免 Windows EPERM 文件锁。

    const gen = getFn('generate');
    const eo = getFn('eventOn');
    const te = getFn('tavern_events') || tavern_events;

    if (typeof gen !== 'function') throw new Error('无 generate，无法请求完整上下文');
    if (typeof eo !== 'function') throw new Error('无 eventOn，无法监听完整请求体');

    let captured = null;
    const stops = [];

    const normalizeMessages = (arr) => {
      if (!Array.isArray(arr)) return [];

      return arr
        .map(x => ({
          role: x?.role || 'system',
          content: String(x?.content ?? x?.message ?? ''),
        }))
        .filter(x => x.content.trim());
    };

    const capture = (arr, source = '') => {
      if (captured) return;

      const messages = normalizeMessages(arr);
      if (!messages.length) return;

      captured = messages;
      log(`[${taskName}] 已抓取完整请求体 source=${source} messages=${messages.length}`);
      log(`[${taskName}] 请求体预览`, messages.map(m => `【${m.role}】\n${m.content}`).join('\n\n').slice(0, 3000));
    };

    try {
      if (te?.CHAT_COMPLETION_PROMPT_READY) {
        stops.push(eo(te.CHAT_COMPLETION_PROMPT_READY, d => {
          if (d?.dryRun) return;
          if (Array.isArray(d?.chat)) {
            capture(d.chat, 'CHAT_COMPLETION_PROMPT_READY.chat');
          }
        }));
      }

      if (te?.GENERATE_AFTER_DATA) {
        stops.push(eo(te.GENERATE_AFTER_DATA, (d, dryRun) => {
          if (dryRun || d?.dryRun) return;
          if (Array.isArray(d?.prompt)) {
            capture(d.prompt, 'GENERATE_AFTER_DATA.prompt');
          }
        }));
      }

      if (te?.GENERATE_AFTER_COMBINE_PROMPTS) {
        stops.push(eo(te.GENERATE_AFTER_COMBINE_PROMPTS, r => {
          if (r?.dryRun) return;

          if (Array.isArray(r?.prompt)) {
            capture(r.prompt, 'GENERATE_AFTER_COMBINE_PROMPTS.prompt[]');
          } else if (typeof r?.prompt === 'string' && !captured) {
            captured = [{
              role: 'system',
              content: r.prompt,
            }];

            log(`[${taskName}] 已抓取完整请求体 source=GENERATE_AFTER_COMBINE_PROMPTS.prompt string`);
            log(`[${taskName}] 请求体预览`, r.prompt.slice(0, 3000));
          }
        }));
      }

      // ✅ 关键：发一次静默请求，让酒馆正常组合完整 prompt。
      // 不停止它，让它自然结束。
      const p = gen({
        preset_name: 'in_use',
        user_input: '【玄狐上下文抓取】',
        should_silence: true,
        should_stream: false,
        max_chat_history: 'all',
        custom_api: {
          max_tokens: 1,
        },
      }).catch(e => {
        log(`[${taskName}] 静默请求结束/失败，可忽略`, e);
        return '';
      });

      const start = Date.now();

      while (!captured && Date.now() - start < 8000) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 50));
      }

      // 不 stop，等它自然结束，避免 EPERM。
      try {
        await Promise.race([
          p,
          new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)),
        ]);
      } catch { }

      if (!captured?.length) {
        throw new Error(`${taskName}：没有监听到完整请求体。`);
      }

      return captured;
    } finally {
      for (const h of stops) {
        try { h?.stop?.(); } catch { }
      }
    }
  }

  async function ssBuildFilteredMainContextText(taskName, filterSettings, opts = {}) {
    const messages = await ssCaptureMainRequestMessages(taskName, filterSettings);

    const text = ssMessageArrayToContextText(messages, filterSettings, {
      fallbackToFullText: false,
      skipRoleLabels: opts.skipRoleLabels === true,
    });

    if (!text.trim()) {
      throw new Error(
        `${taskName}：已经请求到完整请求体，但按当前标签过滤后为空。请检查狐构/狐忆的包含标签设置。`
      );
    }

    return text;
  }

  // ==================== 狐构/狐忆统一固定上下文 ====================
  // 固定顺序：
  // 1. char_description
  // 2. persona_description
  // 3. world_info_before
  // 4. world_info_after
  // 5. chatHistory
  //
  // 注意：
  // - user 消息不做标签过滤
  // - assistant/char 消息按传入的标签过滤设置过滤
  // - 不限制字数
  // - 不抓完整请求体，不缓存，不临时 generate 抓 prompt

  function ssCleanXuanhuInjectedBlocksFromMessage(text) {
    let msg = String(text || '');

    try {
      msg = msg
        .replace(new RegExp(`${CONFIG.SUMMARY_FLOOR_START}[\\s\\S]*?${CONFIG.SUMMARY_FLOOR_END}`, 'g'), '')
        .replace(new RegExp(`${FULL_SUMMARY_FLOOR_MARK}[\\s\\S]*`, 'g'), '')
        .replace(/<fox_outline>[\s\S]*?<\/fox_outline>/gi, '')
        .replace(/<fox_memory>[\s\S]*?<\/fox_memory>/gi, '')
        .replace(/<SearchResults>[\s\S]*?<\/SearchResults>/gi, '')
        .replace(/<think_fox~>[\s\S]*?<\/think_fox~>/gi, '');

      if (typeof ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock === 'function') {
        msg = ssStripCurrentPromptInjectBlock(msg);
      }
    } catch { }

    return msg.trim();
  }

  function ssBuildUserPreferenceContextPrompt() {
    const lines = [];

    try {
      for (const mod of HUSHEN_MODULES || []) {
        const p = findPromptByIdOrIdentifier(mod.identifier);
        const content = String(p?.content || '').trim();

        if (!content) continue;

        const enabledText = p?.enabled === true ? '启用中' : '未启用但仍读取';
        lines.push(`【${mod.label}｜${enabledText}】\n${content}`);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[固定上下文] 读取狐析用户偏好失败', e);
    }

    if (!lines.length) {
      return {
        role: 'system',
        content: '【狐析用户偏好】\n（暂无用户偏好内容）',
      };
    }

    return {
      role: 'system',
      content: `【狐析用户偏好】
以下是用户通过狐析模块写入或保存的长期偏好。狐构和狐忆分析时必须读取并参考这些内容。

${lines.join('\n\n')}`,
    };
  }

  function ssBuildFilteredChatHistoryPromptsForAnalysis(filterSettings) {
    const prompts = [];

    const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
    const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');

    if (!gcm || !glmi) {
      log('[固定上下文] 缺少 getChatMessages / getLastMessageId');
      return prompts;
    }

    const lastId = glmi();
    if (lastId < 0) {
      log('[固定上下文] 当前无聊天楼层');
      return prompts;
    }

    // ✅ 楼层发送限制：0 = 全部楼层，N = 只发最新 N 楼聊天记录
    // 优先从 filterSettings 读取，否则回退到 foxMemoryConfig
    let contextFloors = filterSettings?.contextFloors;
    if (contextFloors == null || !Number.isFinite(contextFloors)) {
      contextFloors = foxMemoryConfig?.contextFloors;
    }
    let startId = 0;
    if (Number.isFinite(contextFloors) && contextFloors > 0) {
      startId = Math.max(0, lastId - contextFloors + 1);
      log(`[固定上下文] 楼层限制生效：contextFloors=${contextFloors}，发送第${startId}-${lastId}楼`);
    }

    // ✅ 关键修复：
    // 必须读取 all，不能只读 unhidden。
    // 否则被隐藏/折叠/总结流程处理过的 char 楼层会直接消失，只剩 user。
    const ms = gcm(`${startId}-${lastId}`, {
      hide_state: 'all',
      include_swipes: false,
    }) || [];

    const settings = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings(filterSettings || {});

    let userCount = 0;
    let assistantCount = 0;
    let systemCount = 0;
    let skippedCount = 0;

    for (const m of ms) {
      if (!m || typeof m.message !== 'string') {
        skippedCount++;
        continue;
      }

      const role = m.role === 'assistant'
        ? 'assistant'
        : (m.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'system');

      let msg = ssCleanXuanhuInjectedBlocksFromMessage(m.message || '');

      if (!msg.trim()) {
        skippedCount++;
        continue;
      }

      let finalMsg = '';

      if (role === 'user') {
        // ✅ 用户消息绝对不做标签过滤
        finalMsg = msg;
        userCount++;
      } else {
        // ✅ char/assistant/system 先按当前模块标签过滤
        finalMsg = ssFilterByTagPairs(msg, settings, {
          fallbackToFullText: false,
        });

        // ✅ 关键修复：
        // 如果标签过滤把 assistant/char 过滤空了，绝对不能丢楼层。
        // 直接回退到清理后的原文，保证 char 内容一定进入狐构/狐忆上下文。
        if (!finalMsg.trim()) {
          finalMsg = ssFilterByTagPairs(msg, {
            ...settings,
            includeTagPairs: [],
            includeTagStarts: '',
            includeTagEnds: '',
          }, {
            fallbackToFullText: true,
          });
        }

        if (role === 'assistant') assistantCount++;
        else systemCount++;
      }

      finalMsg = String(finalMsg || '').trim();

      if (!finalMsg) {
        skippedCount++;
        continue;
      }

      const name = m.name ? `/${m.name}` : '';
      const hiddenMark = m.is_hidden ? '（隐藏楼层）' : '';

      prompts.push({
        role,
        content: `【第${m.message_id}楼 ${role}${name}${hiddenMark}｜chatHistory，可能包含深度世界书/作者注释影响】\n${finalMsg}`,
      });
    }

    log(
      `[固定上下文] chatHistory 构建完成：总楼层=${ms.length}，注入=${prompts.length}，user=${userCount}，assistant=${assistantCount}，system=${systemCount}，跳过=${skippedCount}`
    );

    return prompts;
  }
  function ssBuildFixedContextOrderedPrompts(filterSettings) {
    return [
      {
        role: 'system',
        content: `【固定上下文读取说明】
接下来会按固定顺序读取角色卡、玩家设定、场景、世界书、用户偏好与聊天记录。
狐构和狐忆必须把这些内容视为完整上下文，不允许只看最新用户输入。`,
      },

      // 角色卡与玩家设定
      'char_description',
      'char_personality',
      'scenario',
      'persona_description',

      // 狐析用户偏好：强制读取所有非空狐析条目
      ssBuildUserPreferenceContextPrompt(),

      // 世界书 before / after
      'world_info_before',
      'world_info_after',

      // 聊天历史：其中会包含按深度插入的世界书条目/作者注释等
      ...ssBuildFilteredChatHistoryPromptsForAnalysis(filterSettings),
    ];
  }

  // ==================== 额外分析任务：临时净化当前预设 ====================
  // 用于狐构/狐忆：
  // - 仍然调用 generate({ preset_name:'in_use' })，让酒馆自己扫描世界书/角色卡/场景。
  // - 但临时关闭普通提示词，避免你的正文思维链、抢话规则、stage 检查块污染分析任务。
  // - 任务结束后恢复所有条目开关。
  const SS_CONTEXT_PLACEHOLDER_IDS = new Set([
    'worldInfoBefore',
    'personaDescription',
    'charDescription',
    'charPersonality',
    'scenario',
    'worldInfoAfter',
    'dialogueExamples',
    'chatHistory',
  ]);

  async function ssRunWithContextOnlyPreset(taskName, runner) {
    const snapshot = [];

    try {
      await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
        for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
          const ref = p.id || p.identifier || '';

          snapshot.push({
            id: p.id || '',
            identifier: p.identifier || '',
            enabled: !!p.enabled,
          });

          // ✅ 只保留上下文占位符，关闭所有普通提示词/系统提示词/预设规则
          if (!SS_CONTEXT_PLACEHOLDER_IDS.has(ref)) {
            p.enabled = false;
          }
        }

        return preset;
      }, { render: 'none' });

      log(`[${taskName}] 已临时净化预设：仅保留上下文占位符`);

      return await runner();
    } finally {
      try {
        await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
          for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
            const old = snapshot.find(x =>
              (x.id && x.id === p.id) ||
              (x.identifier && x.identifier === p.identifier)
            );

            if (old) {
              p.enabled = old.enabled;
            }
          }

          return preset;
        }, { render: 'debounced' });

        log(`[${taskName}] 已恢复预设开关`);
      } catch (e) {
        log(`[${taskName}] 恢复预设开关失败`, e);
      }
    }
  }

  function getRegexes() { return SillyTavern.getContext?.()?.chatCompletionSettings?.extensions?.regex_scripts; }
  function updateMemory(fn) {
    const r = getRegexes();
    if (!r) return Promise.resolve(false);
    fn(r);
    return syncRegexToPreset(r).then(() => true);
  }
  async function syncRegexToPreset(regexArr) {
    try {
      await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
        if (!preset?.extensions) return preset;
        if (!preset.extensions.regex_scripts) return preset;
        for (const src of regexArr) {
          const dst = preset.extensions.regex_scripts.find(p => p.id === src.id);
          if (dst) {
            if (typeof src.disabled === 'boolean') dst.disabled = src.disabled;
            if (typeof src.markdownOnly === 'boolean') dst.markdownOnly = src.markdownOnly;
          }
        }
        return preset;
      }, { render: 'debounced' });
      const ctx = SillyTavern?.getContext?.();
      if (ctx?.saveSettingsDebounced) ctx.saveSettingsDebounced();
    } catch (e) {
      log('[syncRegexToPreset] 同步regex到预设失败', e);
    }
  }
  function isThoughtVisible() { const hr = (getRegexes() || []).find(r => r.id === CONFIG.HIDE_ID); return !hr || hr.markdownOnly === false; }
  async function setThoughtVisible(v) { await updateMemory(rx => { const r = rx.find(r => r.id === CONFIG.HIDE_ID); if (r) { r.disabled = false; r.markdownOnly = !v; } }); }
  function getStyleId(s, e) { if (s === 'HUSHE') return e ? CONFIG.HUSHE_EXPANDED_ID : CONFIG.HUSHE_ID; if (s === 'JIANYUE') return e ? CONFIG.JIANYUE_EXPANDED_ID : CONFIG.JIANYUE_ID; if (s === 'BIAOLI') return e ? CONFIG.BIAOLI_EXPANDED_ID : CONFIG.BIAOLI_ID; return e ? CONFIG.HUSHE_EXPANDED_ID : CONFIG.HUSHE_ID; }
  function getMiniId(s) { if (s === 'HUSHE') return CONFIG.MINI_HUSHE_ID; if (s === 'JIANYUE') return CONFIG.MINI_JIANYUE_ID; if (s === 'BIAOLI') return CONFIG.MINI_BIAOLI_ID; return CONFIG.MINI_HUSHE_ID; }
  async function setBeautyStyle(style, expanded) { if (state.isMini) { await disableAllBeauty(); await enableOnlyMini(style); return; } await disableAllMini(); const tid = getStyleId(style, expanded); await updateMemory(rx => { for (const id of ALL_STYLE_IDS) { const r = rx.find(r => r.id === id); if (r) r.disabled = (id !== tid); } }); }
  async function disableAllBeauty() { await updateMemory(rx => { for (const id of ALL_STYLE_IDS) { const r = rx.find(r => r.id === id); if (r) r.disabled = true; } }); }
  async function disableAllMini() { await updateMemory(rx => { for (const id of ALL_MINI_IDS) { const r = rx.find(r => r.id === id); if (r) r.disabled = true; } }); }
  async function enableOnlyMini(style) { const mid = getMiniId(style); await updateMemory(rx => { for (const id of ALL_MINI_IDS) { const r = rx.find(r => r.id === id); if (r) r.disabled = (id !== mid); } }); }
  function getCurrentLastMessageId() {
    try {
      const fn = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      return typeof fn === 'function' ? (fn() ?? -1) : -1;
    } catch {
      return -1;
    }
  }
  async function forceRefresh(mid) {
    const id = mid ?? getCurrentLastMessageId();
    const scm = getFn('setChatMessages');
    if (id >= 0 && typeof scm === 'function') {
      await scm([{ message_id: id }], { refresh: 'affected' });
    }
  }

  async function forceRefreshAll() {
    try {
      const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      const scm = getFn('setChatMessages');
      const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
      if (!glmi || !scm || !gcm) return;
      const lastId = glmi();
      if (lastId < 0) return;
      const msgs = gcm(`0-${lastId}`);
      if (!Array.isArray(msgs)) return;
      const updates = msgs.map(m => ({ message_id: m.message_id })).filter(u => u.message_id != null);
      if (updates.length > 0) {
        await scm(updates, { refresh: 'affected' });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[forceRefreshAll] 失败', e);
    }
  }
  function getStyleName(s) { const n = { HUSHE: '🦊 狐神抚', JIANYUE: '◈ 简约黑', BIAOLI: '◇ 表裏1.0' }; return n[s] || '未知'; }
  function isStreamingEnabled() {
    try {
      return getPreset?.('in_use')?.settings?.should_stream === true;
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function setStreaming(enabled) {
    await updatePresetWith('in_use', (p) => {
      if (!p.settings) p.settings = {};
      p.settings.should_stream = !!enabled;
      return p;
    }, { render: 'debounced' });
  }

  // ✅ 平滑流式状态同步：解决刷新后 UI 显示开，但预设 should_stream 实际关闭的问题
  async function syncSmoothStreamState(reason = '') {
    try {
      if (state.enabled && !isStreamingEnabled()) {
        await setStreaming(true);
        log(`[平滑流式] 已自动重新开启 should_stream：${reason}`);
      }

      updateBubbleUI?.();
      updateStatusChip?.();
    } catch (e) {
      log('[平滑流式] 同步失败', e);
    }
  }

  function buildStatusText() {
    const streamText = state.enabled
      ? (isStreamingEnabled() ? '流式已开' : '流式待同步')
      : '流式关闭';

    return `${getStyleName(state.currentStyle)} · ${state.isMini ? 'Mini' : (state.isExpanded ? '展开' : '收起')} · ${isThoughtVisible() ? '显示' : '隐藏'} · ${streamText}`;
  }

  // ==================== 预设操作 ====================
  const PRESET_GROUP_OFF_VALUE = '__SS_GROUP_OFF__';


  function findPromptInCurrentPreset(ref) {
    try {
      const prompts =
        getPreset('in_use')?.prompts ||
        getPromptsArray() ||
        [];

      return prompts.find(p => p?.id === ref || p?.identifier === ref) || null;
    } catch (e) {
      return null;
    }
  }

  async function togglePromptById(id, enabled) {
    await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
      const prompt = preset.prompts.find(p => p.id === id || p.identifier === id);
      if (prompt) prompt.enabled = enabled;
      return preset;
    });
  }

  async function selectPromptInGroup(groupConfig, targetId) {
    await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
      const isOff = targetId === PRESET_GROUP_OFF_VALUE;

      for (const opt of groupConfig.options) {
        const prompt = preset.prompts.find(p => p.id === opt.id || p.identifier === opt.id);
        if (prompt) prompt.enabled = !isOff && (opt.id === targetId);
      }

      return preset;
    });
  }

  function isPromptEnabledInPreset(ref) {
    try {
      return findPromptInCurrentPreset(ref)?.enabled === true;
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function getActiveOptionInGroupFromPreset(groupConfig) {
    try {
      const prompts =
        getPreset('in_use')?.prompts ||
        getPromptsArray() ||
        [];

      for (const opt of groupConfig.options) {
        const prompt = prompts.find(p => p?.id === opt.id || p?.identifier === opt.id);
        if (prompt?.enabled === true) return opt;
      }

      return null;
    } catch (e) {
      return null;
    }
  }

  function getPromptContentById(id) { try { const prompts = getPreset('in_use').prompts; const p = prompts.find(p => p.id === id); return p?.content || ''; } catch (e) { return ''; } }
  function findPromptByIdOrIdentifier(ref) {
    try {
      const prompts = getPreset('in_use').prompts;
      return prompts.find(p => p.id === ref || p.identifier === ref) || null;
    } catch (e) {
      return null;
    }
  }

  function getPromptContentByRef(ref) {
    try {
      const p = findPromptByIdOrIdentifier(ref);
      return p?.content || '';
    } catch (e) {
      return '';
    }
  }

  async function setPromptContentByRef(ref, content) {
    let found = false;

    await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
      const p = preset.prompts.find(p => p.id === ref || p.identifier === ref);
      if (p) {
        p.content = content;
        found = true;
      }
      return preset;
    });

    if (!found) {
      throw new Error(`未找到自定义条目：${ref}`);
    }
  }

  function escapeRegExpForSetvar(s) {
    return String(s).replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  }

  function detectFirstSetvarName(fullContent) {
    const text = String(fullContent || '');
    const m = text.match(/\{\{setvar::([^:}]+)::/);
    return m ? m[1].trim() : '';
  }

  function extractSetvarInner(fullContent, varName) {
    if (!varName) return fullContent || '';

    const text = String(fullContent || '');
    const re = new RegExp(`\\{\\{setvar::${escapeRegExpForSetvar(varName)}::([\\s\\S]*?)\\}\\}`, 'm');
    const m = text.match(re);

    if (m) return m[1] || '';

    return '';
  }

  function buildSetvarContent(originalContent, varName, innerContent, templatePrefix = '') {
    const original = String(originalContent || '');
    const inner = String(innerContent || '');

    if (!varName) return inner;

    const re = new RegExp(`\\{\\{setvar::${escapeRegExpForSetvar(varName)}::[\\s\\S]*?\\}\\}`, 'm');
    const block = `{{setvar::${varName}::\n${inner}\n}}`;

    // 原内容里已有对应 setvar：只替换 setvar 块，保留外部注释、说明等内容
    if (re.test(original)) {
      return original.replace(re, block);
    }

    // 原内容里没有 setvar：兜底创建一个，避免保存成纯文本导致 getvar 失效
    return `${templatePrefix || ''}${block}\n`;
  }

  function replaceSetvarInner(fullContent, varName, innerContent) {
    return buildSetvarContent(fullContent, varName, innerContent, '');
  }

  async function setPromptContentById(id, content) { await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => { const p = preset.prompts.find(p => p.id === id); if (p) p.content = content; return preset; }); }
  const FULL_SUMMARY_FLOOR_MARK = '<!-- XUANHU_FULL_SUMMARY_FLOOR -->';

  function buildFullSummaryFloorMessage(summaryText) {
    return `${FULL_SUMMARY_FLOOR_MARK}
  【长期剧情记忆｜全文大总结】

  以下内容是截至目前为止的完整剧情记录。后续剧情必须以此为准；若上文旧聊天被隐藏，则这份总结就是后续剧情的主要依据。

  ${String(summaryText || '').trim()}`;
  }

  /**
   * 将全文大总结作为最新 assistant 楼层注入聊天记录。
   *
   * @param {string} summaryText 总结文本
   * @param {object} opts
   * @param {boolean} opts.hidePrevious 是否隐藏旧楼层，默认 true
   * @param {boolean} opts.clearPresetSummary 是否清空原预设大总结条目，默认 true，避免重复注入
   */
  async function injectFullSummaryAsLatestAssistantFloor(summaryText, opts = {}) {
    const {
      hidePrevious = true,
      clearPresetSummary = true,
      hideBefore = -1,
    } = opts;

    const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
    const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
    const scm = getFn('setChatMessages');
    const ccm = getFn('createChatMessages');

    if (!glmi || !gcm || !scm || !ccm) {
      throw new Error('缺少聊天楼层 API：getLastMessageId / getChatMessages / setChatMessages / createChatMessages');
    }

    const lastId = glmi();
    const summary = String(summaryText || '').trim();

    if (!summary) {
      throw new Error('总结内容为空');
    }

    const finalMessage = buildFullSummaryFloorMessage(summary);

    // 1. 可选：隐藏旧楼层。
    if (hideBefore > 0 || (hidePrevious && lastId >= 0)) {
      const oldMessages = gcm(`0-${lastId}`, {
        hide_state: 'all',
        include_swipes: false,
      }) || [];

      const endId = hideBefore > 0 ? Math.min(hideBefore, lastId) : lastId;
      const updates = [];

      for (const m of oldMessages) {
        const mid = Number(m.message_id);
        if (!Number.isFinite(mid) || mid < 0) continue;
        if (mid > endId) continue;
        if (m.is_hidden) continue;

        updates.push({
          message_id: mid,
          is_hidden: true,
        });
      }

      if (updates.length) {
        await scm(updates, { refresh: 'none' });
      }
    }

    // 2. 在末尾创建一条新的 assistant 楼层，作为最新一楼。
    await ccm([{
      role: 'assistant',
      name: '全文大总结',
      is_hidden: false,
      message: finalMessage,
      data: {
        xuanhu_full_summary_floor: true,
        created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
      extra: {
        xuanhu_full_summary_floor: true,
      },
    }], {
      insert_before: 'end',
      refresh: 'affected',
    });

    // 3. 可选：清空原预设总结条目，避免同时从预设和聊天记录重复注入。
    if (clearPresetSummary) {
      try {
        await setPromptContentById(CONFIG.SUMMARY_ID, '');
      } catch (e) {
        log('清空原预设大总结条目失败，可忽略', e);
      }
    }
  }
