            : '✅ 狐构已关闭预设注入：仅本地保存，并插入当前请求体',
          state.outlineInjectToPreset ? 'success' : 'info'
        );
      };
    }

    topDoc.getElementById('outline-generate-btn').onclick = async () => {
      const inp = topDoc.getElementById('outline-user-input');
      state.outlineUserCorrection = inp?.value || '';
      localStorage.setItem('SPreset_OutlineUserCorrection', state.outlineUserCorrection);
      await outlineGenerate();
    };
    topDoc.getElementById('outline-correct-btn').onclick = async () => {
      const inp = topDoc.getElementById('outline-user-input');
      state.outlineUserCorrection = inp?.value || '';
      localStorage.setItem('SPreset_OutlineUserCorrection', state.outlineUserCorrection);
      await outlineCorrect();
    };
    const autoToggle = topDoc.getElementById('outline-auto-toggle');
    const autoInterval = topDoc.getElementById('outline-auto-interval');
    if (autoToggle) autoToggle.onchange = () => {
      state.outlineAutoAnalysis = autoToggle.checked;
      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_AUTO_KEY, autoToggle.checked ? 'true' : 'false');

      if (autoToggle.checked) {
        state.outlineLastAnalyzedId = getCurrentLastMessageId();
        localStorage.setItem(outlineGetLastAnalyzedKey(), String(state.outlineLastAnalyzedId));

        // 双保险：如果之前因为脚本热重载/面板状态导致监听丢失，这里重新注册。
        registerOutlineAutoListener();
      }

      toast(
        autoToggle.checked
          ? `✅ 已开启狐构动态分析，将从当前第 ${state.outlineLastAnalyzedId} 楼开始计数，每 ${state.outlineAutoInterval} 楼自动修正一次`
          : '已关闭狐构动态分析',
        autoToggle.checked ? 'success' : 'info'
      );
    };
    if (autoInterval) {
      const saveInterval = () => {
        const v = Math.max(1, parseInt(autoInterval.value) || 30);
        state.outlineAutoInterval = v;
        autoInterval.value = String(v);
        localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_INTERVAL_KEY, String(v));
        toast(`✅ 狐构动态分析间隔已保存：每 ${v} 楼`, 'success');
      };

      autoInterval.onchange = saveInterval;
      autoInterval.onblur = saveInterval;
    }

    const outlineFloorsInput = topDoc.getElementById('outline-context-floors');
    if (outlineFloorsInput) {
      const saveOutlineFloors = () => {
        const v = Math.max(0, parseInt(outlineFloorsInput.value) || 0);

        state.outlineContextFloors = v;
        outlineFloorsInput.value = String(v);

        localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_CONTEXT_FLOORS_KEY, String(v));

        toast(
          v === 0
            ? '✅ 狐构上下文范围已保存：读取全部 AI/char 楼层，用户楼层不计数'
            : `✅ 狐构上下文范围已保存：最近 ${v} 个 AI/char 楼层，用户楼层不计数`,
          'success'
        );
      };

      outlineFloorsInput.onchange = saveOutlineFloors;
      outlineFloorsInput.onblur = saveOutlineFloors;
    }

    ssBindTagPairsEditor('outline-inc', panel);
    ssBindTagPairsEditor('outline-exc', panel);

    const outlineFilterSaveBtn = topDoc.getElementById('outline-filter-save');
    if (outlineFilterSaveBtn) {
      outlineFilterSaveBtn.onclick = () => {
        state.outlineFilterSettings = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings({
          enableContentFilter: !!topDoc.getElementById('outline-filter-enable')?.checked,
          includeTagPairs: ssReadTagPairsEditor('outline-inc', panel),
          excludeTagPairs: ssReadTagPairsEditor('outline-exc', panel),
        });

        saveOutlineFilterSettings();

        toast('✅ 狐构上下文标签过滤设置已保存', 'success');
      };
    }

    // 管理面板遮罩点击
    const mgmtMask = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-mgmt-mask');
    if (mgmtMask) mgmtMask.onclick = () => {
      const ok = topWindow?.confirm
        ? topWindow.confirm('⚠️ 剧透警告！确定要查看大纲内容吗？')
        : confirm('⚠️ 剧透警告！确定要查看大纲内容吗？');
      if (!ok) return;
      mgmtMask.style.display = 'none';
      const ta = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-edit-textarea');
      const btns = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-edit-btns');
      if (ta) { ta.style.display = 'block'; ta.value = state.outlineText || ''; }
      if (btns) { btns.style.display = 'flex'; btns.style.flexWrap = 'wrap'; }
    };
    const refreshBtn = topDoc.getElementById('outline-refresh-btn');
    if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.onclick = () => {
      const ta = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-edit-textarea');
      if (ta) ta.value = state.outlineText || getPromptContentById(CONFIG.OUTLINE_ID) || '';
      toast('已刷新', 'info');
    };
    const saveBtn = topDoc.getElementById('outline-save-btn');
    if (saveBtn) saveBtn.onclick = async () => {
      const ta = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-edit-textarea');
      const v = ta?.value || '';
      await outlineSetRawAndInject(v);
      toast('✅ 已保存', 'success');
    };
    const clearBtn = topDoc.getElementById('outline-clear-btn');
    if (clearBtn) clearBtn.onclick = async () => {
      const ok = topWindow?.confirm ? topWindow.confirm('确定要清除大纲吗？') : confirm('确定要清除大纲吗？');
      if (!ok) return;
      state.outlineText = '';
      state.outlineSelectedCard = -1;
      outlineSaveLocalRaw('');
      await setPromptContentById(CONFIG.OUTLINE_ID, '');
      const ta = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-edit-textarea');
      if (ta) ta.value = '';
      const container = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-candidates');
      if (container) container.innerHTML = '';
      toast('🗑️ 已清除大纲', 'success');
      const bottomSaveBtn = topDoc.getElementById('outline-save-bottom-btn');
      if (bottomSaveBtn) bottomSaveBtn.onclick = async () => {
        try {
          const inp = topDoc.getElementById('outline-user-input');
          state.outlineUserCorrection = inp?.value || '';
          localStorage.setItem('SPreset_OutlineUserCorrection', state.outlineUserCorrection);

          const autoToggle = topDoc.getElementById('outline-auto-toggle');
          const autoInterval = topDoc.getElementById('outline-auto-interval');

          if (autoToggle) {
            state.outlineAutoAnalysis = autoToggle.checked;
            localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_AUTO_KEY, autoToggle.checked ? 'true' : 'false');
          }

          if (autoInterval) {
            const v = Math.max(1, parseInt(autoInterval.value) || 30);
            state.outlineAutoInterval = v;
            autoInterval.value = String(v);
            localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_INTERVAL_KEY, String(v));
          }

          const ta = topDoc.getElementById('ss-outline-edit-textarea');

          // 只有用户已经主动展开大纲管理时，才读取 textarea 内容。
          // 否则不读取隐藏文本框，避免为了保存设置而触碰剧透内容。
          if (ta && ta.style.display !== 'none') {
            state.outlineText = ta.value || '';
            await outlineSetRawAndInject(state.outlineText || current);
          } else {
            const current = outlineLoadCurrentText();
            if (current?.trim()) {
              await outlineSetRawAndInject(state.outlineText || current);
            }
          }

          toast('✅ 狐构设置已保存，不需要打开剧透管理面板', 'success');
        } catch (e) {
          toast(`❌ 保存失败：${e.message || e}`, 'error');
        }
      };

    };
  }

  function onOutlineAutoAnalysis(mid) {
    try {
      if (!state.outlineAutoAnalysis) return;
      if (state.outlineIsCorrecting || state.outlineIsGenerating) return;

      const current = outlineLoadCurrentText().trim();
      if (!current) return;

      const interval = Math.max(1, parseInt(state.outlineAutoInterval) || 30);
      const currentId = Number(mid ?? getCurrentLastMessageId());

      if (!Number.isFinite(currentId) || currentId < 0) return;

      // ✅ 统一使用角色卡隔离的 key，避免旧版写到 SPreset_OutlineLastAnalyzedId 后读不到。
      const key = outlineGetLastAnalyzedKey();

      let lastId = Number(state.outlineLastAnalyzedId);

      if (!Number.isFinite(lastId) || lastId < 0) {
        const savedLast = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(key) || '-1');

        if (Number.isFinite(savedLast) && savedLast >= 0) {
          lastId = savedLast;
          state.outlineLastAnalyzedId = savedLast;
        } else {
          // 第一次开启时，以当前楼为起点，不立刻修正。
          state.outlineLastAnalyzedId = currentId;
          localStorage.setItem(key, String(currentId));
          log(`[狐构自动修正] 初始化计数点：第 ${currentId} 楼，间隔 ${interval}`);
          return;
        }
      }

      // ✅ 自动修正间隔只统计 AI/char 楼层。
      // 用户楼层不参与计数。
      const diff = outlineCountCharFloorsBetween(lastId, currentId);

      log(`[狐构自动修正] 当前楼=${currentId}，上次=${lastId}，AI楼层差值=${diff}，间隔=${interval}`);

      if (diff < interval) return;

      // ✅ 达到间隔后先记录，防止连续触发。
      state.outlineLastAnalyzedId = currentId;
      localStorage.setItem(key, String(currentId));

      toast(`🔬 狐构达到 ${interval} 楼间隔，开始自动动态修正大纲……`, 'info');

      setTimeout(() => {
        xhEnqueueAutoTask(
          'outline_auto_correct',
          '狐构自动动态修正',
          () => outlineCorrect(),
          { dedupe: true }
        );
      }, 800);
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐构自动修正] 检查失败', e);
    }
  }

  function registerOutlineAutoListener() {
    unregisterOutlineAutoListener();

    const eo = getFn('eventOn');
    const te = getFn('tavern_events') || tavern_events;

    if (typeof eo !== 'function' || !te?.GENERATION_ENDED) {
      log('[狐构自动修正] 注册失败：缺少 eventOn 或 GENERATION_ENDED');
      return;
    }

    outlineAutoHandle = eo(te.GENERATION_ENDED, (messageId) => {
      // AI 回复结束后再检查，给酒馆一点时间写入最后楼层。
      setTimeout(() => {
        onOutlineAutoAnalysis(messageId);
      }, 1800);
    });

    log('[狐构自动修正] 已注册独立 GENERATION_ENDED 监听');
  }

  function unregisterOutlineAutoListener() {
    try {
      outlineAutoHandle?.stop?.();
    } catch (e) { }

    outlineAutoHandle = null;
  }

  // ==================== 狐析面板 ====================

    includeTagEnds: '</content>\n</All_Context>',

  let foxMemoryData = {
    // 单一数据源：localStorage

    characters: {},              // { charId: { memories: [], lastAnalysis: '' } }
  };

  let foxMemoryEditing = {

  const HUSHEN_ANALYSIS_MODULES = [
    { id: 'story_tone', label: '🎭 故事基调', hint: '你喜欢什么样的故事基调呀？比如轻松日常、黑暗奇幻、史诗冒险、温馨治愈……？' },
    { id: 'writing_style', label: '🖋️ 文笔偏好', hint: '你喜欢什么样的文笔风格？华丽细腻还是简洁直白？有没有特别喜欢的作家文风？' },
    { id: 'pacing', label: '⏱️ 整体节奏', hint: '你偏好快节奏推进还是慢热展开？情感线和剧情线的比例如何？' },
    { id: 'character_focus', label: '👤 人物描写重心', hint: '你更在意角色的外貌、神态、心理活动、动作描写？哪些可以多写，哪些可以略写？' },

    { id: 'world_building', label: '🌍 世界观/设定', hint: '你对世界观设定的详细程度有什么要求？需要大量背景还是点到为止？' },

  function hushenConversationReset() {
    hushenConversation = [];
    hushenModuleIndex = 0;
    hushenConversationActive = false;
    hushenSummaryText = '';
    hushenIsSending = false;
  }

  function hushenAddMessage(role, text) {
    hushenConversation.push({ role, text });
    hushenRenderChat();
  }

  function hushenRenderChat() {
    const container = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-chat-messages');
    if (!container) return;

    container.innerHTML = '';

    hushenConversation.forEach((msg, index) => {
      const wrap = topDoc.createElement('div');
      wrap.style.cssText = `margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;${msg.role === 'ai' ? 'align-items:flex-start;' : 'align-items:flex-end;'}`;

      const el = topDoc.createElement('div');
      el.style.cssText = `position:relative;max-width:80%;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;${msg.role === 'ai'
        ? 'background:rgba(232,120,74,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12);color:#e8ddd4;'
        : 'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#a09088;text-align:right;'
        }`;

      el.textContent = msg.text;

      const tools = topDoc.createElement('div');
      tools.style.cssText = `display:flex;gap:5px;margin-top:4px;opacity:0.85;${msg.role === 'ai' ? '' : 'justify-content:flex-end;'}`;

      const mkBtn = (txt, title, fn) => {
        const b = topDoc.createElement('button');
        b.textContent = txt;
        b.title = title;
        b.style.cssText = 'padding:2px 7px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.18);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#90756a;cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;';
        b.onclick = fn;
        return b;
      };

      tools.appendChild(mkBtn('✏️', '编辑这条消息', () => hushenEditMessage(index)));
      tools.appendChild(mkBtn('🔁', '从这一步重roll', () => hushenRerollFrom(index)));
      tools.appendChild(mkBtn('↩️', '回退到这一步', () => hushenRollbackTo(index)));

      wrap.appendChild(el);
      wrap.appendChild(tools);
      container.appendChild(wrap);
    });

    container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
  }
  async function hushenSendUserMessage() {
    if (ssIsTaskRunning('hushen_chat')) {
      ssCancelTask('hushen_chat', '狐析对话');
      hushenIsSending = false;

      const sendBtn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-chat-send');
      if (sendBtn) {
        sendBtn.textContent = '发送';
        sendBtn.disabled = false;
      }

      return;
    }

    const input = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-chat-input');
    const text = input?.value?.trim();

    if (!text) return;

    input.value = '';
    hushenAddMessage('user', text);

    await hushenGenerateReplyForExistingUser(text);
  }
  async function hushenGenerateSummary() {
    if (hushenIsSending || ssIsTaskRunning('hushen_summary')) {
      ssCancelTask('hushen_summary', '狐析总结');
      hushenIsSending = false;
      const btn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-summary-btn');
      if (btn) {
        btn.textContent = '📋 生成总结并预览';
        btn.disabled = false;
      }
      return;
    }
    hushenIsSending = true;
    const btn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-summary-btn');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = '⏳ 生成中...'; btn.disabled = true; }
    try {
      const conversationText = hushenConversation.map(m => `${m.role === 'ai' ? '狐神抚' : '用户'}：${m.text}`).join('\n\n');
      const s = state.hushenSettings || {};
      const style = s.style || 'detailed';
      const minW = Math.max(10, parseInt(s.minWords) || 100);
      const maxW = Math.max(minW + 10, parseInt(s.maxWords) || 250);
      const system = `你是总结专家，请你综合以上用户与助手的全部对话，进行一个彻底的用户偏好总结

输出格式要求：
${style === 'concise' ? '每个模块用简洁的要点列出，1-3个核心要点' : '每个模块详细列出，2-5个要点，展开说明'}。
每个模块${minW}-${maxW}字。

请按以下模块顺序整理，每个模块用【模块名】开头：
${HUSHEN_ANALYSIS_MODULES.map(m => `【${m.label}】`).join('\n')}

最后，在所有模块之后，加一个【综合用户偏好】的总结，综合以上所有分析结果，详细描绘用户角色应具备的特质、形象，以及用户喜欢的风格、世界观、偏好。

用以下标签包裹全部总结内容：
<fox_prefs_summary>
（总结内容）
</fox_prefs_summary>

只输出标签内的内容，不加任何其他说明。`;

      const gr = getFn('generateRaw');
      const r = await ssGenerateRaw('hushen_summary', {
        user_input: conversationText, should_silence: true, should_stream: false, max_chat_history: 0,
        ordered_prompts: [{ role: 'system', content: system }, 'user_input']
      });
      const text = typeof r === 'string' ? r : (r?.content || '');
      const match = text.match(/<fox_prefs_summary>([\s\S]*?)<\/fox_prefs_summary>/);
      const summary = match ? match[1].trim() : text.trim();
      if (summary) {
        hushenSummaryText = summary;
        const preview = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-summary-preview');
        if (preview) { preview.style.display = 'block'; preview.value = summary; }
        toast('✅ 总结已生成，可编辑后注入', 'success');
      } else {
        toast('❌ 总结内容为空', 'error');
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('狐析总结失败', e);
      toast(`❌ 失败：${e.message}`, 'error');
    } finally {
      hushenIsSending = false;
      ssEndTask('hushen_summary');
      if (btn) { btn.textContent = '📋 生成总结并预览'; btn.disabled = false; }
    }
  }

  async function hushenInjectSummary() {
    const preview = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-summary-preview');
    const text = (preview?.value || hushenSummaryText || '').trim();

    if (!text) {
      toast('⚠️ 请先生成总结', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    hushenSummaryText = text;

    const sections = text.split(/【([^】]+)】/);
    const moduleMap = {};

    for (let i = 1; i < sections.length; i += 2) {
      const label = sections[i]?.trim();
      const content = sections[i + 1]?.trim();
      if (label && content) moduleMap[label] = content;
    }

    let injected = 0;

    if (!state.hushenSettings) state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();
    if (!state.hushenSettings.analyzed) state.hushenSettings.analyzed = {};

    for (const mod of HUSHEN_MODULES) {
      const cleanLabel = mod.label.replace(/^[^\s]+\s/, '').trim();

      const content =
        moduleMap[mod.label] ||
        moduleMap[cleanLabel] ||
        moduleMap[mod.label.replace(/^[^\s]+\s/, '')];

      if (content) {
        injectUserPrefEntry(mod.identifier, content, mod.label);
        state.hushenSettings.analyzed[mod.id] = content;
        injected++;
      }
    }

    saveHushenSettings();

    if (injected > 0) {
      toast(`✅ 已注入 ${injected} 个模块的偏好`, 'success');
      state.hushenLastSummary = text;
      localStorage.setItem('SPreset_HushenLastSummary', text);
      hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();
    } else {
      toast('⚠️ 未能匹配到任何模块，请检查总结格式', 'warning');
    }
  }

            <div style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;margin-bottom:5px;">用户输入 / 修正意见</div>

            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;">

              <button class="hushen-module-save" style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.25);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">💾 保存到预设</button>
              <button class="hushen-module-toggle" style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.25);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🔘 切换</button>
              <button class="hushen-module-clear" style="flex:1;padding:8px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.35);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.15);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🗑️ 清空</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </details>
      `;
    }

    html += `
        <div id="hushen-module-status" style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;margin-top:8px;"></div>
      </div>
    `;

    return html;
  }

  async function hushenAnalyzeModuleWithExisting(moduleId, userInput) {
    const module = HUSHEN_MODULES.find(m => m.id === moduleId);
    if (!module) return null;

    const existing =
      hushenGetModulePresetContent(module) ||
      state.hushenSettings?.analyzed?.[module.id] ||
      '';

    const user = String(userInput || '').trim();

    if (!existing.trim() && !user.trim()) {
      return null;
    }

    const mergedInput = existing.trim()
      ? `【当前已注入/已有偏好内容】\n${existing.trim()}\n\n【用户补充/修正意见】\n${user || '（无额外补充，请根据已有内容重新整理优化）'}`
      : user;

    return await hushenAnalyzeModule(moduleId, mergedInput);
  }

  function hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates() {
    const manager = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-manager');
    if (!manager) return;

    const states = getPreferenceStates();
    let enabledCount = 0;

    for (const mod of HUSHEN_MODULES) {
      const enabled = !!states[mod.id];
      if (enabled) enabledCount++;

      const stateEl = manager.querySelector(`[data-module-state="${CSS.escape(mod.id)}"]`);
      if (stateEl) {
        stateEl.textContent = enabled ? '使用中' : '关闭';
        stateEl.style.color = enabled ? '#f0a070' : '#706058';
      }

      const card = manager.querySelector(`.hushen-module-card[data-module="${CSS.escape(mod.id)}"]`);
      const btn = card?.querySelector('.hushen-module-toggle');
      if (btn) btn.textContent = enabled ? '🔘 关闭此偏好' : '🔘 启用此偏好';
    }

    const status = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-status');
    if (status) {
      status.textContent = `当前状态：${enabledCount}/${HUSHEN_MODULES.length} 个狐析模块正在使用用户偏好`;
    }
  }

  function hushenRefreshModuleManagerFromPreset() {
    const manager = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-manager');
    if (!manager) return;

    if (!state.hushenSettings) state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();
    if (!state.hushenSettings.analyzed) state.hushenSettings.analyzed = {};

    for (const mod of HUSHEN_MODULES) {
      const card = manager.querySelector(`.hushen-module-card[data-module="${CSS.escape(mod.id)}"]`);
      if (!card) continue;

      const content = hushenGetModulePresetContent(mod);
      const result = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-result');

      if (result) result.value = content || state.hushenSettings.analyzed?.[mod.id] || '';
      if (content) state.hushenSettings.analyzed[mod.id] = content;
    }

    saveHushenSettings();
    hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();
  }

  function hushenBindModuleManagerEvents() {
    const manager = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-manager');
    if (!manager || manager.dataset.bound === '1') return;
    manager.dataset.bound = '1';

    manager.querySelectorAll('.hushen-module-analyze').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = async () => {
        const card = btn.closest('.hushen-module-card');
        const moduleId = card?.dataset?.module;
        const module = HUSHEN_MODULES.find(m => m.id === moduleId);
        if (!module) return;

        const input = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-input');
        const result = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-result');
        const userInput = input?.value || '';

        const existing = hushenGetModulePresetContent(module) || result?.value || '';

        if (!userInput.trim() && !existing.trim()) {
          toast('⚠️ 没有已有内容，也没有补充输入，无法分析', 'warning');
          return;
        }

        if (!state.hushenSettings) state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();
        if (!state.hushenSettings.drafts) state.hushenSettings.drafts = {};

        state.hushenSettings.drafts[moduleId] = userInput;
        saveHushenSettings();

        const old = btn.textContent;
        btn.textContent = '⏳ 分析中...';
        btn.disabled = true;

        try {
          const analyzed = await hushenAnalyzeModuleWithExisting(moduleId, userInput);

          if (!analyzed) {
            toast('❌ 分析返回空内容', 'error');
            return;
          }

          result.value = analyzed;

          if (!state.hushenSettings.analyzed) state.hushenSettings.analyzed = {};
          state.hushenSettings.analyzed[moduleId] = analyzed;
          saveHushenSettings();

          await injectUserPrefEntry(module.identifier, analyzed, module.label);
          hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();

          toast(`✅ 已重生成并写入：${module.label}`, 'success');
        } catch (e) {
          toast(`❌ 分析失败：${e.message || e}`, 'error');
        } finally {
          btn.textContent = old;
          btn.disabled = false;
        }
      };
    });

    manager.querySelectorAll('.hushen-module-save').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = async () => {
        const card = btn.closest('.hushen-module-card');
        const moduleId = card?.dataset?.module;
        const module = HUSHEN_MODULES.find(m => m.id === moduleId);
        if (!module) return;

        const input = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-input');
        const result = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-result');
        const content = result?.value?.trim() || '';

        if (!content) {
          toast('⚠️ 内容为空，未保存', 'warning');
          return;
        }

        if (!state.hushenSettings) state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();
        if (!state.hushenSettings.analyzed) state.hushenSettings.analyzed = {};
        if (!state.hushenSettings.drafts) state.hushenSettings.drafts = {};

        state.hushenSettings.analyzed[moduleId] = content;
        state.hushenSettings.drafts[moduleId] = input?.value || '';
        saveHushenSettings();

        await injectUserPrefEntry(module.identifier, content, module.label);
        hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();

        toast(`✅ 已保存：${module.label}`, 'success');
      };
    });

    manager.querySelectorAll('.hushen-module-toggle').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = async () => {
        const card = btn.closest('.hushen-module-card');
        const moduleId = card?.dataset?.module;
        const module = HUSHEN_MODULES.find(m => m.id === moduleId);
        if (!module) return;

        // 每次点击前都重新读取当前预设状态，不读面板缓存
        const states = getPreferenceStates();
        const next = !states[moduleId];

        const ok = await toggleModulePreference(module.identifier, next, module.label);

        if (ok) {
          hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();
          toast(next ? `✅ 已启用：${module.label}` : `📴 已关闭：${module.label}`, next ? 'success' : 'info');
        }
      };
    });

    manager.querySelectorAll('.hushen-module-clear').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = async () => {
        const card = btn.closest('.hushen-module-card');
        const moduleId = card?.dataset?.module;
        const module = HUSHEN_MODULES.find(m => m.id === moduleId);
        if (!module) return;

        const ok = topWindow?.confirm
          ? topWindow.confirm(`确定要清空「${module.label}」吗？`)
          : confirm(`确定要清空「${module.label}」吗？`);

        if (!ok) return;

        const input = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-input');
        const result = card.querySelector('.hushen-module-result');

        if (input) input.value = '';
        if (result) result.value = '';

        if (!state.hushenSettings) state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();
        delete state.hushenSettings.drafts?.[moduleId];
        delete state.hushenSettings.analyzed?.[moduleId];
        saveHushenSettings();

        await clearModulePreference(module.identifier, module.label);
        hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();

        toast(`🗑️ 已清空：${module.label}`, 'success');
      };
    });

    const refreshBtn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-refresh-all');
    if (refreshBtn) {
      refreshBtn.onclick = () => {
        hushenRefreshModuleManagerFromPreset();
        toast('🔄 已从预设刷新狐析模块内容', 'success');
      };
    }

    const enableAllBtn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-enable-all');
    if (enableAllBtn) {
      enableAllBtn.onclick = async () => {
        enableAllBtn.disabled = true;
        enableAllBtn.textContent = '⏳ 启用中...';

        try {
          const ok = await toggleAllPreferences(true);
          hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();

          if (ok) toast('✅ 已启用全部狐析偏好', 'success');
        } finally {
          enableAllBtn.disabled = false;
          enableAllBtn.textContent = '📋 启用全部偏好';
        }
      };
    }

    const disableAllBtn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-disable-all');
    if (disableAllBtn) {
      disableAllBtn.onclick = async () => {
        disableAllBtn.disabled = true;
        disableAllBtn.textContent = '⏳ 关闭中...';

        try {
          const ok = await toggleAllPreferences(false);
          hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();

          if (ok) toast('📴 已关闭全部狐析偏好', 'info');
        } finally {
          disableAllBtn.disabled = false;
          disableAllBtn.textContent = '📴 关闭全部偏好';
        }
      };
    }

    const clearAllBtn = topDoc.getElementById('hushen-module-clear-all');
    if (clearAllBtn) {
      clearAllBtn.onclick = async () => {
        const ok = topWindow?.confirm
          ? topWindow.confirm('⚠️ 确定要清空所有狐析偏好注入吗？')
          : confirm('⚠️ 确定要清空所有狐析偏好注入吗？');

        if (!ok) return;

        clearAllBtn.disabled = true;
        clearAllBtn.textContent = '⏳ 清空中...';

        try {
          await clearAllPreferences();

          if (!state.hushenSettings) state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();
          state.hushenSettings.drafts = {};
          state.hushenSettings.analyzed = {};
          saveHushenSettings();

          manager.querySelectorAll('.hushen-module-input').forEach(ta => ta.value = '');
          manager.querySelectorAll('.hushen-module-result').forEach(ta => ta.value = '');

          hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();
          toast('🗑️ 已清空全部狐析偏好', 'success');
        } finally {
          clearAllBtn.disabled = false;
          clearAllBtn.textContent = '🗑️ 清空全部偏好';
        }
      };
    }

    hushenUpdateModuleManagerStates();
  }

  function hushenOpenManagerPanel() {
    const ex = topDoc.getElementById('ss-hushen-mgr-panel');
    if (ex) { ex.previousElementSibling?.remove(); ex.remove(); return; }

    const saved = state.hushenLastSummary || localStorage.getItem('SPreset_HushenLastSummary') || '';
    if (!saved) { toast('⚠️ 暂无已注入的偏好总结', 'warning'); return; }

    const overlay = topDoc.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'ss-hushen-mgr-overlay';
    overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);z-index:1000002;';
    overlay.onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); topDoc.getElementById('ss-hushen-mgr-panel')?.remove(); };

    const panel = topDoc.createElement('div');
    panel.id = 'ss-hushen-mgr-panel';
    panel.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:650px;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;background:rgba(22,18,20,0.98);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;z-index:1000003;color:#e8ddd4;font-size:13px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);';

    // 解析各模块段落，生成可折叠列表
    const sections = saved.split(/【([^】]+)】/);
    const moduleCards = [];
    for (let i = 1; i < sections.length; i += 2) {
      const label = sections[i]?.trim();
      const content = sections[i + 1]?.trim();
      if (label && content) moduleCards.push({ label, content });
    }

    let cardsHtml = '';
    for (const card of moduleCards) {
      cardsHtml += `
        <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px;color:#f0a070;">${escapeHtml(card.label)}</div>
          <textarea class="hushen-mgr-card-text" data-label="${escapeHtml(card.label)}" style="width:100%;min-height:60px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:8px;font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;resize:vertical;box-sizing:border-box;">${escapeHtml(card.content)}</textarea>
        </div>`;
    }

    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
        <span style="font-weight:600;font-size:15px;">📋 狐析偏好管理</span>
        <span style="cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;color:#706058;" id="hushen-mgr-close">✕</span>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;margin-bottom:12px;">编辑各模块内容后，点击"重新注入"即可更新到预设各条目。</div>
      ${cardsHtml || '<div style="color:#706058;">无模块内容</div>'}
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;">
        <button id="hushen-mgr-reinject" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">💾 重新注入到预设</button>
        <button id="hushen-mgr-clear" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.15);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">🗑️ 清除所有注入</button>
        </div>
    `;

    topDoc.body.appendChild(overlay);
    topDoc.body.appendChild(panel);

    topDoc.getElementById('hushen-mgr-close').onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); panel.remove(); };

    topDoc.getElementById('hushen-mgr-reinject').onclick = async () => {
      // 从各 textarea 重建完整总结
      const textareas = panel.querySelectorAll('.hushen-mgr-card-text');
      const newSections = [];
      for (const ta of textareas) {
        const lbl = ta.dataset.label;
        const val = ta.value.trim();
        if (lbl && val) newSections.push(`【${lbl}】\n${val}`);
      }
      if (!newSections.length) { toast('⚠️ 内容为空', 'warning'); return; }

      const newText = newSections.join('\n\n');
      state.hushenLastSummary = newText;
      localStorage.setItem('SPreset_HushenLastSummary', newText);

      // 复用注入逻辑
      const oldSummary = hushenSummaryText;
      hushenSummaryText = newText;
      await hushenInjectSummary();
      hushenSummaryText = oldSummary;
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('hushen-mgr-clear').onclick = async () => {
      const ok = topWindow?.confirm ? topWindow.confirm('确定要清除所有用户偏好注入吗？') : confirm('确定要清除所有用户偏好注入吗？');
      if (!ok) return;
      await clearAllPreferences();
      state.hushenLastSummary = '';
      localStorage.removeItem('SPreset_HushenLastSummary');
      overlay.remove();
      panel.remove();
      toast('⚠️ 已清除所有注入', 'success');
    };
  }

  // ============= 🆕 批次 3B：🦊 狐忆 面板 =============

  const FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES = [
    { id: 'character', label: '👤 人物', icon: '👤' },
    { id: 'plot', label: '📖 情节', icon: '📖' },
    { id: 'item', label: '⚔️ 物品', icon: '⚔️' },
    { id: 'scene', label: '🌍 场景', icon: '🌍' },
    { id: 'concept', label: '💡 概念', icon: '💡' },
  ];
  // ==================== 狐忆剧情摘要分块工具 ====================
  const FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE = 10;
  const FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_PREFIX = 'plot_chunk_';

  function foxMemoryClip(text, max = 1200) {
    const raw = String(text || '').trim();
    if (raw.length <= max) return raw;
    return raw.slice(0, max).trim() + '\n……（已截断）';
  }

  function foxMemoryDisplayFloorFromMessageId(messageId) {
    const n = Number(messageId);

    // 酒馆 message_id 本身就是第几楼，禁止 +1。
    // 例如最后一楼 message_id=31，就按第31楼处理。
    return Number.isFinite(n) ? Math.max(0, n) : 0;
  }

  function foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(startFloor, endFloor = null) {
    const start = Math.max(0, Number(startFloor) || 0);
    const end = Math.max(
      start,
      Number.isFinite(Number(endFloor))
        ? Number(endFloor)
        : start + FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE - 1
    );

    return {
      start,
      end,
      id: `${FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_PREFIX}${start}_${end}`,
      title: `剧情摘要｜第${start}-${end}楼`,
      eventTime: `第${start}-${end}楼`,
    };
  }

  function foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByMessageId(messageId) {
    const floor = foxMemoryDisplayFloorFromMessageId(messageId);
    const start = Math.floor(floor / FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE) * FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE;
    const end = start + FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE - 1;

    return foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(start, end);
  }

  function foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangesUpToMessageId(messageId) {
    const lastFloor = foxMemoryDisplayFloorFromMessageId(messageId);
    const ranges = [];

    if (!Number.isFinite(lastFloor) || lastFloor < 0) return ranges;

    // 关键：一直从 0 开始补齐。
    // 例如 lastFloor=31，则目标为：
    // 0-9、10-19、20-29、30-39
    // 其中 30-39 即使没满，也允许提前写，并在后续继续更新。
    for (let start = 0; start <= lastFloor; start += FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE) {
      const end = start + FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE - 1;
      ranges.push(foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(start, end));
    }

    return ranges;
  }

  function foxMemoryFindChunkRangeByStartEnd(start, end) {
    const s = Number(start);
    const e = Number(end);

    if (!Number.isFinite(s) || !Number.isFinite(e)) return null;

    return foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(s, e);
  }

  function foxMemoryExtractPlotChunkBlocks(sectionText) {
    const raw = String(sectionText || '').trim();
    if (!raw) return [];

    const blocks = [];
    const re = /【板块】[\s\S]*?(?=\n---+|\n【板块】|$)/g;

    let m;
    while ((m = re.exec(raw)) !== null) {
      const block = String(m[0] || '').trim();
      if (block && /【内容】/.test(block)) blocks.push(block);
    }

    if (!blocks.length && /【内容】/.test(raw)) {
      blocks.push(raw);
    }

    return blocks;
  }

  function foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByMessageId(messageId) {
    const floor = foxMemoryDisplayFloorFromMessageId(messageId);
    const start = Math.floor(floor / FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE) * FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE;
    const end = start + FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE - 1;

    return foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(start, end);
  }

  function foxMemoryGetCompletedPlotChunkRanges(lastMessageId) {
    const lastFloor = foxMemoryDisplayFloorFromMessageId(lastMessageId);
    if (!Number.isFinite(lastFloor) || lastFloor < 0) return [];

    const ranges = [];

    for (let start = 0; start <= lastFloor; start += FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE) {
      const end = start + FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE - 1;

      // 只自动总结完整 10 楼块，避免 31-40 这种只有一两楼的摘要抢跑。
      if (end <= lastFloor) {
        ranges.push(foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(start, end));
      }
    }

    // 如果总楼层不足 10 楼，允许生成一个 0-lastFloor 的临时摘要。
    if (!ranges.length && lastFloor >= 0) {
      ranges.push(foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(0, Math.min(lastFloor, FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE - 1)));
    }

    return ranges;
  }

  function foxMemoryFindChunkRangeByStartEnd(start, end) {
    const s = Number(start);
    const e = Number(end);

    if (!Number.isFinite(s) || !Number.isFinite(e)) return null;

    return foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByFloor(s, e);
  }

  function foxMemoryExtractPlotChunkBlocks(sectionText) {
    const raw = String(sectionText || '').trim();
    if (!raw) return [];

    const blocks = [];
    const re = /【板块】[\s\S]*?(?=\n---+|\n【板块】|$)/g;

    let m;
    while ((m = re.exec(raw)) !== null) {
      const block = String(m[0] || '').trim();
      if (block && /【内容】/.test(block)) blocks.push(block);
    }

    if (!blocks.length && /【内容】/.test(raw)) {
      blocks.push(raw);
    }

    return blocks;
  }

  function foxMemoryParseChunkRange(mem) {
    if (!mem) return null;

    const fs = Number(mem.floorStart);
    const fe = Number(mem.floorEnd);

    if (Number.isFinite(fs) && Number.isFinite(fe) && fs >= 0 && fe >= fs) {
      return { start: fs, end: fe };
    }

    const raw = `${mem.id || ''} ${mem.title || ''} ${mem.eventTime || ''}`;

    const m =
      raw.match(/plot_chunk_(\d+)_(\d+)/i) ||
      raw.match(/第\s*(\d+)\s*[-_—~～至到]\s*(\d+)\s*楼/);

    if (!m) return null;

    const start = Number(m[1]);
    const end = Number(m[2]);

    if (!Number.isFinite(start) || !Number.isFinite(end)) return null;

    return { start, end };
  }

  function foxMemoryIsPlotChunk(mem) {
    if (!mem || mem.category !== 'plot') return false;

    if (String(mem.id || '').startsWith(FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_PREFIX)) return true;

    return !!foxMemoryParseChunkRange(mem);
  }

  function foxMemorySortPlotChunks(chunks) {
    return [...(chunks || [])].sort((a, b) => {
      const ar = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(a) || { start: 0 };
      const br = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(b) || { start: 0 };
      return ar.start - br.start;
    });
  }

  function foxMemoryGetRecentTextForPlotRelevance(maxFloors = 8) {
    try {
      const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');

      if (!glmi || !gcm) return '';

      const lastId = glmi();
      if (lastId < 0) return '';

      const startId = Math.max(0, lastId - maxFloors + 1);
      const ms = gcm(`${startId}-${lastId}`, {
        hide_state: 'all',
        include_swipes: false,
      }) || [];

      return ms
        .map(m => {
          let msg = String(m?.message || '');
          try {
            msg = ssCleanXuanhuInjectedBlocksFromMessage(msg);
          } catch { }
          return `${m?.name || m?.role || ''}\n${msg}`;
        })
        .join('\n\n')
        .toLowerCase();
    } catch {
      return '';
    }
  }

  function foxMemoryScorePlotChunk(chunk, refText, currentFloor) {
    const range = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(chunk);
    if (!range) return 0;

    let score = 0;

    if (currentFloor >= range.start && currentFloor <= range.end) {
      score += 1000;
    }

    // 越接近当前楼层，分数越高。
    if (range.end <= currentFloor) {
      score += Math.max(0, 100 - Math.floor((currentFloor - range.end) / FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE) * 10);
    }

    const ref = String(refText || '').toLowerCase();

    for (const kw of chunk.keywords || []) {
      const k = String(kw || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (k && ref.includes(k)) score += 30;
    }

    const title = String(chunk.title || '').toLowerCase();
    if (title && ref.includes(title)) score += 20;

    return score;
  }

  function foxMemorySelectPlotChunksForInjection(memories, options = {}) {
    const maxChunks = Math.max(0, Number(options.maxPlotChunks ?? 3));
    if (maxChunks <= 0) return [];

    const chunks = foxMemorySortPlotChunks(
      (memories || []).filter(foxMemoryIsPlotChunk)
    );

    if (!chunks.length) return [];

    const currentMessageId = getCurrentLastMessageId();
    const currentFloor = foxMemoryDisplayFloorFromMessageId(currentMessageId);
    const refText = foxMemoryGetRecentTextForPlotRelevance(8);

    const selected = [];
    const selectedIds = new Set();

    const push = (m) => {
      if (!m || selectedIds.has(m.id)) return;
      selected.push(m);
      selectedIds.add(m.id);
    };

    // 1. 当前楼层所在板块必须优先。
    const currentChunk = chunks.find(c => {
      const r = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(c);
      return r && currentFloor >= r.start && currentFloor <= r.end;
    });
    push(currentChunk);

    // 2. 最近的板块必须保留，方便承接。
    push(chunks[chunks.length - 1]);

    // 3. 根据关键词相关性补充少量旧板块。
    const scored = chunks
      .map(c => ({
        chunk: c,
        score: foxMemoryScorePlotChunk(c, refText, currentFloor),
      }))
      .filter(x => x.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);

    for (const item of scored) {
      if (selected.length >= maxChunks) break;
      push(item.chunk);
    }

    return foxMemorySortPlotChunks(selected).slice(0, maxChunks);
  }

  function foxMemoryFormatOneMemoryForInject(m) {
    const cat = FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES.find(c => c.id === m.category) || { label: m.category };
    const timeStr = m.eventTime ? `（${m.eventTime}）` : '';
    const kw = m.keywords?.length ? `\n关键词：${m.keywords.join('、')}` : '';
    return `【${cat.label}】${m.title}${timeStr}\n${m.content}${kw}`;
  }

  function foxMemoryBuildMemoryBodyForInject(memories, options = {}) {
    const arr = Array.isArray(memories) ? memories : [];

    const plotChunks = foxMemorySortPlotChunks(arr.filter(foxMemoryIsPlotChunk));
    const selectedPlotChunks = foxMemorySelectPlotChunksForInjection(arr, {
      maxPlotChunks: options.maxPlotChunks ?? 3,
    });

    const parts = [];

    if (plotChunks.length) {
      const indexLines = plotChunks.map(c => {
        const r = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(c);
        const rangeText = r ? `第${r.start}-${r.end}楼` : (c.eventTime || '');
        return `- ${rangeText}：${c.title}`;
      }).join('\n');

      const expandedLines = selectedPlotChunks.length
        ? selectedPlotChunks.map(c => c.title).join('、')
        : '无';

      parts.push(`【📖 情节摘要索引】
剧情摘要已按每 ${FOX_MEMORY_PLOT_CHUNK_SIZE} 楼一个板块保存，并严格按时间顺序排列。
不要一次性要求读取全部剧情摘要；只有当前剧情相关时，才参考被展开的板块。

可用剧情摘要板块：
${indexLines}

本次已展开的相关板块：
${expandedLines}`);
    }

    for (const chunk of selectedPlotChunks) {
      parts.push(foxMemoryFormatOneMemoryForInject(chunk));
    }

    // 非剧情摘要类长期记忆正常注入。
    // 注意：旧版 plot_summary 和所有未分块 plot 不再默认注入，避免再次塞爆上下文。
    const nonPlotMemories = arr.filter(m => m.category !== 'plot');

    for (const mem of nonPlotMemories) {
      parts.push(foxMemoryFormatOneMemoryForInject(mem));
    }

    return parts.filter(x => String(x || '').trim()).join('\n\n').trim();
  }
  function foxMemoryGetCurrent() {
    const data = loadFoxMemory();
    return data.memories || [];
  }

  function foxMemorySave(memories) {
    const data = loadFoxMemory();

    data.memories = Array.isArray(memories) ? memories : [];
    data.lastAnalysis = data.lastAnalysis || new Date().toISOString();

    const ok = saveFoxMemory(data);

    // ✅ 狐忆实时同步：
    // 只要用户打开了「注入到预设」，任何新增、编辑、删除、清空、导入都会同步到预留条目5。
    if (ok && foxMemoryConfig?.injectToPreset) {
      try {
        foxMemorySyncToPreset();
      } catch (e) {
        log('[狐忆] 实时同步预设失败:', e);
      }
    }

    return ok;
  }

  // ==================== 狐忆楼层删除/编辑后的自动修复 ====================
  let foxMemoryRepairHandles = [];

  function foxMemoryExtractFloorRefsFromText(text) {
    const raw = String(text || '');
    const refs = [];

    const re = /第\s*(\d+)(?:\s*[-_—~～至到]\s*(\d+))?\s*楼/g;
    let m;

    while ((m = re.exec(raw)) !== null) {
      const start = Number(m[1]);
      const end = Number(m[2] || m[1]);

      if (Number.isFinite(start) && Number.isFinite(end)) {
        refs.push([Math.min(start, end), Math.max(start, end)]);
      }
    }

    return refs;
  }

  function foxMemoryRepairAfterChatChanged(reason = '聊天记录变化', changedFromFloor = null, opts = {}) {
    try {
      const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      if (!glmi) return;

      const lastId = glmi();
      const affected = Number(changedFromFloor);
      const hasAffected = Number.isFinite(affected) && affected >= 0;

      const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
      let removed = 0;

      const next = memories.filter(mem => {
        const range = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(mem);

        // 剧情摘要分块：
        // 如果删除/编辑了某一楼，则从受影响楼层所在分块开始，后面的分块全部删掉，等待重新分析补齐。
        if (range) {
          if (range.start > lastId) {
            removed++;
            return false;
          }

          if (hasAffected && range.end >= affected) {
            removed++;
            return false;
          }

          return true;
        }

        // 其他记忆：如果明确绑定了被删除后的楼层，也删除，避免记忆引用不存在楼层。
        const refs = foxMemoryExtractFloorRefsFromText(
          `${mem.title || ''}\n${mem.eventTime || ''}\n${mem.content || ''}\n${(mem.keywords || []).join('、')}`
        );

        if (refs.some(([s, e]) => s > lastId || e > lastId)) {
          removed++;
          return false;
        }

        if (hasAffected && refs.some(([s, e]) => e >= affected)) {
          removed++;
          return false;
        }

        return true;
      });

      if (removed > 0) {
        foxMemorySave(next);

        try { foxMemoryRenderList(); } catch { }
        try { foxMemoryRenderStats(); } catch { }

        toast(`🧹 狐忆已自动修复：因${reason}清理 ${removed} 条可能失效的楼层记忆`, 'success');

        if (opts.reanalyze && foxMemoryConfig?.autoMode !== 'manual') {
          setTimeout(() => {
            foxMemoryAnalyzeNow().catch(e => log('[狐忆楼层修复] 自动重分析失败', e));
          }, 1200);
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐忆楼层修复] 失败', e);
    }
  }

  function registerFoxMemoryRepairListener() {
    unregisterFoxMemoryRepairListener();

    const eo = getFn('eventOn');
    const te = getFn('tavern_events') || tavern_events;

    if (typeof eo !== 'function' || !te) return;

    const add = h => {
      if (h) foxMemoryRepairHandles.push(h);
    };

    if (te.MESSAGE_DELETED) {
      add(eo(te.MESSAGE_DELETED, messageId => {
        setTimeout(() => {
          foxMemoryRepairAfterChatChanged('删除楼层', messageId, { reanalyze: true });
        }, 500);
      }));
    }

    if (te.MESSAGE_EDITED) {
      add(eo(te.MESSAGE_EDITED, messageId => {
        setTimeout(() => {
          foxMemoryRepairAfterChatChanged('编辑楼层', messageId, { reanalyze: true });
        }, 500);
      }));
    }
  }

  function unregisterFoxMemoryRepairListener() {
    for (const h of foxMemoryRepairHandles) {
      try { h?.stop?.(); } catch { }
    }

    foxMemoryRepairHandles = [];
  }

  function foxMemoryRenderList() {
    const container = topDoc.getElementById('foxmemory-list');
    if (!container) return;

    const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
    const category = foxMemoryEditing.selectedCategory;
    const keyword = (foxMemoryEditing.searchKeyword || '').trim().toLowerCase();

    let filtered = memories;
    if (category && category !== 'all') {
      filtered = filtered.filter(m => m.category === category);
    }
    if (keyword) {
      filtered = filtered.filter(m =>
        (m.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
        (m.content || '').toLowerCase().includes(keyword) ||
        (m.keywords || []).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(keyword))
      );
    }

    if (!filtered.length) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;color:#706058;padding:20px;font-size:12px;">暂无记忆条目</div>';
      return;
    }

    container.innerHTML = '';
    for (const mem of filtered) {
      const cat = FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES.find(c => c.id === mem.category) || { icon: '📝', label: mem.category };
      const el = topDoc.createElement('div');
      el.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;';
      el.innerHTML = `
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:6px;">
          <div>
            <span style="font-size:14px;margin-right:6px;">${cat.icon}</span>
            <span style="font-weight:600;color:#e8ddd4;font-size:13px;">${escapeHtml(mem.title || '（无标题）')}</span>
            <span style="color:#706058;font-size:10px;margin-left:6px;">${escapeHtml(cat.label)}</span>
            ${mem.eventTime ? `<span style="color:#90756a;font-size:10px;margin-left:4px;">🕐 ${escapeHtml(mem.eventTime)}</span>` : ''}
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;">
            <button class="foxmem-edit-btn" data-id="${escapeHtml(mem.id)}" style="padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;">✏️</button>
            <button class="foxmem-del-btn" data-id="${escapeHtml(mem.id)}" style="padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:5px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.15);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;">🗑</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:#a09088;line-height:1.55;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;">${escapeHtml(mem.content || '')}</div>
        ${(mem.keywords && mem.keywords.length) ? `<div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:10px;color:#706058;">🏷️ ${mem.keywords.map(k => escapeHtml(k)).join('、')}</div>` : ''}
      `;
      container.appendChild(el);
    }

    container.querySelectorAll('.foxmem-edit-btn').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = async () => {
        const id = btn.dataset.id;
        const mem = memories.find(m => m.id === id);
        if (mem) foxMemoryOpenEditDialog(mem);
      };
    });
    container.querySelectorAll('.foxmem-del-btn').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = async () => {
        const id = btn.dataset.id;
        const ok = topWindow?.confirm ? topWindow.confirm('确定要删除这条记忆吗？') : confirm('确定要删除这条记忆吗？');
        if (!ok) return;
        const newMems = memories.filter(m => m.id !== id);
        foxMemorySave(newMems);
        foxMemoryRenderList();
        foxMemoryRenderStats();
        toast('🗑️ 已删除', 'success');
      };
    });
  }

  function foxMemoryRenderStats() {
    const el = topDoc.getElementById('foxmemory-stats');
    if (!el) return;
    const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
    const data = loadFoxMemory();
    const counts = {};
    for (const m of memories) counts[m.category] = (counts[m.category] || 0) + 1;

    const catText = FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES.map(c => `${c.icon}${counts[c.id] || 0}`).join(' ');
    const lastTime = data.lastAnalysis ? new Date(data.lastAnalysis).toLocaleString('zh-CN') : '从未分析';
    el.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:11px;color:#a09088;">
        <span>📊 总数：<b style="color:#f0a070;">${memories.length}</b></span>
        <span>${catText}</span>
        <span>🕐 最后分析：${lastTime}</span>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function foxMemoryOpenEditDialog(existing) {
    const isEdit = !!existing;
    const mem = existing || {
      id: 'mem_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8),
      category: 'character',
      title: '',
      content: '',
      keywords: [],
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    const dialog = topDoc.createElement('div');
    dialog.id = 'foxmemory-edit-dialog';
    dialog.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:500px;max-height:70vh;background:rgba(18,14,16,0.99);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.4);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;z-index:1000005;color:#e8ddd4;font-size:13px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;';

    let catOptions = '';
    for (const c of FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES) {
      catOptions += `<option value="${c.id}" ${mem.category === c.id ? 'selected' : ''}>${c.icon} ${c.label}</option>`;
    }

    dialog.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
        <span style="font-weight:600;font-size:14px;">${isEdit ? '✏️ 编辑记忆' : '➕ 新增记忆'}</span>
        <span style="cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;color:#706058;" id="foxmem-dialog-close">✕</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
        <select id="foxmem-cat" style="flex:0 0 130px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 8px;font-size:12px;">${catOptions}</select>
        <input id="foxmem-title" type="text" placeholder="标题（如：狐神抚的来历）" value="${escapeHtml(mem.title)}" style="flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;box-sizing:border-box;">
      </div>
      <textarea id="foxmem-content" placeholder="详细内容..." style="flex:1;min-height:180px;max-height:300px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:10px;font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;box-sizing:border-box;">${escapeHtml(mem.content)}</textarea>
      <div>
        <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">🕐 发生时间（如：第3楼、第二天下午、X月X日）</label>
        <input id="foxmem-event-time" type="text" placeholder="例：第5楼 / 第二天傍晚 / 3月15日" value="${escapeHtml(mem.eventTime || '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;">
      </div>
      <input id="foxmem-keywords" type="text" placeholder="关键词（用逗号或顿号分隔）" value="${escapeHtml((mem.keywords || []).join('、'))}" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;">
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
        <button id="foxmem-save-btn" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;">💾 保存</button>
        <button id="foxmem-cancel-btn" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-family:inherit;">取消</button>
      </div>
    `;
    topDoc.body.appendChild(dialog);

    const close = () => dialog.remove();
    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-dialog-close').onclick = close;
    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-cancel-btn').onclick = close;
    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-save-btn').onclick = () => {
      const title = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-title')?.value?.trim();
      const content = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-content')?.value?.trim();
      const eventTime = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-event-time')?.value?.trim() || '';
      const cat = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-cat')?.value;
      const kwStr = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-keywords')?.value?.trim();
      const keywords = kwStr ? kwStr.split(/[,，、;;\s]+/).filter(Boolean) : [];
      if (!title) { toast('⚠️ 请填写标题', 'warning'); return; }
      if (!content) { toast('⚠️ 请填写内容', 'warning'); return; }

      const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
      const idx = memories.findIndex(m => m.id === mem.id);
      const updated = { ...mem, category: cat, title, content, keywords, eventTime, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() };
      if (idx >= 0) memories[idx] = updated;
      else memories.unshift(updated);
      foxMemorySave(memories);
      close();
      foxMemoryRenderList();
      foxMemoryRenderStats();
      toast(isEdit ? '✅ 已更新' : '✅ 已添加', 'success');
    };
  }

  async function foxMemorySyncToPreset(force = false) {
    const targetId = 'a765deed-a057-436a-9239-a7863f87460a';

    // force=true 用于手动注入按钮，即使配置刚刚改动也可以立即同步
    if (!force && !foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) return;

    const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();

    if (!memories.length) {
      await setPromptContentById(targetId, '');
      await togglePromptById(targetId, !!foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset);
      log('[狐忆] 记忆为空，已清空预设注入');
      return;
    }

    const memoryBody = foxMemoryBuildMemoryBodyForInject(memories, {
      maxPlotChunks: 1,
    });

    if (!memoryBody.trim()) {
      await setPromptContentById(targetId, '');
      await togglePromptById(targetId, !!foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset);
      log('[狐忆] 筛选后无可注入记忆，已清空预设注入');
      return;
    }

    const text = ssBuildFoxMemoryInject(memoryBody);
    await setPromptContentById(targetId, text);

    // ✅ 打开注入时自动启用条目；关闭注入时不会调用这里。
    if (foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) {
      await togglePromptById(targetId, true);
    }

    log('[狐忆] 已同步到预设 ');
  }

  async function foxMemoryDisablePresetInject() {
    const targetId = 'a765deed-a057-436a-9239-a7863f87460a';
    await togglePromptById(targetId, false);
    log('[狐忆] 已关闭预设注入');
  }

  function ssBuildFoxJudgeStaticContextPrompt() {
    const parts = [];

    parts.push(FOX_JUDGE_PROMPT);

    try {
      const activeRules = getActiveRulesSummary?.() || '';
      if (activeRules && activeRules.trim()) {
        parts.push(`【当前生效的预设规则摘要】

${activeRules}

【上面这些是当前预设中已启用的条目与核心内容。】`);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 读取当前生效预设规则失败', e);
    }

    try {
      const ctx = SillyTavern?.getContext?.();
      const char = ctx?.characters?.[ctx?.characterId];

      if (char) {
        const name = String(char.name || '').trim();
        if (name) parts.push(`【当前角色卡】\n角色卡名：${name}`);
      }
    } catch { }

    return parts.join('\n\n');
  }

  function ssBuildFoxJudgeDynamicContextPrompt({ userInput, lastAssistantText }) {
    const lines = [];

    lines.push(`【本次玩家输入】\n${userInput || '（无）'}`);

    if (lastAssistantText) {
      lines.push(`【最新 AI 回复｜参考】\n${lastAssistantText}`);
    }

    lines.push('【五狐必须严格按系统提示词规则，对本次玩家输入做独立审核 + 吵架 + 狐妈裁定。】');

    return lines.join('\n\n');
  }

  function ssCallFoxJudgeApi({ system, user, customApi }) {
    const gr = getFn('generateRaw');
    if (typeof gr !== 'function') throw new Error('无 generateRaw');

    const ordered = [
      { role: 'system', content: system },
    ];
    if (user) ordered.push({ role: 'user', content: user });

    return gr({
      user_input: '',
      should_silence: true,
      should_stream: false,
      max_chat_history: 0,
      ordered_prompts: ordered,
      ...(customApi ? { custom_api: customApi } : {}),
    });
  }

  function ssBuildFoxJudgeCustomApi() {
    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    if (cfg.apiType !== 'custom') return null;
    if (!cfg.customApi?.apiurl && !cfg.customApi?.proxyPreset) return null;

    const ca = cfg.customApi || {};
    const customApi = {
      source: ca.source || 'openai',
    };
    if (ca.proxyPreset) customApi.proxy_preset = ca.proxyPreset;
    else {
      if (ca.apiurl) customApi.apiurl = ca.apiurl;
      if (ca.key) customApi.key = ca.key;
    }
    if (ca.model) customApi.model = ca.model;
    if (ca.temperature !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.temperature))) customApi.temperature = parseFloat(ca.temperature);
    if (ca.top_p !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.top_p))) customApi.top_p = parseFloat(ca.top_p);
    if (ca.frequency_penalty !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.frequency_penalty))) customApi.frequency_penalty = parseFloat(ca.frequency_penalty);
    if (ca.presence_penalty !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.presence_penalty))) customApi.presence_penalty = parseFloat(ca.presence_penalty);
    if (ca.max_tokens !== '' && !isNaN(parseInt(ca.max_tokens))) customApi.max_tokens = parseInt(ca.max_tokens);
    return customApi;
  }

  function ssParseFoxJudgeResult(text) {
    const raw = String(text || '');

    let think = '';
    const thinkMatch = raw.match(/<think>([\s\S]*?)<\/think>/i);
    if (thinkMatch) think = thinkMatch[1].trim();

    const afterThink = thinkMatch ? raw.replace(thinkMatch[0], '') : raw;

    let level = '合理';
    const levelMatch = afterThink.match(/裁定等级[：:]\s*(合理|轻微不合理|严重不合规)/);
    if (levelMatch) level = levelMatch[1].trim();
    else {
      if (/严重不合规/.test(afterThink)) level = '严重不合规';
      else if (/轻微不合理/.test(afterThink)) level = '轻微不合理';
      else if (/合理/.test(afterThink)) level = '合理';
    }

    const reasonMatch = afterThink.match(/裁定原因[：:]([\s\S]*?)(?=\n【|主模型执行规则|$)/);
    const reason = reasonMatch ? reasonMatch[1].trim() : '';

    const ruleMatch = afterThink.match(/主模型执行规则[：:]([\s\S]*?)$/);
    const execution = ruleMatch ? ruleMatch[1].trim() : '';

    return { think, level, reason, execution, raw };
  }

  function ssFormatFoxJudgeResultForDisplay(result) {
    if (!result) return '';

    const lines = [];

    if (result.think) {
      lines.push('【五狐思考】');
      lines.push(result.think);
      lines.push('');
    }

    const levelColor = result.level === '严重不合规' ? '#d08080'
      : result.level === '轻微不合理' ? '#f0a070'
        : '#9bd36a';

    lines.push(`【裁定等级】 ${result.level}`);

    if (result.reason) {
      lines.push('');
      lines.push(`【裁定原因】`);
      lines.push(result.reason);
    }

    if (result.execution) {
      lines.push('');
      lines.push(`【主模型执行规则】`);
      lines.push(result.execution);
    }

    return lines.join('\n');
  }

  async function ssRunFoxJudgeOnce(opts = {}) {
    const { userInput, lastAssistantText, label = 'manual' } = opts;

    if (ssIsTaskRunning('fox_judge_chain')) {
      ssCancelTask('fox_judge_chain', '狐裁');
      return null;
    }

    const charId = getCurrentCharId();
    const antiSycophantOpen = isPromptEnabledInPreset(CONFIG.ANTI_SYCOPHANT_ID);

    let staticCache = null;

    const staticPrompt = ssBuildFoxJudgeStaticContextPrompt();

    const dynamicPrompt = ssBuildFoxJudgeDynamicContextPrompt({
      userInput,
      lastAssistantText,
    });

    const customApi = ssBuildFoxJudgeCustomApi();
    const finalSystem = `${staticPrompt}\n\n${dynamicPrompt}`;

    ssStartTask('fox_judge_chain', '狐裁');

    let judgeToast = null;
    try {
      judgeToast = ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', '🦊 五狐裁决中：点击可中断');
    } catch { }

    try {
      const r = await ssCallFoxJudgeApi({
        system: finalSystem,
        user: null,
        customApi,
      });
      const text = String(typeof r === 'string' ? r : (r?.content || '')).trim();
      if (!text) throw new Error('裁决结果为空');

      const parsed = ssParseFoxJudgeResult(text);
      parsed.user_input = userInput || '';
      parsed.label = label;
      parsed.created_at = new Date().toISOString();

      try {
        localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.FOX_JUDGE_LAST_RESULT_KEY, JSON.stringify(parsed));
      } catch { }

      return parsed;
    } catch (e) {
      const msg = e?.message || String(e || '');
      if (/abort|aborted|cancel|中断|取消/i.test(msg)) {
        toast('⛔ 狐裁已中断', 'warning');
      } else {
        log('[狐裁] 裁决失败', e);
        toast(`❌ 狐裁失败：${msg}`, 'error');
      }
      return null;
    } finally {
      try { if (judgeToast?.remove) judgeToast.remove(); } catch { }
      ssEndTask('fox_judge_chain');
    }
  }
  async function ssRunFoxJudgeManual() {
    const ta = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-manual-input');
    const inputText = ta?.value?.trim() || '';

    if (!inputText) {
      toast('⚠️ 请先在裁决输入框填入内容', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    let lastAssistantText = '';
    try {
      const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
      if (glmi && gcm) {
        const lastId = glmi();
        if (lastId >= 0) {
          const m = gcm(lastId)?.[0];
          if (m && m.role === 'assistant') {
            lastAssistantText = String(m.message || '');
            try {
              lastAssistantText = ssCleanXuanhuInjectedBlocksFromMessage(lastAssistantText);
            } catch { }
          }
        }
      }
    } catch { }

    const result = await ssRunFoxJudgeOnce({
      userInput: inputText,
      lastAssistantText,
      label: 'manual',
    });

    if (result) {
      const displayTa = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-manual-result');
      if (displayTa) displayTa.value = ssFormatFoxJudgeResultForDisplay(result);
      toast(`✅ 五狐裁决完成：${result.level}`, result.level === '严重不合规' ? 'error' : (result.level === '轻微不合理' ? 'warning' : 'success'));
    }
  }

- 表面无事则什么在变：情绪刻度/信任刻度/墙的裂缝。
- 推进还是踏步？蓄力需微推力？

四、潜文本
- 每句话说出 vs 真正在说。
- 沉默比对话更响处。哪句后空气变了。
- 表里落差拉大/缩小？面具有无裂缝？

五、叙事技法
- 非视觉感官锚点（声/嗅/触/温），先于视觉进入。
- 慢镜头哪个微动作？它在说什么。
- 空间哪处陈设/痕迹成沉默第三角色。
- 时间流速：凝固/流淌/湍急→句长与节奏。
- 情绪容器：物件或身体反应，装入情绪不直说。
- 落点重量：读者心沉/提/悬？
- 直觉终审：角色活？情绪在身体？沉默有重量？去形容词还动人？

**六、本轮动态决策**（参考第一阶段固定规则确认结果，只做本轮动态判断）

- NPC 将如何回应：[ ]
- 是否替用户行动(抢话)：[是/否] → 如是，抢话内容：[ ]

  const FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS = {
    enabled: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Enabled',
    phase1Prompt: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Phase1Prompt',
    phase2Prompt: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Phase2Prompt',
    phase2Choice: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Phase2Choice',
    phase2Custom: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Phase2Custom',
    strength: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Strength',
    charCachePrefix: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_StaticCache_',
    cacheEnabled: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_CacheEnabled',
    swipeRethink: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_SwipeRethink',
    rerollRethink: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_RerollRethink',
    apiType: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_ApiType',
    customApi: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_CustomApi',
    filterSettings: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_FilterSettings',
    customThinkingReq: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_CustomThinkingReq',
    maxRetries: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_MaxRetries',
    phase1Only: 'SPreset_FoxJudge_Phase1Only',
  };

  function foxJudgeReadConfig() {
    let phase2Prompt = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase2Prompt);
    if (!phase2Prompt) {
      const choice = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase2Choice) || 'multi_os';
      if (choice === 'director') phase2Prompt = FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_DIRECTOR;
      else if (choice === 'custom') phase2Prompt = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase2Custom) || FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS;
      else phase2Prompt = FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS;
    }
    let customApi = { apiurl: '', key: '', model: '', source: 'openai', proxyPreset: '', temperature: '', max_tokens: '', top_p: '', frequency_penalty: '', presence_penalty: '' };
    try { const raw = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.customApi); if (raw) customApi = { ...customApi, ...JSON.parse(raw) }; } catch { }
    // 一次性迁移：旧版"借用酒馆代理预设"已废弃。
    // 如果检测到 proxyPreset 还在但 apiurl 为空，则清掉 proxyPreset 并提示用户重新填写直连 API。
    // 不清掉的话，保存 UI 会静默把 proxyPreset='' + apiurl='' 写回，狐裁会悄悄回退到主模型，用户察觉不到。
    try {
      if (customApi.proxyPreset && !customApi.apiurl) {
        const lostName = customApi.proxyPreset;
        customApi.proxyPreset = '';
        localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.customApi, JSON.stringify(customApi));
        log(`[狐裁] 旧版"借用酒馆代理预设"已废弃，已自动清除（原值：${lostName}）。如需自定义 API，请在面板中填写直连 API 地址 + Key。`);
        try { toast(`🦊 狐裁旧版"代理预设(${lostName})"已废弃，请在面板填写直连 API 地址和 Key`, 'warning'); } catch { }
      } else if (customApi.proxyPreset) {
        // 既有 proxyPreset 又有 apiurl：直接保留 apiurl，清 proxyPreset，保证后续 UI 行为一致。
        customApi.proxyPreset = '';
        localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.customApi, JSON.stringify(customApi));
        log('[狐裁] 旧版 proxyPreset 已自动清除，保留直连 apiurl/key 配置');
      }
    } catch (e) { log('[狐裁] 迁移 proxyPreset 失败', e); }
    let filterSettings = {
      enableContentFilter: true,
      includeTagPairs: [],
      excludeTagPairs: [
        { start: '<think_fox~>', end: '</think_fox~>' },
        { start: '<User_latest_request>', end: '</User_latest_request>' },
      ],
    };
    try { const raw = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.filterSettings); if (raw) filterSettings = { ...filterSettings, ...JSON.parse(raw) }; } catch { }
    (() => {
      try {
        const pairs = filterSettings.excludeTagPairs;
        if (!Array.isArray(pairs)) return;
        let migrated = false;
        const newUserReq = { start: '<User_latest_request>', end: '</User_latest_request>' };
        const hasNewUserReq = pairs.some(p => p.start === newUserReq.start && p.end === newUserReq.end);
        const newThinkFox = { start: '<think_fox~>', end: '</think_fox~>' };
        const hasNewThinkFox = pairs.some(p => p.start === newThinkFox.start && p.end === newThinkFox.end);
        const filtered = pairs.filter(p => {
          if (p.start === '<fox_tip>' || p.end === '</fox_tip>') { migrated = true; return false; }
          if (p.start === '<fox_selc>' || p.end === '</fox_selc>') { migrated = true; return false; }
          if (p.start === '<think_fox~>' && p.end === '</think_fox~>') return true;
          if ((!p.start || p.start === '') && p.end === '</think_fox~>') { migrated = true; return false; }
          return true;
        });
        if (!hasNewThinkFox) { filtered.unshift(newThinkFox); migrated = true; }
        if (!hasNewUserReq) { filtered.push(newUserReq); migrated = true; }
        if (migrated) {
          filterSettings.excludeTagPairs = filtered;
          localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.filterSettings, JSON.stringify(filterSettings));
          log('[狐裁] 已自动迁移标签过滤配置：移除 fox_tip/fox_selc，更新 think_fox 为有头有尾，添加 User_latest_request');
        }
      } catch (e) { log('[狐裁] 迁移标签过滤配置失败', e); }
    })();
    return {
      enabled: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.enabled) === 'true',
      phase1Prompt: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase1Prompt) || FOX_JUDGE_PHASE1_PROMPT,
      phase2Prompt,
      strength: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.strength) || 'default',
      cacheEnabled: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.cacheEnabled) !== 'false',
      swipeRethink: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.swipeRethink) === 'true',
      rerollRethink: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.rerollRethink) === 'true',
      apiType: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.apiType) || 'current',
      customApi,
      filterSettings,
      customThinkingReq: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.customThinkingReq) || '',
      maxRetries: Math.max(0, Math.min(5, parseInt(localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.maxRetries)) || 2)),
      phase1Only: localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase1Only) === 'true',
    };
  }

  function foxJudgeSaveConfig(cfg) {
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.enabled, cfg.enabled ? 'true' : 'false');
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase1Prompt, cfg.phase1Prompt || FOX_JUDGE_PHASE1_PROMPT);
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase2Prompt, cfg.phase2Prompt || FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS);
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.strength, cfg.strength || 'default');
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.cacheEnabled, cfg.cacheEnabled !== false ? 'true' : 'false');
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.swipeRethink, cfg.swipeRethink ? 'true' : 'false');
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.rerollRethink, cfg.rerollRethink ? 'true' : 'false');
    localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.apiType, cfg.apiType || 'current');
    try { localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.customApi, JSON.stringify(cfg.customApi || {})); } catch { }
    try { localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.filterSettings, JSON.stringify(cfg.filterSettings || {})); } catch { }
    try { localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.customThinkingReq, cfg.customThinkingReq || ''); } catch { }
    try { localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.maxRetries, String(cfg.maxRetries ?? 2)); } catch { }
    try { localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.phase1Only, cfg.phase1Only ? 'true' : 'false'); } catch { }
  }

  const FOX_JUDGE_MODIFIED_IDS = [
    ...FOX_JUDGE_COT_IDS,
    FOX_JUDGE_NO_COT_ID,
    FOX_JUDGE_DIRECT_OUT_THINK_ID,
    FOX_JUDGE_DIRECT_OUT_ID,
