  ];

  async function foxJudgeApplyAutoPresetChanges() {
    try {
      const changesToSave = {};
      try {
        const preset = getPreset('in_use');
        for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
          const ref = p.id || p.identifier || '';
          if (FOX_JUDGE_MODIFIED_IDS.includes(ref)) {
            changesToSave[ref] = !!p.enabled;
          }
        }
      } catch {}
      localStorage.setItem(FOX_JUDGE_PRESET_SNAPSHOT_KEY, JSON.stringify(changesToSave));
      log('[狐裁] 已保存被修改条目的原始状态', Object.keys(changesToSave).length, '条');

      await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
        for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
          const ref = p.id || p.identifier || '';
          if (FOX_JUDGE_COT_IDS.includes(ref)) p.enabled = false;
          if (ref === FOX_JUDGE_NO_COT_ID) p.enabled = true;
          if (ref === FOX_JUDGE_DIRECT_OUT_THINK_ID) p.enabled = false;
          if (ref === FOX_JUDGE_DIRECT_OUT_ID) p.enabled = true;
          if (FOX_JUDGE_THINKING_STRENGTH_IDS.includes(ref)) p.enabled = false;
        }
        return preset;
      });
      log('[狐裁] 已自动切换：思维链→无思维链，尾部→直出输出，思考强度→关闭');
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 自动切换预设失败', e);
    }
  }

  async function foxJudgeRestorePresetFromSnapshot() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_PRESET_SNAPSHOT_KEY);
      if (!raw) {
        log('[狐裁] 无预设快照，跳过恢复');
        return;
      }
      const changes = JSON.parse(raw);
      await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
        for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
          const ref = p.id || p.identifier || '';
          if (ref in changes) {
            p.enabled = changes[ref];
          }
        }
        return preset;
      });
      localStorage.removeItem(FOX_JUDGE_PRESET_SNAPSHOT_KEY);
      log('[狐裁] 已从快照恢复被修改的预设条目', Object.keys(changes).length, '条');
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 恢复预设快照失败', e);
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeGetStaticCache(charId) {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.charCachePrefix + charId);
      if (!raw) return null;
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!parsed || parsed.version !== 2) return null;
      if (parsed.char_id !== charId) return null;
      return parsed;
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  function foxJudgeSaveStaticCache(charId, cache) {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(
        FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.charCachePrefix + charId,
        JSON.stringify(cache)
      );
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 缓存保存失败', e);
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeInvalidateStaticCache() {
    try {
      const keys = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
        const k = localStorage.key(i);
        if (k && k.startsWith(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.charCachePrefix)) keys.push(k);
      }
      keys.forEach(k => localStorage.removeItem(k));
      log(`[狐裁] 已清空 ${keys.length} 个缓存`);
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 缓存清空失败', e);
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeBuildCustomApiParams(cfg) {
    if (!cfg) return null;
    if (cfg.apiType !== 'custom') return null;
    const ca = cfg.customApi || {};
    if (!ca.apiurl && !ca.proxyPreset) return null;

    const customApi = { source: ca.source || 'openai' };
    if (ca.proxyPreset) customApi.proxy_preset = ca.proxyPreset;
    else {
      if (ca.apiurl) customApi.apiurl = ca.apiurl;
      if (ca.key) customApi.key = ca.key;
    }
    if (ca.model) customApi.model = ca.model;
    if (ca.temperature !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.temperature))) customApi.temperature = parseFloat(ca.temperature);
    if (ca.top_p !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.top_p))) customApi.top_p = parseFloat(ca.top_p);
    if (ca.frequency_penalty !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.frequency_penalty))) customApi.frequency_penalty = parseFloat(ca.frequency_penalty);
    if (ca.presence_penalty !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(ca.presence_penalty))) customApi.presence_penalty = parseFloat(ca.presence_penalty);
    if (ca.max_tokens !== '' && !isNaN(parseInt(ca.max_tokens))) customApi.max_tokens = parseInt(ca.max_tokens);
    return customApi;
  }

  const FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS = {
    enableContentFilter: true,
    includeTagPairs: [],
    excludeTagPairs: [
      { start: '<think_fox~>', end: '</think_fox~>' },
      { start: '<User_latest_request>', end: '</User_latest_request>' },
    ],
  };

  function foxJudgeGetFilterSettings() {
    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    return cfg.filterSettings || FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS;
  }

  // 截断检测：思维链返回内容是否被截断/不完整
  // - 第一阶段固定规则审查：通常应该有较多结论，少于 minLength 视为截断
  // - 第二阶段动态思考：通常更长，少于 minLength 视为截断
  // 默认 minLength=300：覆盖"不到300字就停下"的情况
  function foxJudgeIsEmptyOrError(result, minLength = 300) {
    if (!result || typeof result !== 'string') return true;
    const trimmed = result.trim();
    if (!trimmed) return true;
    // 错误开头：API 报错
    if (/^(error|错误|failed|失败|rate\s*limit|too\s*many\s*requests|429|503|500|502|服务繁忙|请稍后|请求过于频繁)/i.test(trimmed)) return true;
    // 长度过短：截断
    if (trimmed.length < minLength) return true;
    // 末尾未闭合（看起来被中途截断）：以省略号或半句中文结尾且不像正常结句
    // 注意不能太严，避免正常输出被误判
    return false;
  }

  async function foxJudgeRunPhase1WithRetry(cfg, contextText, maxRetries = 2) {
    // 第一阶段固定规则审查：要求至少 300 字，少于则视为截断重试
    const MIN_LEN = 300;
    let lastError = null;
    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxRetries + 1; attempt++) {
      try {
        const result = await foxJudgeRunPhase1(cfg, contextText);
        if (!foxJudgeIsEmptyOrError(result, MIN_LEN)) return result;
        if (attempt < maxRetries) {
          const trimmedLen = result?.trim()?.length || 0;
          // 文案分级：完全空 / 近似空（<10）/ 截断
          const reason = trimmedLen === 0 ? '空回复'
            : trimmedLen < 10 ? `近似空回复（仅 ${trimmedLen} 字符）`
            : `截断（仅 ${trimmedLen} 字符）`;
          log(`[狐裁] 第一阶段${reason}，第 ${attempt + 1} 次重试……`);
          ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', `🦊 狐裁：第一阶段${reason}，重试 ${attempt + 1}/${maxRetries}…`);
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000));
        }
        lastError = new Error('第一阶段返回空或截断内容');
      } catch (e) {
        lastError = e;
        if (attempt < maxRetries && !/abort|aborted|cancel|中断|取消/i.test(e?.message || '')) {
          log(`[狐裁] 第一阶段失败，第 ${attempt + 1} 次重试……`, e);
          ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', `🦊 狐裁：第一阶段报错，重试 ${attempt + 1}/${maxRetries}…`);
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500));
        } else {
          throw e;
        }
      }
    }
    throw lastError || new Error('第一阶段重试用尽仍为空');
  }

  async function foxJudgeRunPhase2WithRetry(cfg, phase1Result, userInput, contextText, maxRetries = 2) {
    // 第二阶段动态思考：通常比第一阶段更详细，至少 300 字
    const MIN_LEN = 300;
    let lastError = null;
    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxRetries + 1; attempt++) {
      try {
        const result = await foxJudgeRunPhase2(cfg, phase1Result, userInput, contextText);
        if (!foxJudgeIsEmptyOrError(result, MIN_LEN)) return result;
        if (attempt < maxRetries) {
          const trimmedLen = result?.trim()?.length || 0;
          const reason = trimmedLen === 0 ? '空回复'
            : trimmedLen < 10 ? `近似空回复（仅 ${trimmedLen} 字符）`
            : `截断（仅 ${trimmedLen} 字符）`;
          log(`[狐裁] 第二阶段${reason}，第 ${attempt + 1} 次重试……`);
          ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', `🦊 狐裁：第二阶段${reason}，重试 ${attempt + 1}/${maxRetries}…`);
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000));
        }
        lastError = new Error('第二阶段返回空或截断内容');
      } catch (e) {
        lastError = e;
        if (attempt < maxRetries && !/abort|aborted|cancel|中断|取消/i.test(e?.message || '')) {
          log(`[狐裁] 第二阶段失败，第 ${attempt + 1} 次重试……`, e);
          ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', `🦊 狐裁：第二阶段报错，重试 ${attempt + 1}/${maxRetries}…`);
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500));
        } else {
          throw e;
        }
      }
    }
    throw lastError || new Error('第二阶段重试用尽仍为空');
  }

  async function foxJudgeRunPhase1(cfg, contextText) {
    const ordered = [
      {
        role: 'system',
        content: `
        你是一位思考大师，你负责读取下面的要求和完整上下文内容，按要求进行一次全面的思考，你不负责正文撰写，禁止输出任何正文续写内容，不要被正文续写要求所迷惑，你只负责思考。
        以下内容是完整上下文、设定、世界书与用户偏好。

要求：
- 你必须把这些内容视为本次固定规则确认的完整上下文。
- 如果上下文中存在设定、世界观、角色信息、玩家角色信息、历史剧情，请全部纳入判断。
- 禁止只根据最新用户消息确认规则。
- 禁止忽略用户偏好。
- 禁止忽略要求。
- 禁止输出正文。

【上下文开始】
${contextText}
【上下文结束】
接下来是思考强度要求：`,
      },
      {
        role: 'system',
        content: `${FOX_JUDGE_STRENGTH_PROMPTS[cfg.strength] || FOX_JUDGE_STRENGTH_PROMPTS.default}

${cfg.phase1Prompt || FOX_JUDGE_PHASE1_PROMPT}`,
      },
    ];

    const params = {
      should_silence: true,
      should_stream: false,
      ordered_prompts: ordered,
    };
    const customApi = foxJudgeBuildCustomApiParams(cfg);
    if (customApi) params.custom_api = customApi;
    // ✅ 修复中断 BUG：通过 ssGenerateRaw 复用 fox_judge_chain 任务的 generationId，
    //    让 ssCancelTask -> stopGenerationById 能真正中断本阶段的生成
    const r = await ssGenerateRaw('fox_judge_chain', params, '狐裁第一阶段');
    // 中断时 ssCancelTask 会让 gr 抛 abort，由 foxJudgeRunPhase1WithRetry 的 abort 正则识别后短路；
    // 即使 gr 返回空字符串，foxJudgeIsEmptyOrError 也会兜底重试或上抛。

    return String(typeof r === 'string' ? r : (r?.content || '')).trim();
  }

  async function foxJudgeRunPhase2(cfg, phase1Result, userInput, contextText) {

    const phase1Inject = phase1Result
      ? `【第一阶段固定规则确认结果｜参考】\n${phase1Result}`
      : '';

    const userInputInject = userInput
      ? `【本轮用户输入】\n${userInput}`
      : '';

    let phase2PromptText = cfg.phase2Prompt || FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS;

    const customThinkingReq = (cfg.customThinkingReq || '').trim();
    if (customThinkingReq) {
      const insertMarker = '要求：禁止跳过任何一步，禁止仅替换词汇而骨架不变。';
      if (phase2PromptText.includes(insertMarker)) {
        phase2PromptText = phase2PromptText.replace(
          insertMarker,
          `${customThinkingReq}\n\n${insertMarker}`
        );
      } else {
        phase2PromptText += `\n\n${customThinkingReq}`;
      }
    }

    const ordered = [
      {
        role: 'system',
        content: `
        
        你是一位思考大师，你负责读取下面的要求和完整上下文内容，按要求进行一次全面的思考，你不负责正文撰写，禁止输出任何正文续写内容，不要被正文续写要求所迷惑，你只负责思考。
        以下内容是完整上下文、设定、世界书与用户偏好。

要求：
- 你必须把这些内容视为本次固定规则确认的完整上下文。
- 如果上下文中存在设定、世界观、角色信息、玩家角色信息、历史剧情，请全部纳入判断。
- 禁止只根据最新用户消息确认规则。
- 禁止忽略用户偏好。
- 禁止忽略要求。
- 禁止输出正文。

【上下文开始】
${contextText}
【上下文结束】
接下来是思考强度要求：

${FOX_JUDGE_STRENGTH_PROMPTS[cfg.strength] || FOX_JUDGE_STRENGTH_PROMPTS.default}`,
      },
      {
        role: 'system',
        content: `${userInputInject}
${phase1Inject}

${phase2PromptText}`,
      },
    ];

    const params = {
      should_silence: true,
      should_stream: false,
      ordered_prompts: ordered,
    };
    const customApi = foxJudgeBuildCustomApiParams(cfg);
    if (customApi) params.custom_api = customApi;
    // ✅ 修复中断 BUG：通过 ssGenerateRaw 复用 fox_judge_chain 任务的 generationId，
    //    让 ssCancelTask -> stopGenerationById 能真正中断本阶段的生成
    const r = await ssGenerateRaw('fox_judge_chain', params, '狐裁第二阶段');
    // 中断时 ssCancelTask 会让 gr 抛 abort，由 foxJudgeRunPhase2WithRetry 的 abort 正则识别后短路；
    // 即使 gr 返回空字符串，foxJudgeIsEmptyOrError 也会兜底重试或上抛。

    return String(typeof r === 'string' ? r : (r?.content || '')).trim();
  }

  function foxJudgeBuildDynamicContext(userInput, lastAssistantText) {
    const lines = [];
    if (userInput) lines.push(`【本轮用户输入】\n${userInput}`);
    if (lastAssistantText) lines.push(`【最新 AI 回复｜参考】\n${lastAssistantText}`);
    lines.push('请基于以上内容进行第二阶段思考。');
    return lines.join('\n\n');
  }

  function foxJudgeStripThinkBlock(text) {
    return String(text || '').replace(/<think_fox~>[\s\S]*?<\/think_fox~>/g, '').trim();
  }

  function foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(text) {
    let s = String(text || '');
    const closeIdx = s.lastIndexOf('</think_fox~>');
    if (closeIdx >= 0) {
      s = s.substring(0, closeIdx + '</think_fox~>'.length);
    }
    return s.trim();
  }

  function foxJudgeStripXmlTags(text) {
    const PH_OPEN = '\x00THINK_FOX_OPEN\x00';
    const PH_CLOSE = '\x00THINK_FOX_CLOSE\x00';
    return String(text || '')
      .replace(/<think_fox~>/g, PH_OPEN)
      .replace(/<\/think_fox~>/g, PH_CLOSE)
      .replace(/<\/?[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_\-]*[^>]*>/g, '')
      .replace(new RegExp(PH_OPEN.replace(/\x00/g, '\\x00'), 'g'), '<think_fox~>')
      .replace(new RegExp(PH_CLOSE.replace(/\x00/g, '\\x00'), 'g'), '</think_fox~>')
      .trim();
  }

  async function foxJudgeInjectIntoMainOutput(targetMessageId) {
    try {
      const rawCombined = foxJudgeLastCombined || foxJudgePendingInject;
      if (!rawCombined) return;

      const combined = foxJudgeStripXmlTags(rawCombined);
      const cleanedCombined = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(combined);

      const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
      const scm = getFn('setChatMessages');
      if (!glmi || !gcm || !scm) return;

      const lastId = targetMessageId != null ? targetMessageId : glmi();
      if (lastId < 0) return;

      const cm = gcm(lastId, { include_swipes: true })?.[0];
      if (!cm || cm.role !== 'assistant') return;

      const cid = cm.swipe_id ?? 0;
      const original = String(cm.swipes?.[cid] || '');

      if (original.includes('<think_fox~>')) return;

      const cleaned = foxJudgeStripThinkBlock(original);
      const cleanedOrig = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(cleaned);
      const newContent = `${cleanedCombined}\n\n${cleanedOrig}`;

      const nsa = [...(cm.swipes || [])];
      nsa[cid] = newContent;
      await scm([{ message_id: lastId, swipe_id: cid, swipes: nsa }], { refresh: 'affected' });
      log('[狐裁] 思维链已注入到主模型输出楼层顶部');
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐裁] 注入主模型输出失败', e);
    }
  }

  let foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
  let foxJudgePendingInject = '';

  async function foxJudgeRunChain({ userInput, lastAssistantText, forceRefresh = false, phase2Only = false } = {}) {
    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    if (!cfg.enabled) return { combined: '', phase1: '', phase2: '', skipped: 'disabled' };

    // ✅ 重入保护：上一次还在跑就拒绝本次（不强制取消上一次）
    //    上层（foxPushInterceptAndPolish / foxJudgeInterceptAndThink / foxJudgeHandleRerollSwipe）
    //    都已经做了"自身正在思考"的拦截，正常路径下不会有重复调用进来。
    //    这里只做兜底，避免之前"取消上一次又立刻返回 cancelled、上层却继续 fire 主请求"
    //    导致正文一边出、思维链一边在跑的循环。
    if (ssIsTaskRunning('fox_judge_chain')) {
      log('[狐裁] 检测到上一次思维链仍在进行，拒绝本次重入');
      return { combined: '', phase1: '', phase2: '', skipped: 'busy' };
    }

    // ✅ phase2Only 与 phase1Only 互斥：调用方要"重跑第二阶段"，但配置是"仅第一阶段"，
    //    直接放弃本次思考（外层调用点本就有 cfg.phase1Only return 的前置守卫，这里是兜底）
    if (phase2Only && cfg.phase1Only) {
      log('[狐裁] phase2Only 与 phase1Only 互斥，本次跳过狐裁思考');
      return { combined: '', phase1: '', phase2: '', skipped: 'phase1_only_conflict' };
    }

    const charId = getCurrentCharId();
    let phase1Result;
    let phase1FromCache = false;

    ssStartTask('fox_judge_chain', '狐裁思维链');

    try {
      const filterSettings = cfg.filterSettings || FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS;
      const contextText = await ssBuildFilteredMainContextText('狐裁', filterSettings, { skipRoleLabels: true });

      // Phase 1：phase2Only 模式直接走缓存（必须有缓存才能用，否则跑一次 Phase1）
      if (phase2Only) {
        if (cfg.cacheEnabled) {
          foxJudgeCheckAndInvalidateIfChanged();
          const staticCache = foxJudgeGetStaticCache(charId);
          if (staticCache?.phase1_result) {
            phase1Result = staticCache.phase1_result;
            phase1FromCache = true;
            log('[狐裁] phase2Only：命中缓存，跳过第一阶段');
          }
        }
        if (!phase1Result) {
          // 没缓存也只跑一次 Phase1（不强制刷新），跑完缓存起来
          ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', '🦊 狐裁：phase2Only 但无缓存，先补跑第一阶段……');
          phase1Result = await foxJudgeRunPhase1WithRetry(cfg, contextText, cfg.maxRetries);
          if (phase1Result && cfg.cacheEnabled) {
            foxJudgeSaveStaticCache(charId, {
              version: 2,
              char_id: charId,
              phase1_result: phase1Result,
              strength: cfg.strength,
              created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            });
          }
        }
      } else {
        // 正常模式：优先检查缓存
        if (cfg.cacheEnabled && !forceRefresh) {
          foxJudgeCheckAndInvalidateIfChanged();
          const staticCache = foxJudgeGetStaticCache(charId);
          if (staticCache?.phase1_result) {
            phase1Result = staticCache.phase1_result;
            phase1FromCache = true;
            log('[狐裁] 命中缓存，跳过第一阶段');
          }
        }

        if (!phase1Result) {
          ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', '🦊 狐裁：正在思考第一阶段……');

          phase1Result = await foxJudgeRunPhase1WithRetry(cfg, contextText, cfg.maxRetries);

          if (phase1Result && cfg.cacheEnabled) {
            foxJudgeSaveStaticCache(charId, {
              version: 2,
              char_id: charId,
              phase1_result: phase1Result,
              strength: cfg.strength,
              created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            });
            log('[狐裁] 第一阶段完成，已缓存');
          } else {
            log('[狐裁] 第一阶段完成（未缓存，缓存已关闭）');
          }
        }
      }

      // phase1Only：仅在非 phase2Only 模式下生效；phase2Only 不允许走 phase1Only 短路
      if (cfg.phase1Only && !phase2Only) {
        let cleanPhase1 = foxJudgeStripThinkBlock(phase1Result || '');
        cleanPhase1 = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(cleanPhase1);
        const combined = `<think_fox~>
${cleanPhase1}
思考完毕，立刻按要求开始输出正文
</think_fox~>`;

        foxJudgeLastCombined = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(combined);
        foxJudgePendingInject = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(combined);
        log('[狐裁] 仅第一阶段模式：跳过第二阶段，Phase1来自缓存=', phase1FromCache);

        toast('🦊 狐裁思维链完成（仅第一阶段）', 'success');

        return { combined, phase1: phase1Result, phase2: '', skipped: 'phase1_only' };
      }

      ssTaskToast('fox_judge_chain', '🦊 狐裁：正在思考第二阶段……');

      const phase2Result = await foxJudgeRunPhase2WithRetry(cfg, phase1Result, userInput, contextText, cfg.maxRetries);

      let cleanPhase1 = foxJudgeStripThinkBlock(phase1Result || '');
      let cleanPhase2 = foxJudgeStripThinkBlock(phase2Result || '');
      cleanPhase1 = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(cleanPhase1);
      cleanPhase2 = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(cleanPhase2);
      const combined = `<think_fox~>
${cleanPhase1}
[OS]
${cleanPhase2}
思考完毕，立刻按要求开始输出正文
</think_fox~>`;

      foxJudgeLastCombined = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(combined);
      foxJudgePendingInject = foxJudgeCleanLeakageAfterThinkClose(combined);
      log('[狐裁] 两阶段思考完成，length=', combined.length, 'Phase1来自缓存=', phase1FromCache, '等待主模型输出后注入楼层');

      toast('🦊 狐裁思维链完成', 'success');

      return { combined, phase1: phase1Result, phase2: phase2Result, skipped: null };
    } catch (e) {
      const msg = e?.message || String(e || '');
      if (/abort|aborted|cancel|中断|取消/i.test(msg)) {
        toast('⛔ 狐裁已中断', 'warning');
        return { combined: '', phase1: '', phase2: '', skipped: 'cancelled' };
      }
      log('[狐裁] 思维链失败', e);
      toast(`❌ 狐裁失败：${msg}`, 'error');
      return { combined: '', phase1: '', phase2: '', skipped: 'error' };
    } finally {
      ssClearTaskToast('fox_judge_chain');
      ssEndTask('fox_judge_chain');
    }
  }

  let foxJudgeOutputInjectHandles = [];

  function foxJudgeRegisterOutputInjectListener() {
    foxJudgeUnregisterOutputInjectListener();

    const eo = getFn('eventOn');
    const te = getFn('tavern_events') || tavern_events;
    if (typeof eo !== 'function') return;

    if (te?.MESSAGE_RECEIVED) {
      foxJudgeOutputInjectHandles.push(
        eo(te.MESSAGE_RECEIVED, async (messageId, type) => {
          const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
          if (!cfg.enabled) return;
          if (!foxJudgePendingInject && !foxJudgeLastCombined) return;

          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600));

          await foxJudgeInjectIntoMainOutput(messageId);
          foxJudgePendingInject = '';
          foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
          log('[狐裁] MESSAGE_RECEIVED：思维链已注入到主模型输出楼层顶部');
        })
      );
    }

    if (te?.MESSAGE_DELETED) {
      foxJudgeOutputInjectHandles.push(
        eo(te.MESSAGE_DELETED, async (messageId) => {
          const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
          if (!cfg.enabled) return;

          try {
            const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
            const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
            if (glmi && gcm) {
              const lastId = glmi();
              if (lastId >= 0) {
                const cm = gcm(lastId, { include_swipes: true })?.[0];
                if (cm && cm.role === 'assistant') {
                  const text = String(cm.message || '');
                  if (text.includes('<think_fox~>')) {
                    foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
                    foxJudgePendingInject = '';
                    log('[狐裁] MESSAGE_DELETED：检测到含思维链楼层，已同步清理内存缓存');
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {
            log('[狐裁] MESSAGE_DELETED 同步清理失败', e);
          }
        })
      );
    }

    if (te?.GENERATION_ENDED) {
      foxJudgeOutputInjectHandles.push(
        eo(te.GENERATION_ENDED, () => {
          try { foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners(); } catch { }
        })
      );
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeUnregisterOutputInjectListener() {
    for (const h of foxJudgeOutputInjectHandles) {
      try { if (typeof h?.stop === 'function') h.stop(); } catch { }
    }
    foxJudgeOutputInjectHandles = [];
  }

  let foxJudgeRethinkPending = false;
  let foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle = null;
  let foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle = null;
  let foxJudgeSkipNextReroll = false;
  let foxJudgeSkipNextSwipe = false;

  async function foxJudgeHandleRerollSwipe(source) {
    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    if (!cfg.enabled) return;
    if (foxJudgeRethinkPending) {
      toast('⏳ 狐裁思考中，请稍候…', 'info');
      return;
    }

    if (ssActiveTasks.size > 0 || state.husouIsRunning || state.foxAnalyzing || state.outlineIsCorrecting || state.outlineIsGenerating || state.hushenIsAnalyzing || pwState?.running) return;

    foxJudgeRethinkPending = true;

    try {
      log(`[狐裁] ${source} 拦截：开始重跑第二阶段`);

      // 注意：理论上前置守卫（`foxJudgeOnRerollClick`/`OnSwipeClick` 在 ssActiveTasks.size > 0 时早返回）
      // 已经过滤掉了"上一次还在跑"的情况，这里走不到。`foxJudgeRunChain` 内部也有重入保护会返回 busy。
      // 之前这里的 ssCancelTask + await 300ms 是兜底防御，但与新版"重入返回 busy"语义冲突，
      // 反而会让上一次跑到一半的思考被中断却不让本次启动，故移除。

      foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
      foxJudgePendingInject = '';

      const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
      const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
      let userInput = '';
      let lastAssistantText = '';
      if (glmi && gcm) {
        const lastId = glmi();
        if (lastId >= 0) {
          for (let i = lastId; i >= Math.max(0, lastId - 5); i--) {
            const m = gcm(i, { hide_state: 'all', include_swipes: false })?.[0];
            if (!m) continue;
            if (!userInput && m.role === 'user') {
              userInput = String(m.message || '').trim();
            }
            if (!lastAssistantText && m.role === 'assistant') {
              lastAssistantText = String(m.message || '').trim();
              try { lastAssistantText = ssCleanXuanhuInjectedBlocksFromMessage(lastAssistantText); } catch { }
              lastAssistantText = foxJudgeStripThinkBlock(lastAssistantText);
            }
            if (userInput && lastAssistantText) break;
          }
        }
      }

      const result = await foxJudgeRunChain({ userInput, lastAssistantText, phase2Only: true });
      if (result.combined) {
        foxJudgeLastCombined = result.combined;
        foxJudgePendingInject = result.combined;
        log(`[狐裁] ${source} 重新思考完成，准备释放按钮`);
      } else if (result.skipped === 'busy') {
        log(`[狐裁] ${source} 上一次思维链仍在进行，本次跳过狐裁注入`);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      log(`[狐裁] ${source} 重新思考失败:`, err);
    } finally {
      foxJudgeRethinkPending = false;
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeOnRerollClick(e) {
    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    if (!cfg.enabled || !cfg.rerollRethink) return;
    if (cfg.phase1Only) return;

    if (foxJudgeSkipNextReroll) {
      foxJudgeSkipNextReroll = false;
      return;
    }

    if (foxJudgeRethinkPending) {
      e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      e.preventDefault();
      toast('⏳ 狐裁思考中，请稍候…', 'info');
      return;
    }
    // 其他后台任务在跑：让出 reroll，同时清空旧思维链避免误注入
    if (ssActiveTasks.size > 0 || state.husouIsRunning || state.foxAnalyzing || state.outlineIsCorrecting || state.outlineIsGenerating || state.hushenIsAnalyzing || pwState?.running) {
      foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
      foxJudgePendingInject = '';
      return;
    }

    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
    e.preventDefault();

    foxJudgeHandleRerollSwipe('reroll').then(() => {
      foxJudgeSkipNextReroll = true;
      const btn = topDoc.getElementById('option_regenerate') || topDoc.getElementById('regenerate');
      if (btn) btn.click();
    });
  }

  function foxJudgeOnSwipeClick(e) {
    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    if (!cfg.enabled || !cfg.swipeRethink) return;
    if (cfg.phase1Only) return;

    if (foxJudgeSkipNextSwipe) {
      foxJudgeSkipNextSwipe = false;
      return;
    }

    if (foxJudgeRethinkPending) {
      e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      e.preventDefault();
      toast('⏳ 狐裁思考中，请稍候…', 'info');
      return;
    }
    // 其他后台任务在跑：让出 swipe，同时清空旧思维链避免误注入
    if (ssActiveTasks.size > 0 || state.husouIsRunning || state.foxAnalyzing || state.outlineIsCorrecting || state.outlineIsGenerating || state.hushenIsAnalyzing || pwState?.running) {
      foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
      foxJudgePendingInject = '';
      return;
    }

    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
    e.preventDefault();

    foxJudgeHandleRerollSwipe('swipe').then(() => {
      foxJudgeSkipNextSwipe = true;
      const swipeBtns = topDoc.querySelectorAll('.swipe_right, #swipe_right');
      if (swipeBtns.length) {
        swipeBtns[swipeBtns.length - 1].click();
      }
    });
  }

  function foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners() {
    foxJudgeUnregisterSwipeRerollListeners();

    const cfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
    if (!cfg.enabled) return;

    if (cfg.rerollRethink) {
      const regenBtn = topDoc.getElementById('option_regenerate') || topDoc.getElementById('regenerate');
      if (regenBtn) {
        regenBtn.addEventListener('click', foxJudgeOnRerollClick, true);
        foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle = { el: regenBtn, fn: foxJudgeOnRerollClick };
        log('[狐裁] reroll 拦截器已注册');
      }
    }

    if (cfg.swipeRethink) {
      const swipeBtns = topDoc.querySelectorAll('.swipe_right, #swipe_right');
      if (swipeBtns.length) {
        const lastBtn = swipeBtns[swipeBtns.length - 1];
        lastBtn.addEventListener('click', foxJudgeOnSwipeClick, true);
        foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle = { el: lastBtn, fn: foxJudgeOnSwipeClick };
        log('[狐裁] swipe 拦截器已注册');
      }
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeUnregisterSwipeRerollListeners() {
    try {
      if (foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle?.el && foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle.fn) {
        foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle.el.removeEventListener('click', foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle.fn, true);
      }
    } catch { }
    try {
      if (foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle?.el && foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle.fn) {
        foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle.el.removeEventListener('click', foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle.fn, true);
      }
    } catch { }
    foxJudgeRerollBtnHandle = null;
    foxJudgeSwipeBtnHandle = null;
    foxJudgeRethinkPending = false;
    foxJudgeSkipNextReroll = false;
    foxJudgeSkipNextSwipe = false;
  }

  function foxJudgeCalcCharFingerprint() {
    try {
      const ctx = SillyTavern?.getContext?.();
      const char = ctx?.characters?.[ctx?.characterId];
      const charId = getCurrentCharId();

      if (!char) return `${charId}_none`;

      const parts = [
        charId,
        char.name || '',
        char.description || '',
        char.personality || '',
        char.scenario || '',
      ];

      try {
        const preset = getPreset?.('in_use');
        const prompts = preset?.prompts || [];
        const promptMap = new Map();
        for (const p of prompts) {
          const ref = p.id || p.identifier || '';
          if (ref) promptMap.set(ref, p);
        }

        const toggleParts = [];
        for (const t of CONFIG.QUICK_TOGGLE_IDS) {
          const p = promptMap.get(t.id);
          toggleParts.push(`${t.id}=${p ? !!p.enabled : 'x'}`);
        }
        parts.push('QT:' + toggleParts.join(','));

        const selectParts = [];
        for (const g of CONFIG.SELECT_GROUPS) {
          for (const opt of g.options) {
            const p = promptMap.get(opt.id);
            selectParts.push(`${opt.id}=${p ? !!p.enabled : 'x'}`);
          }
        }
        parts.push('SG:' + selectParts.join(','));

        const killParts = [];
        for (const t of CONFIG.KILL_TOGGLES) {
          const p = promptMap.get(t.id);
          killParts.push(`${t.id}=${p ? !!p.enabled : 'x'}`);
        }
        parts.push('KT:' + killParts.join(','));

        const customParts = [];
        for (const ce of CONFIG.CUSTOM_EDIT_IDS) {
          const p = promptMap.get(ce.id);
          const en = p ? !!p.enabled : false;
          const contentFull = p?.content || '';
          customParts.push(`${ce.id}=${en}:${contentFull}`);
        }
        parts.push('CE:' + customParts.join('|'));
      } catch (e) {
        log('[狐裁指纹] 读取预设选项失败', e);
      }

      return parts.join('||');
    } catch {
      return `${getCurrentCharId()}_err`;
    }
  }

  function foxJudgeCheckAndInvalidateIfChanged() {
    const charId = getCurrentCharId();
    const cache = foxJudgeGetStaticCache(charId);
    if (!cache) return;

    const currentFp = foxJudgeCalcCharFingerprint();
    if (cache.fingerprint && cache.fingerprint !== currentFp) {
      log('[狐裁] 检测到角色卡/预设变更，缓存已失效');
      try { localStorage.removeItem(FOX_JUDGE_LS_KEYS.charCachePrefix + charId); } catch { }
    }
  }

  const __original_foxJudgeSaveStaticCache = foxJudgeSaveStaticCache;
  foxJudgeSaveStaticCache = function (charId, cache) {
    cache.fingerprint = foxJudgeCalcCharFingerprint();
    return __original_foxJudgeSaveStaticCache(charId, cache);
  };

        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#ffd8b8;cursor:pointer;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,170,90,0.45);border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(232,120,74,0.16),rgba(255,255,255,0.025));">
           <span>
             <strong style="color:#ffb06a;">🦊 启用内置思维链</strong>

              <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">模型</label>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
                <input id="foxjudge-api-model" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(cfg.customApi.model || '')}" style="flex:1;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">
                <button id="foxjudge-fetch-models" style="padding:5px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;">获取模型</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">模型列表</label>
              <select id="foxjudge-api-model-select" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"><option value="">（从列表选择）</option></select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <details style="margin-top:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
            <summary style="cursor:pointer;padding:8px 10px;color:#f0a070;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;user-select:none;">⚙️ 高级参数</summary>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 12px;padding:10px;">
              <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">温度</label><input id="foxjudge-api-temp" type="number" min="0" max="2" step="0.1" value="${escapeHtml(cfg.customApi.temperature ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
              <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">最大 token</label><input id="foxjudge-api-max-tokens" type="number" min="0" step="128" value="${escapeHtml(cfg.customApi.max_tokens ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
              <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">Top P</label><input id="foxjudge-api-top-p" type="number" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="${escapeHtml(cfg.customApi.top_p ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
              <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">频率惩罚</label><input id="foxjudge-api-freq-pen" type="number" min="-2" max="2" step="0.01" value="${escapeHtml(cfg.customApi.frequency_penalty ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
              <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">存在惩罚</label><input id="foxjudge-api-pres-pen" type="number" min="-2" max="2" step="0.01" value="${escapeHtml(cfg.customApi.presence_penalty ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
            </div>
          </details>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
        <details>
          <summary style="cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;user-select:none;">🏷️ 上下文标签过滤</summary>
          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#90756a;line-height:1.6;margin:8px 0;">
            狐裁读取上下文时的标签过滤规则。<br>
            chatHistory 中用户消息不做标签过滤，AI/char 消息才会按这里的规则过滤。<br>
            默认排除 <code><think_fox~></think_fox~></code> 和 <code><User_latest_request></User_latest_request></code> 内的全部内容。
          </div>

          <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="foxjudge-content-filter" ${(cfg.filterSettings || FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS).enableContentFilter !== false ? 'checked' : ''}>
            启用狐裁标签过滤
          </label>

          ${ssCreateTagPairsEditorHtml(
            'foxjudge-inc',
            '✅ 包含标签：只保留这些标签范围内的内容',
            (cfg.filterSettings || FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS).includeTagPairs,
            '一行是一组。左边开始标签，右边结束标签。'
          )}

          ${ssCreateTagPairsEditorHtml(
            'foxjudge-exc',
            '❌ 排除标签：删除这些标签范围内的内容',
            (cfg.filterSettings || FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS).excludeTagPairs,
            '功能与包含标签相反。允许只填结束标签。'
          )}

          <button type="button" id="foxjudge-filter-save" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">💾 保存标签过滤设置</button>
        </details>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;">💾 缓存与重跑</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#a09088;line-height:1.55;">
          第一阶段结果按角色卡缓存，换卡或改预设自动失效
        </div>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#ffd8b8;cursor:pointer;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
          <span>
            <strong style="color:#f0a070;">💾 启用第一阶段缓存</strong>
            <span style="display:block;font-size:11px;color:#a09088;margin-top:2px;">关闭后第一阶段每次都重新思考</span>
          </span>
          <input id="foxjudge-cache-enabled" type="checkbox" ${cfg.cacheEnabled ? 'checked' : ''} style="cursor:pointer;width:18px;height:18px;">
        </label>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button type="button" id="foxjudge-clear-cache" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.13);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🧹 清空全部缓存</button>
          <button type="button" id="foxjudge-force-refresh" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🔄 强制重跑第一阶段</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;">📋 第一阶段缓存内容</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#a09088;line-height:1.55;">
          当前角色卡的第一阶段思考结果。可直接编辑并保存，编辑后下次发送时使用编辑后的内容。
        </div>
        <textarea id="foxjudge-phase1-cache-viewer" style="width:100%;min-height:150px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:10px;font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;resize:vertical;box-sizing:border-box;white-space:pre-wrap;">${(() => { try { const c = foxJudgeGetStaticCache(getCurrentCharId()); return escapeHtml(c?.phase1_result || '（无缓存，下次发送时自动生成）'); } catch { return '（读取失败）'; } })()}</textarea>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button type="button" id="foxjudge-phase1-cache-save" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">💾 保存编辑</button>
          <button type="button" id="foxjudge-phase1-cache-refresh" style="flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🔄 刷新显示</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;">🔁 Swipe / Reroll 重新思考</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#a09088;line-height:1.55;">
           开启后，swipe 或 reroll 时先拦截按钮、完成思维链思考，再释放按钮触发生成。思维链思考中时重复点击会提示等待。
        </div>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#ffd8b8;cursor:pointer;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
          <span>
            <strong style="color:#f0a070;">🔁 Swipe 时重新思考</strong>
            <span style="display:block;font-size:11px;color:#a09088;margin-top:2px;">切换 swipe 时重跑第二阶段，新思维链注入新输出楼层顶部</span>
          </span>
          <input id="foxjudge-swipe-rethink" type="checkbox" ${cfg.swipeRethink ? 'checked' : ''} style="cursor:pointer;width:18px;height:18px;">
        </label>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#ffd8b8;cursor:pointer;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
          <span>
            <strong style="color:#f0a070;">🔁 Reroll 时重新思考</strong>
            <span style="display:block;font-size:11px;color:#a09088;margin-top:2px;">重新生成时重跑第二阶段，新思维链注入新输出楼层顶部</span>
          </span>
          <input id="foxjudge-reroll-rethink" type="checkbox" ${cfg.rerollRethink ? 'checked' : ''} style="cursor:pointer;width:18px;height:18px;">
        </label>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;">🔄 空回复/报错重试</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#a09088;line-height:1.55;">
           当思维链阶段返回空内容、报错或 API 繁忙时自动重试。0=不重试（一报错就空思维链），1~5=重试次数。
        </div>
        <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#ffd8b8;cursor:pointer;padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
          <span>
            <strong style="color:#f0a070;">🔄 最大重试次数</strong>
            <span style="display:block;font-size:11px;color:#a09088;margin-top:2px;">思维链空回复/报错时自动重试次数（推荐2~3次）</span>
          </span>
          <input id="foxjudge-max-retries" type="number" min="0" max="5" value="${cfg.maxRetries ?? 2}" style="width:50px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;text-align:center;">
        </label>
      </div>
    `;

    topDoc.body.appendChild(overlay);
    topDoc.body.appendChild(panel);
    xhGuideEnhancePanel(panel, 'foxjudge', '狐裁');

    ssBindTagPairsEditor('foxjudge-inc', panel);
    ssBindTagPairsEditor('foxjudge-exc', panel);

    // 事件绑定
    let foxJudgeToggleGuard = false;

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-enabled').onchange = async (e) => {
      if (foxJudgeToggleGuard) { e.target.checked = !e.target.checked; return; }
      foxJudgeToggleGuard = true;
      const next = e.target.checked;
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.enabled = next;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      if (next) {
        await foxJudgeApplyAutoPresetChanges();
        foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners();
        foxJudgeRegisterOutputInjectListener();
        toast('✅ 已启用内置思维链（已自动关闭预设思维链+思考强度+切换直出）', 'success');
      } else {
        await foxJudgeRestorePresetFromSnapshot();
        foxJudgeUnregisterSwipeRerollListeners();
        foxJudgeLastCombined = '';
        foxJudgePendingInject = '';
        toast('📴 已关闭内置思维链（已恢复预设原始设置）', 'info');
      }
      setTimeout(() => { foxJudgeToggleGuard = false; }, 800);
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-only').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.phase1Only = e.target.checked;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      if (newCfg.phase1Only) {
        foxJudgeUnregisterSwipeRerollListeners();
        toast('🚀 已启用仅第一阶段模式（swipe/reroll不拦截，正文直出）', 'success');
      } else {
        if (newCfg.enabled) foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners();
        toast('🎬 已恢复完整两阶段思维链', 'info');
      }
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-reset').onclick = () => {
      const ta = panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-prompt');
      ta.value = FOX_JUDGE_PHASE1_PROMPT;
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.phase1Prompt = FOX_JUDGE_PHASE1_PROMPT;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      foxJudgeInvalidateStaticCache();
      toast('↩️ 第一阶段已恢复默认，缓存已清空', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-prompt').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.phase1Prompt = e.target.value;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      foxJudgeInvalidateStaticCache();
      toast('✅ 第一阶段提示词已保存，缓存已清空', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase2-reset').onclick = () => {
      const ta = panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase2-prompt');
      ta.value = FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS;
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.phase2Prompt = FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      toast('↩️ 第二阶段已恢复默认（多角色内心 OS）', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase2-prompt').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.phase2Prompt = e.target.value;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      toast('✅ 第二阶段提示词已保存', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-custom-thinking').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.customThinkingReq = e.target.value || '';
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      toast('✅ 自定义思考要求已保存', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelectorAll('[data-strength]').forEach((btn) => {
      btn.onclick = () => {
        const v = btn.dataset.strength;
        const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
        newCfg.strength = v;
        foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
        foxJudgeInvalidateStaticCache();

        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-strength]').forEach((b) => {
          const active = b === btn;
          b.style.borderColor = active ? 'rgba(255,170,90,0.55)' : 'rgba(232,120,74,0.2)';
          b.style.background = active ? 'rgba(232,120,74,0.22)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';
          b.style.color = active ? '#ffb06a' : '#a09088';
        });
        toast(`✅ 思考强度：${v}，缓存已清空`, 'success');
      };
    });

    panel.querySelectorAll('[data-phase2-preset]').forEach((btn) => {
      btn.onclick = () => {
        const v = btn.dataset.phase2Preset;
        const preset = v === 'director' ? FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_DIRECTOR : FOX_JUDGE_PHASE2_MULTI_OS;
        const ta = panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase2-prompt');
        ta.value = preset;
        const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
        newCfg.phase2Prompt = preset;
        foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
        toast(`✅ 第二阶段已填入预设：${v === 'director' ? '通用导演' : '多角色内心 OS'}`, 'success');
      };
    });

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-clear-cache').onclick = () => {
      foxJudgeInvalidateStaticCache();
      toast('🧹 已清空全部缓存', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-force-refresh').onclick = () => {
      foxJudgeInvalidateStaticCache();
      toast('🔄 缓存已清空，下次发送时第一阶段会重跑', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-cache-save').onclick = () => {
      const ta = panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-cache-viewer');
      const edited = ta?.value || '';
      const charId = getCurrentCharId();
      const existingCache = foxJudgeGetStaticCache(charId);
      foxJudgeSaveStaticCache(charId, {
        version: 2,
        char_id: charId,
        phase1_result: edited,
        strength: existingCache?.strength || foxJudgeReadConfig().strength,
        created_at: existingCache?.created_at || new Date().toISOString(),
        edited_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      });
      toast('✅ 第一阶段缓存已保存编辑', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-cache-refresh').onclick = () => {
      const ta = panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-phase1-cache-viewer');
      if (ta) {
        try {
          const c = foxJudgeGetStaticCache(getCurrentCharId());
          ta.value = c?.phase1_result || '（无缓存，下次发送时自动生成）';
        } catch { ta.value = '（读取失败）'; }
      }
      toast('🔄 已刷新第一阶段缓存显示', 'success');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-cache-enabled').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.cacheEnabled = e.target.checked;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      toast(e.target.checked ? '✅ 已启用第一阶段缓存' : '📴 已关闭缓存，每次都重跑第一阶段', e.target.checked ? 'success' : 'info');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-swipe-rethink').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.swipeRethink = e.target.checked;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners();
      toast(e.target.checked ? '✅ Swipe 时将重新思考' : '📴 Swipe 时不重新思考', e.target.checked ? 'success' : 'info');
    };

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-reroll-rethink').onchange = (e) => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.rerollRethink = e.target.checked;
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners();
      toast(e.target.checked ? '✅ Reroll 时将重新思考' : '📴 Reroll 时不重新思考', e.target.checked ? 'success' : 'info');
    };

    const foxjudgeMaxRetries = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-max-retries');
    if (foxjudgeMaxRetries) {
      foxjudgeMaxRetries.onchange = () => {
        const val = Math.max(0, Math.min(5, parseInt(foxjudgeMaxRetries.value) || 2));
        foxjudgeMaxRetries.value = val;
        const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
        newCfg.maxRetries = val;
        foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
        toast(`🔄 空回复重试次数已设为 ${val}`, 'info');
      };
    }

    const foxjudgeApiTypeSel = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-type');
    const foxjudgeModelSel = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-model-select');
    const foxjudgeModelInp = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-model');

    const foxjudgeSaveApiConfig = () => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      newCfg.apiType = foxjudgeApiTypeSel?.value || 'current';
      if (newCfg.apiType === 'custom') {
        newCfg.customApi.proxyPreset = '';
        newCfg.customApi.apiurl = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-url')?.value?.trim() || '';
        newCfg.customApi.key = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-key')?.value?.trim() || '';
        newCfg.customApi.model = foxjudgeModelInp?.value?.trim() || '';
        newCfg.customApi.source = newCfg.customApi.source || 'openai';
        newCfg.customApi.temperature = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-temp')?.value || '';
        newCfg.customApi.max_tokens = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-max-tokens')?.value || '';
        newCfg.customApi.top_p = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-top-p')?.value || '';
        newCfg.customApi.frequency_penalty = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-freq-pen')?.value || '';
        newCfg.customApi.presence_penalty = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-pres-pen')?.value || '';
      }
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
    };

    if (foxjudgeApiTypeSel) {
      foxjudgeApiTypeSel.onchange = () => {
        const isC = foxjudgeApiTypeSel.value === 'custom';
        const caSection = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-custom-api-section');
        if (caSection) caSection.style.display = isC ? 'block' : 'none';
        foxjudgeSaveApiConfig();
      };
    }

    if (foxjudgeModelSel && foxjudgeModelInp) {
      foxjudgeModelSel.onchange = () => {
        if (foxjudgeModelSel.value) {
          foxjudgeModelInp.value = foxjudgeModelSel.value;
          foxjudgeSaveApiConfig();
        }
      };
    }

    const foxjudgeFetchBtn = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-fetch-models');
    if (foxjudgeFetchBtn) {
      foxjudgeFetchBtn.onclick = async () => {
        const apiurl = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-url')?.value?.trim() || '';
        const key = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-key')?.value?.trim() || '';
        if (!apiurl) {
          toast('请先填写 API 地址', 'warning');
          return;
        }

        const oldText = foxjudgeFetchBtn.textContent;
        foxjudgeFetchBtn.textContent = '加载中…';
        foxjudgeFetchBtn.disabled = true;
        state.foxJudgeLoading = true;

        try {
          const getModelList = getFn('getModelList');
          let models = [];

          if (typeof getModelList === 'function') {
            models = await getModelList({
              apiurl: apiurl.replace(/\/+$/, ''),
              key: key || '',
            });
          } else {
            // 兜底：直接调用酒馆的 chat-completions/status
            const headers = SillyTavern?.getRequestHeaders?.() || {};
            const resp = await fetch('/api/backends/chat-completions/status', {
              method: 'POST',
              headers,
              body: JSON.stringify({
                reverse_proxy: apiurl,
                proxy_password: key || '',
                chat_completion_source: 'openai',
              }),
            });
            const json = await resp.json();
            models = (json?.data || []).map(x => String(x?.id ?? '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
          }

          models = [...new Set(models)].sort();
          state.foxJudgeModels = models;

          const selEl = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-model-select');
          if (selEl) {
            const currentModel = topDoc.getElementById('foxjudge-api-model')?.value?.trim() || '';
            selEl.innerHTML = '<option value="">（从列表选择）</option>' +
              models.map(m => `<option value="${escapeHtml(m)}" ${m === currentModel ? 'selected' : ''}>${escapeHtml(m)}</option>`).join('');
          }

          toast(
            models.length ? `✅ 已获取 ${models.length} 个模型` : '⚠️ 模型列表为空',
            models.length ? 'success' : 'warning'
          );
        } catch (err) {
          log('[狐裁] 获取模型失败', err);
          toast(`❌ 获取模型失败：${err?.message || err}`, 'error');
        } finally {
          state.foxJudgeLoading = false;
          foxjudgeFetchBtn.textContent = oldText;
          foxjudgeFetchBtn.disabled = false;
        }
      };
    }

    const foxjudgeApiInputs = [
      '#foxjudge-api-url', '#foxjudge-api-key', '#foxjudge-api-model',
      '#foxjudge-api-temp', '#foxjudge-api-max-tokens', '#foxjudge-api-top-p',
      '#foxjudge-api-freq-pen', '#foxjudge-api-pres-pen',
    ];
    foxjudgeApiInputs.forEach(id => {
      const el = topDoc.getElementById(id.replace('#', ''));
      if (el) el.onchange = foxjudgeSaveApiConfig;
    });

    const foxjudgeFilterCheckbox = panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-content-filter');
    if (foxjudgeFilterCheckbox) {
      foxjudgeFilterCheckbox.onchange = () => {
        const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
        if (!newCfg.filterSettings) newCfg.filterSettings = { ...FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS };
        newCfg.filterSettings.enableContentFilter = !!foxjudgeFilterCheckbox.checked;
        foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
      };
    }

    const foxjudgeFilterSave = () => {
      const newCfg = foxJudgeReadConfig();
      if (!newCfg.filterSettings) newCfg.filterSettings = { ...FOX_JUDGE_DEFAULT_FILTER_SETTINGS };
      newCfg.filterSettings.enableContentFilter = !!panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-content-filter')?.checked;
      newCfg.filterSettings.includeTagPairs = ssReadTagPairsEditor('foxjudge-inc', panel);
      newCfg.filterSettings.excludeTagPairs = ssReadTagPairsEditor('foxjudge-exc', panel);
      foxJudgeSaveConfig(newCfg);
    };

    panel.querySelectorAll('.foxjudge-inc-tag-start, .foxjudge-inc-tag-end, .foxjudge-exc-tag-start, .foxjudge-exc-tag-end').forEach(el => {
      el.onchange = foxjudgeFilterSave;
    });

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-filter-save')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      foxjudgeFilterSave();
      toast('✅ 狐裁标签过滤设置已保存', 'success');
    });

    panel.querySelector('#foxjudge-close').onclick = () => {
      xhGuideEnd();
      overlay.remove();
      panel.remove();
    };

    setTimeout(() => { try { applyMobilePanelFixNow?.(); } catch { } }, 50);
  }

  XH_GUIDE_TEXT.foxjudge = '🦊狐裁让 AI 在回复前先思考。第一阶段检查固定规则（可缓存，换卡自动失效），第二阶段每轮推演角色内心或规划剧情。思考结果用 think_fox~ 标签包裹，注入到主模型输出楼层顶部和提示词中（模型可见）。swipe/reroll 时拦截按钮先完成思维链思考，再释放按钮触发生成，不会乱删楼层。空回复/报错时自动重试。开启「仅第一阶段」快速模式可跳过第二阶段，只注入固定规则审查结果，swipe/reroll不拦截，正文直出。';

  XH_GUIDE_PANEL_STEPS.foxjudge = [
    { selector: '#foxjudge-enabled', text: '🦊这是总开关。打开后，AI 每次回复前都会先经过两阶段思考。关掉则完全不参与。' },
    { selector: '[data-strength]', text: '🦊思考强度：低=简短结论，高=详细分析。切换后第一阶段缓存会自动清空，下次发送时重跑。' },
    { selector: '#foxjudge-phase1-prompt', text: '🦊第一阶段的提示词。这里写的内容会用来审查抢话、人称、文风等固定规则。同角色卡只跑一次，换卡或改预设后自动重跑。直接编辑即可，改完自动保存并清空缓存。' },
    { selector: '[data-phase2-preset]', text: '🦊这两个按钮是预设模板。点"多角色内心 OS"会填入角色内心独白模板，点"通用导演"会填入导演分镜模板。点完后可以在下面文本框里继续修改。' },
    { selector: '#foxjudge-phase2-prompt', text: '🦊第二阶段的提示词。每轮必跑。你可以直接编辑内容，也可以先点上面的预设按钮填入模板再改。改完自动保存。' },
    { selector: '#foxjudge-custom-thinking', text: '🦊这里填写自定义思考要求。内容会注入到第二阶段思维链的「反套路规则」与最终思考指令之间。可以加额外的思考模块、流程或规则。留空则不注入。只影响第二阶段，不影响第一阶段。' },
    { selector: '#foxjudge-api-type', text: '🦊这里配置狐裁思维链用的 API。用酒馆当前 API 最省事；自定义 API 适合单独给狐裁配便宜或更擅长推理的模型。不影响主模型正常回复。' },
    { selector: '#foxjudge-clear-cache', text: '🦊清空所有角色卡的第一阶段缓存。清空后下次发送时第一阶段会重新跑。' },
    { selector: '#foxjudge-force-refresh', text: '🦊和上面效果一样，强制让第一阶段下次重跑。适合你改了角色卡但缓存没自动失效的情况。' },
  ];
