      </div>

      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-top:10px;padding:8px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <span style="font-size:12px;color:#a09088;">📋 大纲详细度：</span>
        <select id="foxmem-detail-level" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px;">
          <option value="concise" ${s.pushDetailLevel === 'concise' ? 'selected' : ''}>简洁</option>
          <option value="normal" ${s.pushDetailLevel === 'normal' ? 'selected' : ''}>适中</option>
          <option value="detailed" ${s.pushDetailLevel === 'detailed' ? 'selected' : ''}>详细</option>
        </select>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">字数上限：</span>
        <input id="foxmem-max-words" type="number" value="${s.pushMaxWords || 500}" min="100" max="5000" step="100" style="width:80px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:4px 6px;font-size:12px;">
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ====== 板块3：🏷️ 标签过滤配置 ====== -->
        ${(() => {
        const fs = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings(s);

        return `
        <details style="border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.018);padding:8px 10px;">
          <summary style="cursor:pointer;color:#f0a070;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;user-select:none;">
            🏷️ 狐忆上下文标签过滤
          </summary>

          <div style="font-size:11px;color:#90756a;line-height:1.6;margin:8px 0;">
            狐忆与狐构使用同一套上下文读取顺序。<br>
            固定读取顺序：charDescription → charPersonality → scenario → personaDescription → 狐析用户偏好 → worldInfoBefore → worldInfoAfter → chatHistory。<br>
            chatHistory 中用户消息不做标签过滤，AI/char 消息才会按这里的规则过滤。<br>
            默认删除 <code><stage_2_pre_output_check>...</stage_2_pre_output_check></code>、<code><stage_1_base_requirements>...</stage_1_base_requirements></code>。<br>
            默认删除 <code></think_fox~></code> 之前的全部内容。
          </div>

          <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="foxmem-content-filter" ${fs.enableContentFilter !== false ? 'checked' : ''}>
            启用狐忆标签过滤
          </label>

          ${ssCreateTagPairsEditorHtml(
          'foxmem-inc',
          '✅ 包含标签：只保留这些标签范围内的内容',
          fs.includeTagPairs,
          '一行是一组。左边开始标签，右边结束标签。'
        )}

          ${ssCreateTagPairsEditorHtml(
          'foxmem-exc',
          '❌ 排除标签：删除这些标签范围内的内容',
          fs.excludeTagPairs,
          '功能与包含标签相反。允许只填结束标签，例如结束填 </think_fox~> = 删除它之前所有内容。'
        )}
        </details>
      `;
      })()}


    <!-- ====== 板块4：🤖 分析 API 配置 ====== -->
    <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;">
      <div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;">🤖 分析 API 配置</div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 12px;">
        <div>
          <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">API 来源</label>
          <select id="foxmem-api-type" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">
            <option value="main" ${s.apiType === 'main' ? 'selected' : ''}>酒馆当前 API</option>
            <option value="custom" ${s.apiType === 'custom' ? 'selected' : ''}>自定义 OpenAI 兼容 API</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div id="foxmem-preset-mode-wrap" style="display:${isCustom ? 'block' : 'none'};">
          <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">预设模式</label>
          <select id="foxmem-preset-mode" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">
            <option value="custom" ${!s.customApi.proxyPreset ? 'selected' : ''}>直接配置</option>
            <option value="proxy" ${s.customApi.proxyPreset ? 'selected' : ''}>借用酒馆代理预设</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div id="foxmem-custom-api-section" style="display:${isCustom ? 'block' : 'none'};margin-top:10px;">
        <div id="foxmem-proxy-section" style="display:${s.customApi.proxyPreset ? 'block' : 'none'};">
          <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">目标代理预设</label>
          <select id="foxmem-proxy-preset" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">${presetOptionsHtml}</select>
        </div>

        <div id="foxmem-direct-section" style="display:${!s.customApi.proxyPreset ? 'block' : 'none'};">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 12px;">
            <div>
              <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">API 地址</label>
              <input id="foxmem-api-url" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.apiurl || '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">API Key</label>
              <input id="foxmem-api-key" type="password" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.key || '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 12px;margin-top:8px;">
          <div>
            <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">模型</label>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
              <input id="foxmem-api-model" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.model || '')}" style="flex:1;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">
              <button id="foxmem-fetch-models" style="padding:5px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;">${state.foxMemoryLoading ? '加载中…' : '获取'}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">模型列表</label>
            <select id="foxmem-api-model-select" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;">${modelOptionsHtml}</select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <details style="margin-top:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
          <summary style="cursor:pointer;padding:8px 10px;color:#f0a070;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;user-select:none;">⚙️ 高级参数</summary>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 12px;padding:10px;">
            <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">温度</label><input id="foxmem-api-temp" type="number" min="0" max="2" step="0.1" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.temperature ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
            <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">最大 token</label><input id="foxmem-api-max-tokens" type="number" min="0" step="128" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.max_tokens ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
            <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">Top P</label><input id="foxmem-api-top-p" type="number" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.top_p ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
            <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">频率惩罚</label><input id="foxmem-api-freq-pen" type="number" min="-2" max="2" step="0.01" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.frequency_penalty ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
            <div><label style="font-size:11px;color:#706058;">存在惩罚</label><input id="foxmem-api-pres-pen" type="number" min="-2" max="2" step="0.01" value="${escapeHtml(s.customApi.presence_penalty ?? '')}" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.15);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:5px 8px;font-size:12px;"></div>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ====== 板块5：📚 记忆管理 ====== -->
    <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;">
      <div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
        <span style="color:#f0a070;font-size:14px;">📚 记忆管理（共 ${memCount} 条）</span>
        <button id="foxmem-add-btn" style="padding:5px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;">➕ 新增</button>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">${catTabsHtml}</div>
      <input id="foxmem-search" type="text" placeholder="🔍 搜索关键词..." value="${escapeHtml(foxMemoryEditing.searchKeyword)}" style="width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:6px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:8px;box-sizing:border-box;">
      <div id="foxmemory-list" style="max-height:35vh;overflow-y:auto;"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ====== 板块6：💾 操作按钮 ====== -->
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <button id="foxmem-save-config" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.15);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">💾 保存全部配置</button>
      <button id="foxmem-export-btn" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">📤 导出</button>
      <button id="foxmem-import-btn" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">📥 导入</button>
      <button id="foxmem-clear-btn" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.15);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🗑️ 清空</button>
    </div>
    `;

    topDoc.body.appendChild(overlay);
    topDoc.body.appendChild(panel);
    xhGuideEnhancePanel(panel, 'foxmemory', '狐忆');

    // ===== 事件绑定 =====
    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-close').onclick = () => { xhGuideEnd(); overlay.remove(); panel.remove(); };
    ssBindTagPairsEditor('foxmem-inc', panel);
    ssBindTagPairsEditor('foxmem-exc', panel);
    const apiTypeSel = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-type');
    apiTypeSel.onchange = () => {
      const isC = apiTypeSel.value === 'custom';
      topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-preset-mode-wrap').style.display = isC ? 'block' : 'none';
      topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-custom-api-section').style.display = isC ? 'block' : 'none';
    };

    const presetModeSel = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-preset-mode');
    if (presetModeSel) {
      presetModeSel.onchange = () => {
        const isProxy = presetModeSel.value === 'proxy';
        topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-proxy-section').style.display = isProxy ? 'block' : 'none';
        topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-direct-section').style.display = isProxy ? 'none' : 'block';
      };
    }

    const modelSel = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-model-select');
    const modelInp = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-model');
    if (modelSel && modelInp) {
      modelSel.onchange = () => { if (modelSel.value) modelInp.value = modelSel.value; };
    }

    const fetchBtn = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-fetch-models');
    if (fetchBtn) {
      fetchBtn.onclick = async () => {
        const isProxyMode = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-preset-mode')?.value === 'proxy';
        let apiurl = '', key = '';
        if (isProxyMode) {
          const presetName = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-proxy-preset')?.value;
          if (!presetName) { toast('请先选择代理预设', 'warning'); return; }
          try {
            const p = getPreset(presetName);
            apiurl = p?.settings?.apiurl || '';
            key = p?.settings?.key || '';
          } catch (e) { toast('读取预设失败', 'error'); return; }
        } else {
          apiurl = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-url')?.value?.trim() || '';
          key = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-key')?.value?.trim() || '';
        }
        if (!apiurl) { toast('请填写 API 地址', 'warning'); return; }
        state.foxMemoryLoading = true;
        fetchBtn.textContent = '加载中…';
        fetchBtn.disabled = true;
        try {
          const getModelList = getFn('getModelList');
          let models = [];
          if (typeof getModelList === 'function') {
            models = await getModelList({ apiurl: apiurl.replace(/\/+$/, ''), key });
          } else {
            const headers = SillyTavern?.getRequestHeaders?.() || {};
            const resp = await fetch('/api/backends/chat-completions/status', {
              method: 'POST', headers,
              body: JSON.stringify({ reverse_proxy: apiurl, proxy_password: key, chat_completion_source: 'openai' })
            });
            const json = await resp.json();
            models = (json?.data || []).map(x => String(x?.id ?? '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
          }
          state.foxMemoryModels = [...new Set(models)].sort();
          const sel = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-model-select');
          if (sel) sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">（从列表选择）</option>' + state.foxMemoryModels.map(m => `<option value="${escapeHtml(m)}">${escapeHtml(m)}</option>`).join('');
          toast(state.foxMemoryModels.length ? `已获取 ${state.foxMemoryModels.length} 个模型` : '模型列表为空', state.foxMemoryModels.length ? 'success' : 'warning');
        } catch (e) { toast(`获取失败：${e.message}`, 'error'); } finally {
          state.foxMemoryLoading = false;
          fetchBtn.textContent = '获取';
          fetchBtn.disabled = false;
        }
      };
    }

    const foxmemCurrentPromptToggle = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-current-prompt-toggle');
    if (foxmemCurrentPromptToggle) {
      foxmemCurrentPromptToggle.onchange = () => {
        foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt = !!foxmemCurrentPromptToggle.checked;
        localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.FOX_MEMORY_INJECT_CURRENT_KEY, foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt ? 'true' : 'false');
        saveFoxMemoryConfig();

        toast(
          foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt
            ? '✅ 狐忆已开启：插入到当前提示词'
            : '📴 狐忆已关闭：不插入当前提示词',
          foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt ? 'success' : 'info'
        );
      };
    }

    const foxmemPresetInjectToggle = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-inject-toggle');
    if (foxmemPresetInjectToggle) {
      foxmemPresetInjectToggle.onchange = async () => {
        foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset = !!foxmemPresetInjectToggle.checked;
        saveFoxMemoryConfig();

        if (foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) {
          await foxMemorySyncToPreset(true);
          toast('✅ 狐忆已开启：注入到预设', 'success');
        } else {
          await foxMemoryDisablePresetInject();
          toast('📴 狐忆已关闭预设注入，并已关闭预设条目', 'info');
        }
      };
    }

    const fixedTortureTa = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-fixed-torture');
    if (fixedTortureTa) {
      fixedTortureTa.oninput = () => {
        state.foxPushTortureDraft = fixedTortureTa.value || '';
        localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.FOX_PUSH_TORTURE_KEY, state.foxPushTortureDraft);
      };
    }

    const autoModeSel = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-auto-mode');
    const autoIntervalInp = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-auto-interval');
    autoModeSel.onchange = () => { autoIntervalInp.style.display = autoModeSel.value === 'interval' ? 'inline-block' : 'none'; };

    // 保存配置
    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-save-config').onclick = () => {
      foxMemoryConfig.apiType = apiTypeSel.value;
      foxMemoryConfig.recallFloors = Math.max(1, parseInt(topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-recall').value) || 3);
      foxMemoryConfig.contextFloors = (() => {
        const v = parseInt(topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-context-floors')?.value);
        if (!Number.isFinite(v) || v < 0) return 0;
        return v;
      })();
      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.FOX_MEMORY_CONTEXT_FLOORS_KEY, String(foxMemoryConfig.contextFloors));
      foxMemoryConfig.autoMode = autoModeSel.value;
      foxMemoryConfig.autoInterval = Math.max(1, parseInt(autoIntervalInp.value) || 10);
      foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-inject-toggle').checked;
      foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-current-prompt-toggle')?.checked === true;
      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.FOX_MEMORY_INJECT_CURRENT_KEY, foxMemoryConfig.injectCurrentPrompt ? 'true' : 'false');

      foxMemoryConfig.autoPush = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-autopush-toggle').checked;

      state.foxPushTortureDraft = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-fixed-torture')?.value || '';
      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.FOX_PUSH_TORTURE_KEY, state.foxPushTortureDraft);

      foxMemoryConfig.combineWithHusou = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-combine-husou').checked;
      foxMemoryConfig.autoSend = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-auto-send').checked;
      foxMemoryConfig.pushMode = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-push-mode')?.value || 'guide';
      foxMemoryConfig.pushDetailLevel = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-detail-level').value;
      foxMemoryConfig.pushMaxWords = Math.max(100, parseInt(topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-max-words').value) || 500);
      const antiSycCb = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-anti-sycophant');
        if (antiSycCb) {
          antiSycCb.onchange = () => {
            foxMemoryConfig.antiSycophantEnabled = !!antiSycCb.checked;
            localStorage.setItem('SPreset_FoxMemoryAntiSycophant', foxMemoryConfig.antiSycophantEnabled ? 'true' : 'false');
            saveFoxMemoryConfig();
            toast(
              foxMemoryConfig.antiSycophantEnabled
                ? '✅ 已开启防媚 user：规则将内联注入推进提示词'
                : '📴 已关闭防媚 user',
              foxMemoryConfig.antiSycophantEnabled ? 'success' : 'info'
            );
          };
        }
      
      const nextTagFilter = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings({
        enableContentFilter: !!topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-content-filter')?.checked,
        includeTagPairs: ssReadTagPairsEditor('foxmem-inc', panel),
        excludeTagPairs: ssReadTagPairsEditor('foxmem-exc', panel),
      });

      foxMemoryConfig.enableContentFilter = nextTagFilter.enableContentFilter;
      foxMemoryConfig.includeTagPairs = nextTagFilter.includeTagPairs;
      foxMemoryConfig.excludeTagPairs = nextTagFilter.excludeTagPairs;

      // 兼容旧字段
      foxMemoryConfig.includeTagStarts = nextTagFilter.includeTagStarts;
      foxMemoryConfig.includeTagEnds = nextTagFilter.includeTagEnds;
      foxMemoryConfig.excludeTagStarts = nextTagFilter.excludeTagStarts;
      foxMemoryConfig.excludeTagEnds = nextTagFilter.excludeTagEnds;

      if (foxMemoryConfig.apiType === 'custom') {
        const presetMode = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-preset-mode')?.value;
        if (presetMode === 'proxy') {
          foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-proxy-preset')?.value || '';
          // 保留原 apiurl/key 作为回退，不清空
        } else {
          foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset = '';
          foxMemoryConfig.customApi.apiurl = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-url')?.value?.trim() || '';
          foxMemoryConfig.customApi.key = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-key')?.value?.trim() || '';
        }
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.model = modelInp?.value?.trim() || '';
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-temp')?.value || '';
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-max-tokens')?.value || '';
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-top-p')?.value || '';
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-freq-pen')?.value || '';
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-api-pres-pen')?.value || '';
      }

      saveFoxMemoryConfig();

      if (foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) {
        foxMemorySyncToPreset(true);
      } else {
        foxMemoryDisablePresetInject();
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.autoPush) registerFoxPushListener();
      else unregisterFoxPushListener();

      const dashAutoPushBtn = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dashboard');
      if (dashAutoPushBtn) {
        try { updateStatusChip?.(); } catch { }
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.autoMode !== 'manual') registerFoxMemoryAutoListener();
      else unregisterFoxMemoryAutoListener();

      toast('✅ 配置已保存', 'success');
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-analyze-now').onclick = () => foxMemoryAnalyzeNow();

    const manualInjectBtn = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-manual-inject');
    if (manualInjectBtn) {
      manualInjectBtn.onclick = async () => {
        try {
          foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset = !!topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-inject-toggle')?.checked;
          saveFoxMemoryConfig();

          if (!foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) {
            await foxMemoryDisablePresetInject();
            toast('🧹 已关闭预设注入', 'info');
            return;
          }

          await foxMemorySyncToPreset(true);
          toast('✅ 已手动同步狐忆到预设', 'success');
        } catch (e) {
          log('[狐忆] 手动同步失败:', e);
          toast(`❌ 手动同步失败：${e.message || e}`, 'error');
        }
      };
    }

    panel.querySelectorAll('.foxmem-cat-tab').forEach(btn => {
      btn.onclick = () => {
        foxMemoryEditing.selectedCategory = btn.dataset.cat;
        panel.querySelectorAll('.foxmem-cat-tab').forEach(b => {
          const isActive = b.dataset.cat === foxMemoryEditing.selectedCategory;
          b.style.borderColor = isActive ? 'rgba(232,120,74,0.5)' : 'rgba(232,120,74,0.2)';
          b.style.background = isActive ? 'rgba(232,120,74,0.15)' : 'rgba(232,120,74,0.03)';
        });
        foxMemoryRenderList();
      };
    });

    const searchInp = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-search');
    searchInp.oninput = () => { foxMemoryEditing.searchKeyword = searchInp.value; foxMemoryRenderList(); };

    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-add-btn').onclick = () => foxMemoryOpenEditDialog(null);

    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-export-btn').onclick = () => {
      const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
      const json = JSON.stringify({ charId: getCurrentCharId(), memories, exportedAt: new Date().toISOString() }, null, 2);
      const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = topDoc.createElement('a');
      a.href = url; a.download = `foxmemory_${getCurrentCharId()}_${Date.now()}.json`; a.click();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      toast('📤 已导出', 'success');
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-import-btn').onclick = () => {
      const inp = topDoc.createElement('input');
      inp.type = 'file'; inp.accept = 'application/json';
      inp.onchange = async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files?.[0];
        if (!file) return;
        try {
          const text = await file.text();
          const data = JSON.parse(text);
          if (!data.memories || !Array.isArray(data.memories)) { toast('❌ 格式错误', 'error'); return; }
          const ok = topWindow?.confirm ? topWindow.confirm(`导入 ${data.memories.length} 条？`) : true;
          const current = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
          const merged = ok ? [...data.memories, ...current] : data.memories;
          foxMemorySave(merged);
          if (foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) foxMemorySyncToPreset();
          foxMemoryRenderList(); foxMemoryRenderStats();
          toast(`📥 已导入 ${data.memories.length} 条`, 'success');
        } catch (err) { toast(`❌ 导入失败：${err.message}`, 'error'); }
      };
      inp.click();
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-clear-btn').onclick = () => {
      const ok = topWindow?.confirm ? topWindow.confirm('⚠️ 清空当前角色卡当前聊天的所有记忆？\n\n包括：记忆库、防媚user裁决残留、预设注入残留。') : true;
      if (!ok) return;
      foxMemorySave([]);
      // 清除防媚user裁决残留
      try { localStorage.removeItem('SPreset_FoxMemory_AntiSycophant_Last'); } catch {}
      // 清除预设注入残留
      if (foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) foxMemorySyncToPreset();
      foxMemoryRenderList(); foxMemoryRenderStats();
      toast('🗑️ 已清空记忆库及关联残留', 'success');
    };

    foxMemoryRenderStats();
    foxMemoryRenderList();

    setTimeout(() => { try { applyMobilePanelFixNow?.(); } catch (e) { } }, 50);
  }

  // ==================== 防媚 user 裁决：结果存取 ====================

  function foxMemoryGetLastAntiSycophantResult() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem('SPreset_FoxMemory_AntiSycophant_Last');
      if (!raw) return null;
      return JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  function foxMemorySetLastAntiSycophantResult(result) {
    try {
      if (!result) {
        localStorage.removeItem('SPreset_FoxMemory_AntiSycophant_Last');
        return;
      }
      // 只存可序列化的字段
      const slim = {
        level: result.level || '合理',
        reason: result.reason || '',
        execution: result.execution || '',
        summary: result.summary || '',
        created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
      localStorage.setItem('SPreset_FoxMemory_AntiSycophant_Last', JSON.stringify(slim));
    } catch (e) { log('[防媚user] 保存裁决结果失败', e); }
  }

  // ============= 🆕 批次 3C：🦊 推进 + 分析 核心逻辑 =============

  // 🆕 正文内容过滤器（精确标签匹配版）
  // 规则：
  // 1. 开始标签和结束标签都按“用户输入的原文”精确匹配
  // 2. 填 <content> 就匹配 <content>
  // 3. 填 </content> 就匹配 </content>
  // 4. 不再自动补尖括号，不再吃掉任何角
  // 5. 多个标签用换行分隔，开始和结束按行一一对应
  function foxMemoryParsePairs(startText, endText) {
    const starts = String(startText || '')
      .split('\n')
      .map(l => l.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);

    const ends = String(endText || '')
      .split('\n')
      .map(l => l.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);

    const max = Math.max(starts.length, ends.length);
    const pairs = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < max; i++) {
      pairs.push({
        start: starts[i] || '',
        end: ends[i] || '',
      });
    }

    return pairs;
  }

  function foxMemoryEscapeRe(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  }

  function foxMemoryMergeRanges(ranges) {
    const arr = ranges
      .filter(r => Array.isArray(r) && r.length === 2 && r[0] < r[1])
      .sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);

    if (!arr.length) return [];

    const merged = [arr[0]];

    for (let i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
      const last = merged[merged.length - 1];
      const cur = arr[i];

      if (cur[0] <= last[1]) {
        last[1] = Math.max(last[1], cur[1]);
      } else {
        merged.push(cur);
      }
    }

    return merged;
  }

  function foxMemoryRemoveRanges(text, ranges) {
    const merged = foxMemoryMergeRanges(ranges);
    if (!merged.length) return String(text || '');

    let result = '';
    let last = 0;

    for (const [s, e] of merged) {
      if (s > last) result += text.slice(last, s);
      last = Math.max(last, e);
    }

    result += text.slice(last);
    return result;
  }

  function foxMemoryFindExactRanges(text, startTag, endTag, mode = 'include') {
    const raw = String(text || '');
    const ranges = [];

    const start = String(startTag || '');
    const end = String(endTag || '');

    // 开始 + 结束：include 取中间内容；exclude 连标签一起排除
    if (start && end) {
      let pos = 0;

      while (pos < raw.length) {
        const sIdx = raw.indexOf(start, pos);
        if (sIdx < 0) break;

        const contentStart = sIdx + start.length;
        const eIdx = raw.indexOf(end, contentStart);
        if (eIdx < 0) break;

        if (mode === 'exclude') {
          ranges.push([sIdx, eIdx + end.length]);
        } else {
          ranges.push([contentStart, eIdx]);
        }

        pos = eIdx + end.length;
      }

      return ranges;
    }

    // 只填开始标签：include 从标签后取到末尾；exclude 从标签本体排到末尾
    if (start && !end) {
      const sIdx = raw.indexOf(start);

      if (sIdx >= 0) {
        if (mode === 'exclude') {
          ranges.push([sIdx, raw.length]);
        } else {
          ranges.push([sIdx + start.length, raw.length]);
        }
      }

      return ranges;
    }

    // 只填结束标签：include 从开头取到标签前；exclude 从开头排到标签本体结束
    if (!start && end) {
      const eIdx = raw.indexOf(end);

      if (eIdx >= 0) {
        if (mode === 'exclude') {
          ranges.push([0, eIdx + end.length]);
        } else {
          ranges.push([0, eIdx]);
        }
      }

      return ranges;
    }

    return ranges;
  }

  function foxMemoryApplyExcludeToChunk(fullText, chunkStart, chunkEnd, excludeRanges) {
    const localRanges = [];

    for (const [s, e] of excludeRanges) {
      const ss = Math.max(s, chunkStart);
      const ee = Math.min(e, chunkEnd);

      if (ss < ee) {
        localRanges.push([ss - chunkStart, ee - chunkStart]);
      }
    }

    const chunk = fullText.slice(chunkStart, chunkEnd);
    return foxMemoryRemoveRanges(chunk, localRanges).trim();
  }

  function foxMemoryFilterContent(rawMessage) {
    const raw = String(rawMessage || '');
    if (!raw.trim()) return '';

    foxMemoryConfig = ssNormalizeTagFilterSettings(foxMemoryConfig);

    return ssFilterByTagPairs(raw, foxMemoryConfig, {
      // 狐忆严格过滤：配置了包含标签但没匹配到，就不读该段，避免污染记忆库
      fallbackToFullText: false,
    });
  }

  // 🆕 获取聊天记录：只读真正聊天楼层，不乱读世界书列表
  function foxMemoryGetFullContext(floors = 'all') {
    const parts = [];

    const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
    const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');

    if (!gcm || !glmi) return '';

    const lastId = glmi();
    if (lastId < 0) return '';

    let range;

    if (floors === 'all') {
      range = `0-${lastId}`;
    } else {
      const n = Math.max(1, parseInt(floors) || 50);
      const sid = Math.max(0, lastId - n + 1);
      range = `${sid}-${lastId}`;
    }

    const ms = gcm(range, { hide_state: 'unhidden' }) || [];

    for (const m of ms) {
      if (!m || m.is_hidden) continue;

      const role = m.role === 'user'
        ? '用户'
        : (m.role === 'assistant' ? 'AI' : '系统');

      const name = m.name ? `/${m.name}` : '';

      let text = '';

      if (m.role === 'user') {
        // 狐忆：用户消息不做标签过滤
        text = String(m.message || '').trim();
      } else {
        // 狐忆：AI/char 消息才做标签过滤
        text = foxMemoryFilterContent(m.message || '');
      }

      if (!text.trim()) continue;

      parts.push(`【第${m.message_id}楼 ${role}${name}】\n${text}`);
    }

    return parts.join('\n\n').trim();
  }

  function foxMemoryGetRecentContext(floors) {
    return foxMemoryGetFullContext(floors || 50);
  }

  function foxMemoryGetRecallContext() {
    const gcm = getFn('getChatMessages');
    const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
    if (!gcm || !glmi) return '';
    const lastId = glmi();
    if (lastId < 0) return '';
    const sid = Math.max(0, lastId - (foxMemoryConfig.recallFloors || 3) + 1);
    const ms = gcm(`${sid}-${lastId}`);
    return ms.filter(m => !m.is_hidden).map(m => {
      const name = m.role === 'user' ? '用户' : (m.name || m.role);

      const text = m.role === 'user'
        ? String(m.message || '').trim()
        : foxMemoryFilterContent(m.message || '');

      return `[${name}] ${text}`;
    }).filter(x => x.trim()).join('\n');
  }

  function foxMemoryGetAllAsText() {
    const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
    if (!memories.length) return '（当前记忆库为空）';
    return memories.map(m => {
      const cat = FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES.find(c => c.id === m.category) || { label: m.category };
      const timeStr = m.eventTime ? `（${m.eventTime}）` : '';
      return `【${cat.label}】${m.title}${timeStr}\n${m.content}${m.keywords?.length ? `\n关键词：${m.keywords.join('、')}` : ''}`;
    }).join('\n\n');
  }

  // ==================== 狐忆解析安全工具 ====================
  // 解决：
  // - 【关键词】贪婪截取，把任务标题/分割线吃进去
  // - 多个 === 新增记忆 === 时解析错区间
  // - AI 输出了 ==================== 这种分割线时污染条目

  function foxMemoryCleanParsedField(text) {
    return String(text || '')
      .replace(/^\s*=+\s*$/gm, '')
      .replace(/^\s*任务[一二三四五六七八九十]+[:：][\s\S]*$/gm, '')
      .replace(/^\s*====================\s*$/gm, '')
      .trim();
  }

  function foxMemoryExtractField(block, label) {
    const raw = String(block || '');
    const re = new RegExp(`【${label}】\\s*([\\s\\S]*?)(?=\\n【[^】]+】|\\n===|\\n---+|\\n=+\\s*$|$)`);
    const m = raw.match(re);
    return foxMemoryCleanParsedField(m?.[1] || '');
  }

  function foxMemoryExtractKeywords(block) {
    const kwText = foxMemoryExtractField(block, '关键词');

    if (!kwText) return [];

    return kwText
      .split(/[,，、;；\n\r\t ]+/)
      .map(x => x.trim())
      .filter(Boolean)
      .filter(x => {
        // 过滤明显不是关键词的污染内容
        if (/^=+$/.test(x)) return false;
        if (/^任务[一二三四五六七八九十]+[:：]?/.test(x)) return false;
        if (/新增记忆|修正指令|情节摘要|物品\/场景|世界观设定/.test(x)) return false;
        if (x.length > 40) return false;
        return true;
      });
  }

  function foxMemoryExtractAllNewMemoryBlocks(fullText) {
    const raw = String(fullText || '');
    const blocks = [];

    // 直接按每个【类别】条目抓，而不是依赖 “=== 新增记忆 ===” 的大区间。
    // 这样即使 AI 输出多个新增记忆区，也不会把任务说明吃进去。
    const re = /【类别】[\s\S]*?(?=\n---+|\n【类别】|\n===\s*修正指令\s*===|\n===\s*情节摘要[\s\S]*?===|\n===\s*新增记忆\s*===|$)/g;

    let m;
    while ((m = re.exec(raw)) !== null) {
      const block = String(m[0] || '').trim();

      if (!block) continue;
      if (!/【标题】/.test(block)) continue;
      if (!/【内容】/.test(block)) continue;

      blocks.push(block);
    }

    return blocks;
  }

  function foxMemoryExtractFixBlocks(fullText) {
    const raw = String(fullText || '');
    const fixSection = raw.split(/===\s*修正指令\s*===/).pop() || '';

    if (!fixSection || /无需修正/.test(fixSection)) return [];

    const blocks = fixSection
      .split(/---+/)
      .map(x => x.trim())
      .filter(Boolean)
      .filter(x => /【修正类型】/.test(x) && /【目标标题】/.test(x));

    return blocks;
  }

  function foxMemoryGetHusouContext() {
    try {
      // 推进时结合狐搜，只读取当前角色卡 localStorage。
      // 不再读取 char.personality，避免用户清空 localStorage 后仍然读到旧残留。
      if (typeof husouLoadLocalText === 'function') {
        const localText = husouLoadLocalText();

        if (localText?.trim()) {
          return ssBuildSearchResultsInject(localText.trim());
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐忆推进] 读取狐搜 localStorage 失败', e);
    }

    return '';
  }

  async function foxMemoryCallApi(messages, opts = {}) {
    const gr = getFn('generateRaw');
    if (typeof gr !== 'function') throw new Error('无 generateRaw');

    const ordered_prompts = Array.isArray(messages)
      ? messages
      : [
        {
          role: 'system',
          content: String(messages?.system || ''),
        },
        {
          role: 'user',
          content: String(messages?.user || ''),
        },
      ];

    const rawParams = {
      should_silence: true,
      should_stream: false,
      max_chat_history: 0,
      ordered_prompts,
      ...opts,
    };

    const useCustom =
      foxMemoryConfig.apiType === 'custom' &&
      (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.apiurl || foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset);

    if (useCustom) {
      const customApi = {
        apiurl: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.apiurl || undefined,
        key: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.key || undefined,
        model: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.model || undefined,
        source: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.source || 'openai',
      };

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset) {
        customApi.proxy_preset = foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset;
        delete customApi.apiurl;
        delete customApi.key;
      }

      if (
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature !== '' &&
        !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature))
      ) {
        customApi.temperature = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature);
      }

      if (
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens !== '' &&
        !isNaN(parseInt(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens))
      ) {
        customApi.max_tokens = parseInt(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens);
      }

      if (
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p !== '' &&
        !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p))
      ) {
        customApi.top_p = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p);
      }

      if (
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty !== '' &&
        !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty))
      ) {
        customApi.frequency_penalty = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty);
      }

      if (
        foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty !== '' &&
        !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty))
      ) {
        customApi.presence_penalty = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty);
      }

      rawParams.custom_api = customApi;
    }

    const r = await gr(rawParams);
    return typeof r === 'string' ? r : (r?.content || '');
  }
  async function foxMemoryAnalyzeNow() {
    if (state.foxAnalyzing || ssIsTaskRunning('fox_memory_analyze')) {
      ssCancelTask('fox_memory_analyze', '狐忆分析');
      state.foxAnalyzing = false;
      ssEndTask('fox_memory_analyze');
      return;
    }

    const glmi = getFn('getLastMessageId');
    if (!glmi) {
      toast('❌ 缺少 getLastMessageId', 'error');
      return;
    }

    const lastId = glmi();

    if (lastId < 0) {
      toast('⚠️ 无聊天记录', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    state.foxAnalyzing = true;
    ssStartTask('fox_memory_analyze', '狐忆分析');

    let analyzeToast = null;

    try {
      const t = topWindow?.toastr || window.toastr;
      if (t?.info) {
        analyzeToast = ssTaskToast('fox_memory_analyze', '🦊 狐忆分析中……');
      }
    } catch { }


    try {
      // 狐忆和狐构完全一致：固定插入以下上下文
      // char_description → persona_description → world_info_before → world_info_after → chatHistory
      // 插入位置就是【上下文开始】和【上下文结束】中间。
      const fixedContextPrompts = ssBuildFixedContextOrderedPrompts(foxMemoryConfig);

      const memories = foxMemoryGetCurrent();
      const allPlotRanges = foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangesUpToMessageId(lastId);

      const plotChunks = foxMemorySortPlotChunks(
        memories.filter(foxMemoryIsPlotChunk)
      );

      // 修复：otherMemories 未定义。
      // 这里只放人物/物品/场景/概念/设定等非剧情摘要记忆。
      const otherMemories = memories.filter(m => m.category !== 'plot');

      const existingPlotIds = new Set(plotChunks.map(m => m.id));

      const currentRangeByLastId = foxMemoryGetPlotChunkRangeByMessageId(lastId);

      let targetPlotRanges = allPlotRanges.filter(r => !existingPlotIds.has(r.id));

      // 关键：
      // 1. 第一次中途开启狐忆时，必须从 0-9、10-19、20-29……一路补齐。
      // 2. 如果前面都已经有了，也必须持续更新当前所在块，例如 30-39。
      // 3. 当前块没满也允许更新，后续聊天继续刷新这个块。
      if (!targetPlotRanges.some(r => r.id === currentRangeByLastId.id)) {
        targetPlotRanges.push(currentRangeByLastId);
      }

      targetPlotRanges = [...new Map(targetPlotRanges.map(r => [r.id, r])).values()]
        .sort((a, b) => a.start - b.start);

      const currentChunkRange = targetPlotRanges[0] || currentRangeByLastId;

      const previousPlotChunks = plotChunks
        .filter(m => {
          const r = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(m);
          return r && r.end < currentChunkRange.start;
        })
        .slice(-3);

      const legacyPlotMemory = memories.find(m => m.id === 'plot_summary');

      const plotIndexText = plotChunks.length
        ? plotChunks.map(m => {
          const r = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(m);
          return `- ${r ? `第${r.start}-${r.end}楼` : (m.eventTime || '')}：${m.title}`;
        }).join('\n')
        : '（暂无剧情摘要分块）';

      const targetRangesText = targetPlotRanges.length
        ? targetPlotRanges.map(r => {
          const availableEnd = Math.min(r.end, lastId);
          const partialHint = r.end > lastId
            ? `当前只出现到第${availableEnd}楼，后续第${availableEnd + 1}-${r.end}楼尚未发生，禁止编造，后续分析继续更新本板块。`
            : `该板块楼层已完整出现。`;

          return `- ${r.title}｜范围：第${r.start}-${r.end}楼｜${partialHint}`;
        }).join('\n')
        : `- ${currentChunkRange.title}｜范围：第${currentChunkRange.start}-${currentChunkRange.end}楼`;

      const targetOldText = targetPlotRanges.length
        ? targetPlotRanges.map(r => {
          const old = plotChunks.find(m => m.id === r.id);
          return `【${r.title}】\n${old?.content?.trim() || '（该板块尚无摘要）'}`;
        }).join('\n\n')
        : '（暂无本次目标板块旧内容）';

      const previousPlotText = previousPlotChunks.length
        ? previousPlotChunks.map(m => {
          const r = foxMemoryParseChunkRange(m);
          return `【${m.title || `第${r?.start}-${r?.end}楼`}】\n${m.content || ''}`;
        }).join('\n\n')
        : '（暂无前序剧情摘要分块）';

      const legacyPlotText = legacyPlotMemory?.content?.trim()
        ? `

【旧版未分块剧情摘要】
下面是旧版单块剧情摘要，只能作为迁移参考。
禁止全文照抄，禁止重新输出全部旧摘要。
如果本次目标板块与旧摘要有关，只抽取必要信息用于当前分块衔接。

${foxMemoryClip(legacyPlotMemory.content, 3000)}`
        : '';

      const plotText = `【本次必须补齐/更新的剧情摘要板块】
${targetRangesText}

【本次目标板块旧内容】
${targetOldText}

【相邻前序板块，仅用于时间线衔接，禁止重写】
${previousPlotText}

【已有剧情摘要板块索引】
${plotIndexText}${legacyPlotText}`;

      const otherText = otherMemories.length
        ? otherMemories.map(m => {
          const cat = FOX_MEMORY_CATEGORIES.find(c => c.id === m.category) || { label: m.category };
          const timeStr = m.eventTime ? `（${m.eventTime}）` : '';
          return `【${cat.label}】${m.title}${timeStr}\n${m.content}${m.keywords?.length ? `\n关键词：${m.keywords.join('、')}` : ''}`;
        }).join('\n\n')
        : '（暂无其他记忆）';

      const system = `你是长期记忆库管理助手。你必须维护一个结构化长期记忆库。
请根据上下文中的完整内容，同步更新长期记忆库。

你必须读取并参考：
- 角色卡信息
- 玩家 persona 信息
- 狐析用户偏好条目
- World Info before
- World Info after
- chatHistory 中的剧情、作者注释、深度世界书条目

禁止只根据最新用户消息分析。
禁止忽略世界书。
禁止忽略用户偏好。
`;

      const preContextPrompt = `${system}

【上下文开始】`;

      const finalPrompt = `【上下文结束】

【当前已储存的情节摘要】
${plotText}

【当前已储存的角色/物品/场景/概念记忆】
${otherText}


你的任务分为三类，必须全部完成：

1. 更新【剧情时间线摘要】
2. 更新【主要角色长期档案】
3. 更新【物品/场景/概念/世界观设定】等零散记忆

====================
任务一：补齐/更新剧情摘要分块
====================

剧情摘要必须按楼层分块保存，不允许再输出一整块无限增长的全文摘要。

【本次必须输出的板块列表】
${targetRangesText}

硬性规则：
1. 必须从最早缺失的剧情摘要板块开始补齐，禁止跳过前面的楼层直接总结最新楼层。
2. 每个剧情摘要板块固定按 10 楼一个单位保存，例如：0-9、10-19、20-29、30-39。
3. 如果当前板块还没满 10 楼，也可以提前写这个板块；但只能写已经发生的楼层，未发生的楼层禁止编造。
4. 当前板块后续还会被继续更新，直到进入下一个 10 楼单位。
5. 每个板块只能总结自己范围内的楼层内容。
6. 所有板块必须严格按楼层顺序、剧情时间顺序排列。
7. 每个板块内部也必须按时间顺序写。
8. 每个事件用 1-3 句话概括，只保留关键转折、重要对话核心、关系变化、位置变化、秘密揭露。
9. 不写环境描写堆砌、动作细节、情绪渲染。
10. 每个板块尽量控制在 300-800 字以内。
11. 禁止输出全部剧情摘要，禁止把所有板块合并成一整块。
12. 禁止把“最新一楼”当成整个剧情摘要。
13. 如果本次需要输出多个板块，必须用 --- 分隔。
14. 如果本次只有一个板块，也必须使用同样格式。

【关键词要求】
关键词必须是该板块内真实发生的剧情关键词，例如角色名、地点、组织、物品、关系变化、冲突事件、秘密、任务目标。
禁止把“剧情摘要”“剧情分块”“第20-29楼”“楼层”“摘要”这类元信息当关键词。

输出格式：

=== 剧情摘要分块 ===
---
【板块】剧情摘要｜第0-9楼
【范围起点】0
【范围终点】9
【内容】
（这里只写第0-9楼的剧情摘要，按时间顺序排列）
【关键词】角色名、地点、冲突事件、重要物品、关系变化
---
【板块】剧情摘要｜第10-19楼
【范围起点】10
【范围终点】19
【内容】
（这里只写第10-19楼的剧情摘要，按时间顺序排列）
【关键词】角色名、地点、冲突事件、重要物品、关系变化
---
