  function pwReadConfigFromPanel() {
    const $ = id => topDoc.getElementById(id);
    const panel = $('pw-panel');
    if (!panel) return;

    pwState.config.enabled = !!$('pw-enabled')?.checked;
    pwState.config.autoMode = $('pw-auto-mode')?.value || 'manual';
    pwState.config.autoInterval = Math.max(1, parseInt($('pw-auto-interval')?.value) || 5);

    // 兼容旧字段
    pwState.config.autoAdvance = pwState.config.autoMode !== 'manual';

    // ✅ 推进模式 / 动态推进上限 / 聊天楼层上限
    const advRaw = $('pw-advance-mode')?.value;
    pwState.config.advanceMode = advRaw === 'legacy_full' ? 'legacy_full' : 'two_phase';
    pwState.config.dynamicMaxModules = Math.max(1, Math.min(24, parseInt($('pw-dynamic-max')?.value) || 4));

    const chlRaw = String($('pw-chat-history-limit')?.value || '').trim();
    if (!chlRaw || /^all$/i.test(chlRaw)) {
      pwState.config.chatHistoryLimit = '';
    } else {
      const n = parseInt(chlRaw);
      pwState.config.chatHistoryLimit = Number.isFinite(n) && n > 0 ? n : '';
    }

    pwState.config.moduleCount = Math.max(3, Math.min(24, parseInt($('pw-module-count')?.value) || 8));
    pwState.config.detailLevel = $('pw-detail-level')?.value || 'normal';
    pwState.config.summaryMaxChars = Math.max(80, Math.min(800, parseInt($('pw-summary-max')?.value) || 220));
    pwState.config.maxInjectModules = Math.max(1, Math.min(50, parseInt($('pw-max-inject-modules')?.value) || 8));
    pwState.config.maxInjectChars = Math.max(3000, Math.min(30000, parseInt($('pw-max-inject-chars')?.value) || 9000));
    pwState.config.impactMode = $('pw-impact-mode')?.value || 'strong';
    pwState.config.maxUrgentEvents = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, parseInt($('pw-max-urgent-events')?.value) || 3));
    pwState.config.autoDelayMs = Math.max(300, Math.min(20000, parseInt($('pw-auto-delay')?.value) || 1500));
    pwState.config.userGuide = $('pw-user-guide')?.value || '';

    pwState.config.apiType = $('pw-api-type')?.value || 'current';

    if (!pwState.config.customApi) pwState.config.customApi = { ...PW_DEFAULT_CONFIG.customApi };

    pwState.config.customApi.proxyPreset = $('pw-proxy-preset')?.value || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.apiurl = $('pw-api-url')?.value?.trim() || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.key = $('pw-api-key')?.value?.trim() || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.model = $('pw-model')?.value?.trim() || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.temperature = $('pw-temperature')?.value || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.max_tokens = $('pw-max-tokens')?.value || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.top_p = $('pw-top-p')?.value || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.frequency_penalty = $('pw-freq-pen')?.value || '';
    pwState.config.customApi.presence_penalty = $('pw-pres-pen')?.value || '';

    // 🏷️ 同步标签过滤设置（如果当前 DOM 里能读到，就一起保存；读不到则保留旧值）
    try {
      const filterCb = $('pw-content-filter');
      if (filterCb) {
        pwState.config.enableContentFilter = !!filterCb.checked;
      }
      const incRows = panel.querySelectorAll?.('.pw-inc-tag-row') || [];
      const excRows = panel.querySelectorAll?.('.pw-exc-tag-row') || [];
      if (incRows.length || excRows.length) {
        pwState.config.includeTagPairs = ssReadTagPairsEditor('pw-inc', panel);
        pwState.config.excludeTagPairs = ssReadTagPairsEditor('pw-exc', panel);
        pwState.config.includeTagStarts = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.includeTagPairs, 'start');
        pwState.config.includeTagEnds = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.includeTagPairs, 'end');
        pwState.config.excludeTagStarts = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.excludeTagPairs, 'start');
        pwState.config.excludeTagEnds = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.excludeTagPairs, 'end');
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[平行世界] 同步标签过滤设置失败', e);
    }

    pwSaveConfig();

    if (pwState.config.autoMode !== 'manual') {
      pwRegisterAutoListener();
    } else {
      pwUnregisterAutoListener();
    }

    // 保存时也同步一次 UI，避免“每隔 N 次”输入框在非 interval 模式下残留显示
    try {
      const wrap = topDoc.getElementById('pw-auto-interval-wrap');
      if (wrap) {
        wrap.style.display = pwState.config.autoMode === 'interval' ? 'flex' : 'none';
      }
    } catch { }
  }

  function pwBindPanelEvents() {
    const $ = id => topDoc.getElementById(id);

    $('pw-close').onclick = () => {
      xhGuideEnd();
      topDoc.getElementById('pw-overlay')?.remove();
      topDoc.getElementById('pw-panel')?.remove();
    };

    $('pw-open-state').onclick = () => pwToggleMiniBubble();
    // ✅ 平行世界自动推进模式：完全复刻狐忆 autoMode / interval 显隐逻辑
    const pwAutoModeSel = $('pw-auto-mode');
    const pwAutoIntervalWrap = $('pw-auto-interval-wrap');
    const pwAutoIntervalInp = $('pw-auto-interval');

    const pwSyncAutoIntervalVisibility = () => {
      if (!pwAutoModeSel || !pwAutoIntervalWrap) return;

      const mode = pwAutoModeSel.value || 'manual';

      // 关键：只有 interval 显示，其余 manual / auto 一律隐藏
      pwAutoIntervalWrap.style.display = mode === 'interval' ? 'flex' : 'none';
    };

    if (pwAutoModeSel) {
      pwAutoModeSel.onchange = () => {
        pwSyncAutoIntervalVisibility();
        pwReadConfigFromPanel();

        const mode = pwAutoModeSel.value || 'manual';
        const n = Math.max(1, parseInt(pwAutoIntervalInp?.value) || 5);

        if (mode === 'manual') {
          pwState.autoCounter = 0;
          pwState.lastAutoMessageId = null;
        }

        toast(
          mode === 'manual'
            ? '📴 平行世界自动推进：仅手动'
            : mode === 'auto'
              ? '✅ 平行世界自动推进：每次合格回复后自动推进'
              : `✅ 平行世界自动推进：每隔 ${n} 次合格回复后自动推进`,
          mode === 'manual' ? 'info' : 'success'
        );
      };
    }

    if (pwAutoIntervalInp) {
      const savePwInterval = () => {
        const v = Math.max(1, parseInt(pwAutoIntervalInp.value) || 5);
        pwAutoIntervalInp.value = String(v);
        pwReadConfigFromPanel();
        pwSyncAutoIntervalVisibility();

        toast(`✅ 平行世界自动推进间隔已保存：每 ${v} 次合格回复`, 'success');
      };

      pwAutoIntervalInp.onchange = savePwInterval;
      pwAutoIntervalInp.onblur = savePwInterval;
    }

    // 初次打开面板时也强制同步一次，避免旧 DOM / 旧配置导致 interval 框残留显示
    pwSyncAutoIntervalVisibility();

    // ✅ 推进模式切换：联动"动态推进上限"输入框的显隐 + 联动两个动态推进按钮的可用性
    const pwAdvanceModeSel = $('pw-advance-mode');
    const pwDynamicMaxWrap = $('pw-dynamic-max-wrap');
    const pwDynamicMaxInp = $('pw-dynamic-max');
    const pwChatHistoryLimitInp = $('pw-chat-history-limit');

    const pwSyncAdvanceModeVisibility = () => {
      if (!pwAdvanceModeSel) return;
      const mode = pwAdvanceModeSel.value || 'two_phase';
      if (pwDynamicMaxWrap) {
        pwDynamicMaxWrap.style.display = mode === 'legacy_full' ? 'none' : 'flex';
      }
      pwUpdateRunButton?.();
    };

    if (pwAdvanceModeSel) {
      pwAdvanceModeSel.onchange = () => {
        pwReadConfigFromPanel();
        pwSyncAdvanceModeVisibility();

        const mode = pwAdvanceModeSel.value || 'two_phase';
        toast(
          mode === 'legacy_full'
            ? '✅ 推进模式：每次更新所有事件（旧模式）。"动态推进事件"按钮已禁用。'
            : '✅ 推进模式：双阶段推进（默认）。可使用"动态推进事件"按钮。',
          'success'
        );
      };
    }

    if (pwDynamicMaxInp) {
      const saveDynMax = () => {
        const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(24, parseInt(pwDynamicMaxInp.value) || 4));
        pwDynamicMaxInp.value = String(v);
        pwReadConfigFromPanel();
        toast(`✅ 单次动态推进最多更新模块数已保存：${v}`, 'success');
      };
      pwDynamicMaxInp.onchange = saveDynMax;
      pwDynamicMaxInp.onblur = saveDynMax;
    }

    if (pwChatHistoryLimitInp) {
      const saveChl = () => {
        const raw = String(pwChatHistoryLimitInp.value || '').trim();
        let display;
        if (!raw || /^all$/i.test(raw)) {
          pwChatHistoryLimitInp.value = '';
          display = '全部';
        } else {
          const n = parseInt(raw);
          if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) {
            pwChatHistoryLimitInp.value = '';
            display = '全部';
          } else {
            pwChatHistoryLimitInp.value = String(n);
            display = `最近 ${n} 楼`;
          }
        }
        pwReadConfigFromPanel();
        toast(`✅ 一次推进发送的聊天记录已保存：${display}`, 'success');
      };
      pwChatHistoryLimitInp.onchange = saveChl;
      pwChatHistoryLimitInp.onblur = saveChl;
    }

    pwSyncAdvanceModeVisibility();


    if (pwAutoIntervalInp) {
      pwAutoIntervalInp.onchange = () => {
        const v = Math.max(1, parseInt(pwAutoIntervalInp.value) || 5);
        pwAutoIntervalInp.value = String(v);
        pwReadConfigFromPanel();
        toast(`✅ 平行世界自动推进间隔已保存：每 ${v} 次合格回复`, 'success');
      };
    }


    $('pw-save').onclick = () => {
      pwReadConfigFromPanel();
      toast('✅ 平行世界配置已保存', 'success');
    };

    $('pw-run').onclick = () => pwRunCycle(false);

    const dynBtn = $('pw-dynamic-run');
    if (dynBtn) {
      dynBtn.onclick = () => {
        // running 中点击 = 中断当前 parallel_world 任务（含整轮 / 动态推进）
        if (pwState.running || ssIsTaskRunning('parallel_world')) {
          ssCancelTask('parallel_world', '平行世界');
          return;
        }
        pwState.config = pwLoadConfig();
        if (pwState.config.advanceMode === 'legacy_full') {
          toast('⚠️ 当前推进模式为"每次更新所有事件（旧模式）"，无法使用动态推进。请先到上方切换为"双阶段推进"。', 'warning');
          return;
        }
        pwRunDynamicCycle(false);
      };
    }

    $('pw-summary-only').onclick = () => pwSummarizeOnly();

    $('pw-api-type').onchange = () => {
      const isCustom = $('pw-api-type').value === 'custom';

      topDoc.querySelectorAll('#pw-panel .pw-custom-api').forEach(el => {
        el.style.display = isCustom ? '' : 'none';
      });

      pwReadConfigFromPanel();
    };

    const modelSelect = $('pw-model-select');
    const modelInput = $('pw-model');

    if (modelSelect && modelInput) {
      modelSelect.onchange = () => {
        if (modelSelect.value) modelInput.value = modelSelect.value;
      };
    }

    $('pw-fetch-models').onclick = () => pwFetchModelsFromPanel();

    // 🏷️ 标签过滤编辑器绑定 + 保存
    try { ssBindTagPairsEditor('pw-inc', topDoc.getElementById('pw-panel')); } catch (e) { log('[平行世界] 绑定 pw-inc 标签编辑器失败', e); }
    try { ssBindTagPairsEditor('pw-exc', topDoc.getElementById('pw-panel')); } catch (e) { log('[平行世界] 绑定 pw-exc 标签编辑器失败', e); }

    const pwFilterCheckbox = $('pw-content-filter');
    if (pwFilterCheckbox) {
      pwFilterCheckbox.onchange = () => {
        if (!pwState.config) pwState.config = pwLoadConfig();
        pwState.config.enableContentFilter = !!pwFilterCheckbox.checked;
        pwSaveConfig();
        toast(pwFilterCheckbox.checked ? '✅ 已启用平行世界标签过滤' : '📴 已关闭平行世界标签过滤', pwFilterCheckbox.checked ? 'success' : 'info');
      };
    }

    const pwFilterSaveBtn = $('pw-filter-save');
    if (pwFilterSaveBtn) {
      pwFilterSaveBtn.onclick = () => {
        try {
          const panelEl = topDoc.getElementById('pw-panel');
          if (!pwState.config) pwState.config = pwLoadConfig();
          pwState.config.enableContentFilter = !!$('pw-content-filter')?.checked;
          pwState.config.includeTagPairs = ssReadTagPairsEditor('pw-inc', panelEl);
          pwState.config.excludeTagPairs = ssReadTagPairsEditor('pw-exc', panelEl);

          // 同步旧字段，方便兼容/导出
          pwState.config.includeTagStarts = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.includeTagPairs, 'start');
          pwState.config.includeTagEnds = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.includeTagPairs, 'end');
          pwState.config.excludeTagStarts = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.excludeTagPairs, 'start');
          pwState.config.excludeTagEnds = ssPairsToLines(pwState.config.excludeTagPairs, 'end');

          pwSaveConfig();
          toast('✅ 平行世界标签过滤设置已保存', 'success');
        } catch (e) {
          log('[平行世界] 保存标签过滤失败', e);
          toast(`❌ 保存标签过滤失败：${e?.message || e}`, 'error');
        }
      };
    }

    $('pw-copy-inject').onclick = async () => {
      pwReadConfigFromPanel();

      const plain = pwBuildInjectPlainText();

      if (!plain.trim()) {
        toast('⚠️ 当前没有可复制的平行世界摘要', 'warning');
        return;
      }

      const ok = await copyTextToClipboard(`<parallel_world>\n${plain}\n</parallel_world>`);
      toast(ok ? '✅ 已复制当前平行世界注入摘要' : '❌ 复制失败', ok ? 'success' : 'error');
    };

    $('pw-clear').onclick = () => {
      const ok = topWindow.confirm
        ? topWindow.confirm('确定要清空当前聊天的平行世界数据吗？')
        : confirm('确定要清空当前聊天的平行世界数据吗？');

      if (!ok) return;

      try {
        localStorage.removeItem(pwDataKey());
      } catch { }

      pwSaveData(pwEmptyData());
      pwSetStatus('已清空');
      pwRenderPanel();
      pwRenderStateFloat();

      toast('🗑️ 已清空当前平行世界', 'success');
    };

    $('pw-save-inject-text').onclick = () => {
      const data = pwLoadData();
      if (!data.inject) data.inject = {};
      data.cleared = false;
      data.inject.manual_text = $('pw-inject-manager')?.value || '';
      pwSaveData(data);
      toast('✅ 已保存手动注入摘要', 'success');
    };

    $('pw-reset-inject-text').onclick = () => {
      const data = pwLoadData();
      if (!data.inject) data.inject = {};
      data.inject.manual_text = '';
      pwSaveData(data);
      pwRenderPanel();
      toast('↩️ 已恢复为 AI 自动摘要', 'success');
    };

    $('pw-copy-inject-text').onclick = async () => {
      const text = $('pw-inject-manager')?.value || pwBuildInjectPlainText();
      const ok = await copyTextToClipboard(text);
      toast(ok ? '✅ 已复制注入摘要内容' : '❌ 复制失败', ok ? 'success' : 'error');
    };

    for (const id of [
      'pw-enabled',
      'pw-auto-mode',
      'pw-auto-interval',
      'pw-advance-mode',
      'pw-dynamic-max',
      'pw-chat-history-limit',
      'pw-module-count',
      'pw-detail-level',
      'pw-summary-max',
      'pw-max-inject-modules',
      'pw-max-inject-chars',
      'pw-impact-mode',
      'pw-max-urgent-events',
      'pw-auto-delay',
      'pw-user-guide',
      'pw-proxy-preset',
      'pw-api-url',
      'pw-api-key',
      'pw-model',
      'pw-temperature',
      'pw-max-tokens',
      'pw-top-p',
      'pw-freq-pen',
      'pw-pres-pen',
    ]) {
      const el = $(id);
      if (!el) continue;

      el.onchange = () => pwReadConfigFromPanel();

      if (el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
        el.onblur = () => pwReadConfigFromPanel();
      }
    }
  }

  // ==================== 小说模式模块 ====================

  let novelModeConfig = {
    enabled: false,
    injectSource: true,

    // 默认小说模式：打开这些条目
    enableCot: true,
    enableStyle: true,
    enableFormat: true,
    enableOutline: true,
    enableChar: true,
    enablePlot: true,

    // 新增：润色模式
    // 默认 false：普通小说模式不打开润色模式条目
    polishMode: false,

    sourceText: '',
  };

  function loadNovelModeConfig() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.STORAGE_KEY);
      const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
      let sourceText = localStorage.getItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_KEY) || parsed.sourceText || '';
      // 老版本曾把整篇小说写进 sourceText，会导致下次打开面板时 textarea 渲染卡死。一次性大小护栏。
      if (sourceText.length > 200000) {
        try { localStorage.removeItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_KEY); } catch { }
        sourceText = '';
      }
      return {
        ...novelModeConfig,
        ...parsed,
        sourceText,
      };
    } catch (e) {
      return { ...novelModeConfig };
    }
  }

  function saveNovelModeConfig() {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(novelModeConfig));
      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_KEY, novelModeConfig.sourceText || '');
      return true;
    } catch (e) {
      log('[小说模式] 保存配置失败', e);
      return false;
    }
  }

  function novelGetEntryDefs() {
    return [
      {
        key: 'outline',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.OUTLINE_ID,
        title: '📝📖 小说大纲/正文流程',
        desc: '小说写作流程、大纲到正文的默认执行规则。润色模式下会自动关闭此条目。',
      },
      {
        key: 'cot',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.COT_ID,
        title: '🧪 小说模式思维链',
        desc: '小说模式专用思考/规划规则。',
      },
      {
        key: 'style',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.STYLE_ID,
        title: '🖋️ 小说文风要求',
        desc: '从小说原文中分析得到的文风、句式、描写比例、对白方式等。',
        analysisType: 'style',
      },
      {
        key: 'format',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.FORMAT_ID,
        title: '📐 小说正文格式要求',
        desc: '从小说原文中分析得到的分段、对白、视角、符号、标题等格式规则。',
        analysisType: 'format',
      },
      {
        key: 'character',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.CHAR_ID,
        title: '👤 小说人物/角色分析',
        desc: '从小说原文中分析得到的人物性格、关系、口吻、行为方式等。',
        analysisType: 'character',
      },
      {
        key: 'plot',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.PLOT_ID,
        title: '🧩 小说情节/技术细节',
        desc: '从小说原文中分析得到的剧情线、世界观、伏笔、设定、技术细节等。',
        analysisType: 'plot',
      },
      {
        key: 'polish',
        id: CONFIG.NOVEL.POLISH_ID,
        title: '✍️ 润色模式',
        desc: '用户输入自己的小说正文后，要求 AI 只进行润色、优化表达、保持原意，不改写剧情核心。',
      },
    ];
  }

  function novelGetEnabledIdsFromConfig() {
    const ids = [];

    if (novelModeConfig.injectSource) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_ID);

    // 润色模式：关闭「小说大纲/正文流程」，打开「润色模式」
    // 普通小说模式：打开「小说大纲/正文流程」，关闭「润色模式」
    if (novelModeConfig.polishMode) {
      ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.POLISH_ID);
    } else {
      if (novelModeConfig.enableOutline) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.OUTLINE_ID);
    }

    if (novelModeConfig.enableChar) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.CHAR_ID);
    if (novelModeConfig.enablePlot) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.PLOT_ID);
    if (novelModeConfig.enableCot) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.COT_ID);
    if (novelModeConfig.enableStyle) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.STYLE_ID);
    if (novelModeConfig.enableFormat) ids.push(CONFIG.NOVEL.FORMAT_ID);

    return ids;
  }

  async function novelSetPrompt(ref, content) {
    await setPromptContentByRef(ref, content || '');
  }

  async function novelTogglePrompt(ref, enabled) {
    await togglePromptById(ref, !!enabled);
  }

  async function novelSaveEnabledSnapshot() {
    try {
      const preset = getPreset('in_use');
      const snapshot = {};

      for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
        const key = p.id || p.identifier;
        if (key) snapshot[key] = !!p.enabled;
      }

      localStorage.setItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.SNAPSHOT_KEY, JSON.stringify(snapshot));
      log('[小说模式] 已保存进入前开关快照');
    } catch (e) {
      log('[小说模式] 保存快照失败:', e);
    }
  }

  async function novelRestoreEnabledSnapshot() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.SNAPSHOT_KEY);
      if (!raw) {
        toast('⚠️ 没有找到小说模式前的设置快照，只关闭小说条目', 'warning');
        for (const id of CONFIG.NOVEL.ALL_IDS) {
          await novelTogglePrompt(id, false);
        }
        return;
      }

      const snapshot = JSON.parse(raw);

      await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
        for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
          const key1 = p.id;
          const key2 = p.identifier;

          if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(snapshot, key1)) {
            p.enabled = snapshot[key1];
          } else if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(snapshot, key2)) {
            p.enabled = snapshot[key2];
          }
        }
        return preset;
      });

      localStorage.removeItem(CONFIG.NOVEL.SNAPSHOT_KEY);
      log('[小说模式] 已恢复进入小说模式前的开关状态');
    } catch (e) {
      log('[小说模式] 恢复快照失败:', e);
      toast(`❌ 恢复默认失败：${e.message || e}`, 'error');
    }
  }

  function novelGetConflictPromptIds() {
    const ids = new Set();

    // 狐策必须关闭
    ids.add('046af93d-0c63-4561-b0b2-052cd265fecd');

    // 小说模式下默认关闭这些组：文风、转述、抢话、思维链
    const conflictLabels = ['📝 文风要求', '🔁 转述', '🙋 抢话', '🧪 思维链'];

    for (const group of CONFIG.SELECT_GROUPS || []) {
      if (conflictLabels.includes(group.label)) {
        for (const opt of group.options || []) {
          ids.add(opt.id);
        }
      }
    }

    return [...ids];
  }

  async function novelApplyMode(enabled = true) {
    novelModeConfig.enabled = !!enabled;
    saveNovelModeConfig();

    if (enabled) {
      await novelSaveEnabledSnapshot();

      const enabledIds = new Set(novelGetEnabledIdsFromConfig());
      const conflictIds = novelGetConflictPromptIds();

      await updatePresetWith('in_use', (preset) => {
        for (const p of preset.prompts || []) {
          const key = p.id || p.identifier;

          if (conflictIds.includes(p.id) || conflictIds.includes(p.identifier)) {
            p.enabled = false;
          }

          if (CONFIG.NOVEL.ALL_IDS.includes(p.id) || CONFIG.NOVEL.ALL_IDS.includes(p.identifier)) {
            p.enabled = enabledIds.has(p.id) || enabledIds.has(p.identifier);
          }
        }

        return preset;
      });

      if (novelModeConfig.polishMode) {
        toast('✅ 已进入润色模式：已关闭「小说大纲/正文流程」，并打开「✍️润色模式」', 'success');
      } else {
        toast('✅ 已进入小说模式：已关闭狐策/普通文风/普通思维链/转述/抢话，并启用小说条目', 'success');
      }

      return;
    }

    await novelRestoreEnabledSnapshot();

    novelModeConfig.enabled = false;
    saveNovelModeConfig();

    toast('✅ 已恢复进入小说模式前的默认设置，并关闭小说模式', 'success');
  }

  function novelBuildDefaultCotPrompt() {
    return ``;
  }

  function novelBuildDefaultOutlinePrompt() {
    return `【小说大纲/正文流程】

当用户进行小说创作时，默认流程如下：

1. 用户提供剧情想法、草稿、大纲或片段。
2. AI 先理解用户想要的剧情目的、人物状态、情绪方向与段落功能。
3. 如果用户要求润色大纲，则输出可供人工修改的大纲，不直接写正文。
4. 如果用户要求写正文，则严格按照大纲扩写为小说正文。
5. 正文应保留用户原始意图，不擅自改变剧情核心。
6. 正文应符合【小说文风要求】、【小说正文格式要求】、【小说人物/角色分析】、【小说情节/技术细节】。
7. 输出不需要自称 AI，不要解释“我将如何写”，直接进入用户需要的内容。

当用户输入很短时，应根据上下文补全必要动作、心理、环境与因果，但不要喧宾夺主。
当用户输入很长时，应优先保持用户已有结构，只做续写、扩写或润色。`;
  }

  function novelBuildAnalysisSystem(type) {
    const common = `你是小说文本分析助手。
你的任务是阅读用户提供的小说原文片段，提取可复用的写作规则。
禁止续写剧情，禁止评价好坏，禁止泛泛而谈。
输出必须具体、可执行，适合直接注入提示词。`;

    if (type === 'style') {
      return `${common}

请分析小说原文的【文风要求】。

必须覆盖：
1. 叙述气质：冷静/抒情/口语化/网文化/古风/轻小说/电影感等。
2. 句式节奏：长短句比例、停顿方式、是否偏白描、是否偏修辞。
3. 描写密度：环境、动作、神态、心理、感官描写分别占比。
4. 对白风格：对白长短、潜台词、口癖、对白与动作的穿插方式。
5. 情绪表达：直接说情绪还是通过动作/环境暗示。
6. 常用修辞与禁忌：比喻、排比、留白、反复、网络词等。
7. 续写时必须模仿的要点。
8. 续写时必须避免的偏差。

输出格式：
【小说文风要求】
- xxx
- xxx`;
    }

    if (type === 'format') {
      return `${common}

请分析小说原文的【正文格式要求】。

必须覆盖：
1. 段落长度与分段习惯。
2. 对白格式：是否使用引号、冒号、破折号、单独成段等。
3. 心理描写格式：是否用直接心理句、内心独白、斜体/括号/无标记。
4. 视角与人称：第一人称/第三人称/多视角/是否稳定。
5. 时间、地点、章节、标题等格式习惯。
6. 是否使用特殊标签、空行、符号。
7. 正文输出时的硬性格式规则。

输出格式：
【小说正文格式要求】
- xxx
- xxx`;
    }

    if (type === 'character') {
      return `${common}

请分析小说原文中的【人物与角色写作规则】。

必须覆盖：
1. 主要人物列表。
2. 每个人物的性格核心、说话方式、行为习惯。
3. 人物之间的关系与张力。
4. 人物心理描写方式。
5. 人物在续写时最容易写崩的点。
6. 续写时需要保持的人物细节。

输出格式：
【小说人物/角色分析】
- xxx`;
    }

    if (type === 'plot') {
      return `${common}

请分析小说原文中的【情节、世界观与技术细节】。

必须覆盖：
1. 已出现的重要剧情线。
2. 世界观、势力、规则、职业、能力、技术细节。
3. 关键伏笔、秘密、未解决问题。
4. 剧情推进节奏。
5. 续写时必须遵守的设定。
6. 续写时可以继续展开的方向。

输出格式：
【小说情节/技术细节】
- xxx`;
    }

    return common;
  }

  async function novelCallAnalysis(type, sourceText) {
    const gr = getFn('generateRaw');
    if (typeof gr !== 'function') throw new Error('无 generateRaw');

    const system = novelBuildAnalysisSystem(type);
    const user = `【小说原文】\n${sourceText}\n\n请根据以上小说原文进行分析。`;

    const useCustom = foxMemoryConfig?.apiType === 'custom' && (foxMemoryConfig.customApi?.apiurl || foxMemoryConfig.customApi?.proxyPreset);

    const params = {
      user_input: user,
      should_silence: true,
      should_stream: false,
      max_chat_history: 0,
      ordered_prompts: [
        { role: 'system', content: system },
        'user_input',
      ],
    };

    if (useCustom) {
      const customApi = {
        apiurl: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.apiurl || undefined,
        key: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.key || undefined,
        model: foxMemoryConfig.customApi.model || undefined,
      };

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset) {
        customApi.proxy_preset = foxMemoryConfig.customApi.proxyPreset;
        delete customApi.apiurl;
        delete customApi.key;
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature))) {
        customApi.temperature = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.temperature);
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens !== '' && !isNaN(parseInt(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens))) {
        customApi.max_tokens = parseInt(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.max_tokens);
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p))) {
        customApi.top_p = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.top_p);
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty))) {
        customApi.frequency_penalty = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.frequency_penalty);
      }

      if (foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty !== '' && !isNaN(parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty))) {
        customApi.presence_penalty = parseFloat(foxMemoryConfig.customApi.presence_penalty);
      }

      params.custom_api = customApi;
    }

    const r = await gr(params);
    return String(typeof r === 'string' ? r : (r?.content || '')).trim();
  }

  async function novelInjectSourceText(overrideText) {
    const ta = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text');
    const typed = ta?.value?.trim() || '';
    const text = (typeof overrideText === 'string' ? overrideText : typed).trim();

    if (!text) {
      toast('⚠️ 小说原文为空', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    // 仅持久化用户手输的部分，避免大文件原文被存进 localStorage 拖慢面板
    novelModeConfig.sourceText = typed;
    saveNovelModeConfig();

    const content = `【小说原文注入】

以下是用户提供的小说原文片段。它用于分析并参考文风、格式、人物与剧情细节。
后续小说续写或润色时，应参考其叙述方式、语言节奏、人物处理与格式习惯，但不要机械复读原文。

【原文开始】
${text}
【原文结束】`;

    await novelSetPrompt(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_ID, content);

    if (novelModeConfig.injectSource) {
      await novelTogglePrompt(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_ID, true);
    }

    toast('✅ 小说原文已注入预设条目', 'success');
  }

  function novelGetSourceTextFromPanel() {
    const panel = topDoc.getElementById('ss-novel-panel');
    const cached = panel?.__ssNovelResolvedText;
    if (typeof cached === 'string' && cached.trim()) return cached.trim();

    const ta = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text');
    return ta?.value?.trim() || novelModeConfig.sourceText || '';
  }

  async function novelRunAnalysisForEntry(entryKey) {
    const entry = novelGetEntryDefs().find(x => x.key === entryKey);
    if (!entry) return;

    if (!entry.analysisType) {
      toast('⚠️ 这个条目没有自动分析模块，可直接手动编辑内容', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    if (ssIsTaskRunning(`novel_analysis_${entryKey}`)) {
      ssCancelTask(`novel_analysis_${entryKey}`, '小说分析');
      return;
    }

    const text = novelGetSourceTextFromPanel();

    if (!text) {
      toast('未检测到小说文本，请先填入小说原文', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    const btn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-reanalyze-${entryKey}`);
    const old = btn?.textContent;

    if (btn) {
      btn.textContent = '⏳ 分析中...';
      btn.disabled = true;
    }

    let toastEl = null;

    try {
      const t = topWindow?.toastr || window.toastr;
      if (t?.info) {
        t.info(`🦊 正在重新分析：${entry.title}……`, '🦊玄狐', { timeOut: 0, extendedTimeOut: 0 });
        toastEl = topDoc.querySelector('#toast-container .toast-info:last-child') || topDoc.querySelector('.toast-info');
      }

      const result = await novelCallAnalysis(entry.analysisType, text);
      if (!result) throw new Error('分析结果为空');

      const analysisTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-analysis-${entryKey}`);
      if (analysisTa) analysisTa.value = result;

      toast('✅ 分析完成，已写入下方分析结果框，可选择覆盖或追加', 'success');
    } catch (e) {
      log('[小说模式] 分析失败', e);
      toast(`❌ 分析失败：${e.message || e}`, 'error');
    } finally {
      try { if (toastEl?.remove) toastEl.remove(); } catch { }

      if (btn) {
        btn.textContent = old;
        btn.disabled = false;
      }
    }
  }

  async function novelAnalyzeAll() {
    const text = novelGetSourceTextFromPanel();

    if (!text) {
      toast('未检测到小说文本，请先填入小说原文', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    await novelInjectSourceText(text);

    for (const key of ['style', 'format', 'character', 'plot']) {
      await novelRunAnalysisForEntry(key);
    }
  }

  async function novelSaveEntry(entryKey) {
    const entry = novelGetEntryDefs().find(x => x.key === entryKey);
    if (!entry) return;

    const ta = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-entry-${entryKey}`);
    const value = ta?.value || '';

    await novelSetPrompt(entry.id, value);
    toast(`✅ 已保存：${entry.title}`, 'success');
  }

  async function novelClearEntry(entryKey) {
    const entry = novelGetEntryDefs().find(x => x.key === entryKey);
    if (!entry) return;

    const ok = topWindow?.confirm
      ? topWindow.confirm(`确定要清空「${entry.title}」的条目内容吗？`)
      : confirm(`确定要清空「${entry.title}」的条目内容吗？`);

    if (!ok) return;

    await novelSetPrompt(entry.id, '');

    const ta = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-entry-${entryKey}`);
    if (ta) ta.value = '';

    toast(`🧹 已清空：${entry.title}`, 'success');
  }

  async function novelClearAnalysis(entryKey) {
    const ta = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-analysis-${entryKey}`);
    if (ta) ta.value = '';
    toast('🧹 已清空分析结果', 'success');
  }

  async function novelApplyAnalysisToEntry(entryKey, mode = 'replace') {
    const entry = novelGetEntryDefs().find(x => x.key === entryKey);
    if (!entry) return;

    const analysisTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-analysis-${entryKey}`);
    const entryTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-entry-${entryKey}`);

    const analysis = analysisTa?.value?.trim() || '';

    if (!analysis) {
      toast('⚠️ 没有可写入的分析结果', 'warning');
      return;
    }

    const oldText = entryTa?.value || '';

    const nextText = mode === 'append' && oldText.trim()
      ? `${oldText.trim()}\n\n${analysis}`
      : analysis;

    if (entryTa) entryTa.value = nextText;

    await novelSetPrompt(entry.id, nextText);

    toast(
      mode === 'append'
        ? `✅ 已将分析结果追加到：${entry.title}`
        : `✅ 已用分析结果覆盖：${entry.title}`,
      'success'
    );
  }

  async function novelClearOne(type, opts = {}) {
    const { disablePrompt = false } = opts;

    const idMap = {
      source: CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_ID,
      outline: CONFIG.NOVEL.OUTLINE_ID,
      cot: CONFIG.NOVEL.COT_ID,
      style: CONFIG.NOVEL.STYLE_ID,
      format: CONFIG.NOVEL.FORMAT_ID,
      character: CONFIG.NOVEL.CHAR_ID,
      plot: CONFIG.NOVEL.PLOT_ID,
      polish: CONFIG.NOVEL.POLISH_ID,
    };

    const targetId = idMap[type];
    if (!targetId) return;

    await novelSetPrompt(targetId, '');

    if (disablePrompt) {
      await novelTogglePrompt(targetId, false);
    }

    if (type === 'source') {
      novelModeConfig.sourceText = '';
      saveNovelModeConfig();
      const sourceTa = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text');
      if (sourceTa) sourceTa.value = '';
    }

    const entryTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-entry-${type}`);
    if (entryTa) entryTa.value = '';

    const analysisTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-analysis-${type}`);
    if (analysisTa) analysisTa.value = '';

    toast('🧹 已清空', 'success');
  }

  async function novelClearAll(opts = {}) {
    const { disablePrompt = false } = opts;

    const ok = topWindow?.confirm
      ? topWindow.confirm(
        disablePrompt
          ? '确定要清空所有小说模式条目，并关闭这些条目吗？'
          : '确定要清空所有小说模式条目内容吗？\n\n注意：默认只清空内容，不关闭条目开关。'
      )
      : confirm('确定要清空所有小说模式条目内容吗？');

    if (!ok) return;

    for (const id of CONFIG.NOVEL.ALL_IDS) {
      await novelSetPrompt(id, '');
      if (disablePrompt) await novelTogglePrompt(id, false);
    }

    novelModeConfig.sourceText = '';
    saveNovelModeConfig();

    const sourceTa = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text');
    if (sourceTa) sourceTa.value = '';

    for (const entry of novelGetEntryDefs()) {
      const entryTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-entry-${entry.key}`);
      if (entryTa) entryTa.value = '';

      const analysisTa = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-analysis-${entry.key}`);
      if (analysisTa) analysisTa.value = '';
    }

    toast(
      disablePrompt
        ? '🧹 已清空并关闭所有小说模式条目'
        : '🧹 已清空所有小说模式条目内容',
      'success'
    );
  }

  async function novelTogglePolishMode() {
    novelModeConfig.polishMode = !novelModeConfig.polishMode;
    saveNovelModeConfig();

    if (novelModeConfig.enabled) {
      await novelApplyMode(true);
    } else {
      // 即使没点“一键进入小说模式”，也实时同步这两个条目的开关，符合你的要求
      await novelTogglePrompt(CONFIG.NOVEL.OUTLINE_ID, !novelModeConfig.polishMode);
      await novelTogglePrompt(CONFIG.NOVEL.POLISH_ID, novelModeConfig.polishMode);
    }

    const btn = topDoc.getElementById('novel-polish-toggle');
    if (btn) {
      btn.textContent = novelModeConfig.polishMode ? '✍️ 润色模式：开' : '📖 小说模式：普通';
      btn.style.background = novelModeConfig.polishMode ? 'rgba(232,120,74,0.22)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';
      btn.style.color = novelModeConfig.polishMode ? '#f0a070' : '#a09088';
    }

    const outlineSw = topDoc.getElementById('novel-switch-wrap-outline');
    const polishSw = topDoc.getElementById('novel-switch-wrap-polish');

    if (outlineSw) outlineSw.innerHTML = '';
    if (polishSw) polishSw.innerHTML = '';

    const outlineSwitch = createToggleSwitch(CONFIG.NOVEL.OUTLINE_ID);
    const polishSwitch = createToggleSwitch(CONFIG.NOVEL.POLISH_ID);

    if (outlineSw) outlineSw.appendChild(outlineSwitch.wrapper);
    if (polishSw) polishSw.appendChild(polishSwitch.wrapper);

    toast(
      novelModeConfig.polishMode
        ? '✍️ 已切换为润色模式：关闭大纲流程，打开润色模式条目'
        : '📖 已切换为普通小说模式：打开大纲流程，关闭润色模式条目',
      'success'
    );
  }

          <div id="novel-switch-wrap-source"></div>
        </div>

        <textarea id="novel-source-text" placeholder="可手动粘贴片段。大量原文请用下方“批量导入TXT”，导入后只列文件名，注入/分析时再按需读取，避免卡死。" style="width:100%;min-height:230px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;color:#e8ddd4;padding:10px;font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;resize:vertical;box-sizing:border-box;">${escapeHtml(novelModeConfig.sourceText || '')}</textarea>

        <div id="novel-source-files" style="display:none;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;align-items:center;padding:8px;margin-top:8px;border:1px dashed rgba(232,120,74,0.25);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.04);"></div>

        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button id="novel-import-txt" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.22);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">📚 批量导入TXT</button>
          <button id="novel-import-txt-sort" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.22);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🔢 按文件名导入TXT</button>
          <button id="novel-inject-source" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">💉 注入原文到预设</button>
          <button id="novel-clear-source" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.12);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🧹 清空原文</button>
          <button id="novel-analyze-all" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.15);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🔬 一键分析全部</button>
          <button id="novel-enable-all" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.15);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">✍️ 一键进入当前模式</button>
          <button id="novel-disable-all" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.15);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">↩️ 恢复默认并关闭</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;">
        <div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;color:#f0a070;">🔬 分析与注入 / 小说模式条目管理</div>
        ${cardsHtml}

        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button id="novel-clear-all" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.35);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.18);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;">🧹 一键清空全部条目内容</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

    topDoc.body.appendChild(overlay);
    topDoc.body.appendChild(panel);
    xhGuideEnhancePanel(panel, 'novel', '小说模式');

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-close').onclick = () => {
      xhGuideEnd();
      overlay.remove();
      panel.remove();
    };

    const sourceSwitch = createToggleSwitch(CONFIG.NOVEL.SOURCE_ID, (enabled) => {
      novelModeConfig.injectSource = enabled;
      saveNovelModeConfig();
    });
    topDoc.getElementById('novel-switch-wrap-source')?.appendChild(sourceSwitch.wrapper);

    for (const entry of novelGetEntryDefs()) {
      const wrap = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-switch-wrap-${entry.key}`);
      if (wrap) {
        const sw = createToggleSwitch(entry.id);
        wrap.appendChild(sw.wrapper);
      }

      const saveBtn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-save-entry-${entry.key}`);
      if (saveBtn) saveBtn.onclick = () => novelSaveEntry(entry.key);

      const clearBtn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-clear-entry-${entry.key}`);
      if (clearBtn) clearBtn.onclick = () => novelClearEntry(entry.key);

      const coverBtn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-cover-${entry.key}`);
      if (coverBtn) coverBtn.onclick = () => novelApplyAnalysisToEntry(entry.key, 'replace');

      const appendBtn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-append-${entry.key}`);
      if (appendBtn) appendBtn.onclick = () => novelApplyAnalysisToEntry(entry.key, 'append');

      const clearAnalysisBtn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-clear-analysis-${entry.key}`);
      if (clearAnalysisBtn) clearAnalysisBtn.onclick = () => novelClearAnalysis(entry.key);

      const reBtn = topDoc.getElementById(`novel-reanalyze-${entry.key}`);
      if (reBtn) reBtn.onclick = async () => {
        const resolved = await ssResolveTextWithPending(panel, 'novelSource', 'novel-source-text');
        panel.__ssNovelResolvedText = resolved.text;
        try {
          await novelRunAnalysisForEntry(entry.key);
        } finally {
          panel.__ssNovelResolvedText = '';
        }
      };
    }

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-polish-toggle').onclick = () => novelTogglePolishMode();

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-enable-all').onclick = async () => {
      novelModeConfig.sourceText = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text')?.value || '';
      saveNovelModeConfig();
      await novelApplyMode(true);
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-disable-all').onclick = async () => {
      novelModeConfig.sourceText = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text')?.value || '';
      saveNovelModeConfig();
      await novelApplyMode(false);
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-import-txt').onclick = async () => {
      await ssAttachTxtChips(panel, 'novelSource', 'novel-source-files', {
        sortByName: false,
        append: true,
      });
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-import-txt-sort').onclick = async () => {
      await ssAttachTxtChips(panel, 'novelSource', 'novel-source-files', {
        sortByName: true,
        append: true,
      });
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-inject-source').onclick = async () => {
      const typed = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text')?.value || '';
      novelModeConfig.sourceText = typed;
      saveNovelModeConfig();

      const resolved = await ssResolveTextWithPending(panel, 'novelSource', 'novel-source-text');
      panel.__ssNovelResolvedText = resolved.text;
      try {
        await novelInjectSourceText(resolved.text);
      } finally {
        panel.__ssNovelResolvedText = '';
      }
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-clear-source').onclick = async () => {
      ssClearPendingTxtChips(panel, 'novelSource', 'novel-source-files');
      await novelClearOne('source');
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-analyze-all').onclick = async () => {
      const typed = topDoc.getElementById('novel-source-text')?.value || '';
      novelModeConfig.sourceText = typed;
      saveNovelModeConfig();

      const resolved = await ssResolveTextWithPending(panel, 'novelSource', 'novel-source-text');
      panel.__ssNovelResolvedText = resolved.text;
      try {
        await novelAnalyzeAll();
      } finally {
        panel.__ssNovelResolvedText = '';
      }
    };

    topDoc.getElementById('novel-clear-all').onclick = async () => {
      await novelClearAll({ disablePrompt: false });
    };

    setTimeout(() => {
      try { applyMobilePanelFixNow?.(); } catch (e) { }
    }, 50);
  }

  // ============= 移动端适配 =============

  function applyMobilePanelFixNow() {
    injectMobilePanelFix();

    const isMobile = (() => {
      try {
        return topWindow.matchMedia?.('(max-width: 768px), (pointer: coarse)')?.matches;
      } catch {
        return (topWindow.innerWidth || window.innerWidth) <= 768;
      }
    })();

    if (!isMobile) return;

    const vv = topWindow.visualViewport;
    const viewportW = vv?.width || topWindow.innerWidth || topDoc.documentElement.clientWidth;
    const viewportH = vv?.height || topWindow.innerHeight || topDoc.documentElement.clientHeight;

    const safeTop = Math.max(6, vv?.offsetTop || 0);
    const safeLeft = Math.max(6, vv?.offsetLeft || 0);
    const gap = viewportW <= 420 ? 6 : 8;

    const panelIds = [
      'ss-dashboard',
      'ss-hushen-panel',
      'ss-novel-panel',
      'ss-hushen-mgr-panel',
      'ss-husou-panel',
      'ss-husou-quick-panel',
      'ss-outline-panel',
      'ss-beat-memory-panel',
      'ss-custom-edit-panel',
      'ss-style-analysis-panel',
      'ss-foxmemory-panel',
      'ss-foxpush-panel',
      'ss-foxjudge-panel',
      'pw-panel',
    ];


    for (const id of panelIds) {
      const panel = topDoc.getElementById(id);
      if (!panel) continue;

      Object.assign(panel.style, {
        position: 'fixed',
        top: `${safeTop + gap}px`,
        left: `${safeLeft + gap}px`,
        right: `${gap}px`,
        bottom: `${gap}px`,

        width: 'auto',
        height: 'auto',
        maxWidth: 'none',
        maxHeight: 'none',

        transform: 'none',
        translate: 'none',

        boxSizing: 'border-box',
        overflowX: 'hidden',
        overflowY: 'auto',
        WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch',
        overscrollBehavior: 'contain',

        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
      });

      // 防止移动端某些浏览器在 fixed + bottom 失效时高度塌掉
      const fallbackH = Math.max(260, viewportH - safeTop - gap * 3);
      panel.style.minHeight = `${Math.min(fallbackH, viewportH - gap * 2)}px`;
    }
    // ✅ 平行世界面板/状态窗使用专用移动端铺满逻辑，避免通用 right/bottom/auto 布局导致半屏
    try {
      if (topDoc.getElementById('pw-panel') || topDoc.getElementById('pw-state-float')) {
        pwForceMobileLayoutNow();
      }
    } catch { }
    const dash = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dashboard');
    if (dash) {
      // 主面板所有直接子项不允许被 flex 压扁
      [...dash.children].forEach(child => {
        child.style.flexShrink = '0';
      });

      // 顶栏固定，但不要把下面内容遮没
      const header = dash.firstElementChild;
      if (header) {
        Object.assign(header.style, {
          position: 'sticky',
          top: '0px',
          zIndex: '30',
          flexShrink: '0',
        });
      }

      // 手机端强制把常见横排区域改成单列/两列，避免撑爆宽度
      dash.querySelectorAll('div').forEach(el => {
        const st = el.getAttribute('style') || '';

        if (
          st.includes('grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr)') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit')
        ) {
          el.style.gridTemplateColumns = '1fr';
        }

        if (
          st.includes('display:flex') &&
          (
            st.includes('gap:12px') ||
            st.includes('gap: 12px') ||
            st.includes('flex-wrap')
          )
        ) {
          el.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
        }
      });
    }

    const husou = topDoc.getElementById('ss-husou-panel');
    if (husou) {
      husou.querySelectorAll('div').forEach(el => {
        const st = el.getAttribute('style') || '';

        if (
          st.includes('grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr)') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr') ||
          st.includes('grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr')
        ) {
          el.style.gridTemplateColumns = '1fr';
        }
      });
    }

    const hushen = topDoc.getElementById('ss-hushen-panel');
    if (hushen) {
      hushen.querySelectorAll('textarea').forEach(ta => {
        ta.style.maxHeight = '38vh';
      });
    }

    const foxmem = topDoc.getElementById('ss-foxmemory-panel');
    if (foxmem) {
      foxmem.querySelectorAll('div').forEach(el => {
        const st = el.getAttribute('style') || '';

        if (
          st.includes('grid-template-columns') ||
          st.includes('repeat(2,1fr)') ||
          st.includes('1fr 1fr')
        ) {
          el.style.gridTemplateColumns = '1fr';
        }

        if (st.includes('display:flex')) {
          el.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';
        }
      });

      foxmem.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
        // ✅ 标签过滤编辑器的小 + / - 按钮不要被撑大
        if (
          btn.classList.contains('foxmem-inc-tag-add') ||
          btn.classList.contains('foxmem-exc-tag-add') ||
          btn.classList.contains('foxmem-inc-tag-remove') ||
          btn.classList.contains('foxmem-exc-tag-remove')
        ) {
          btn.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
          btn.style.minWidth = '34px';
          btn.style.width = btn.classList.contains('foxmem-inc-tag-remove') || btn.classList.contains('foxmem-exc-tag-remove') ? '34px' : 'auto';
          btn.style.flex = '0 0 auto';
          return;
        }

        btn.style.whiteSpace = 'normal';
        btn.style.minWidth = '120px';
      });

      foxmem.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea').forEach(input => {
        input.style.maxWidth = '100%';
        input.style.boxSizing = 'border-box';
        if (input.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') input.style.maxHeight = '34vh';
      });

      const analyzeBtn = topDoc.getElementById('foxmem-analyze-now');
      if (analyzeBtn) {
        analyzeBtn.style.flex = '1 1 100%';
        analyzeBtn.style.marginLeft = '0';
        analyzeBtn.style.width = '100%';
      }
    }

    const overlay = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dash-overlay');
    if (overlay) {
      Object.assign(overlay.style, {
        position: 'fixed',
        inset: '0',
        zIndex: '999998',
        touchAction: 'none',
      });
    }
  }

  function enhanceDashboardUI() {
    const dash = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dashboard');
    if (!dash) return;

    injectFoxUiPolish();

    const children = [...dash.children];

    for (let i = 1; i < children.length; i += 2) {
      const title = children[i];
      const box = children[i + 1];
      if (!title) continue;

      title.classList.add('ss-section-title');

      if (box) {
        box.classList.add('ss-section-box');
        const text = (title.textContent || '').trim();

        if (text.includes('快捷开关')) box.classList.add('ss-quick-grid');
        if (text.includes('预设选项控制')) box.classList.add('ss-preset-grid');
        if (text.includes('上下文管理')) box.classList.add('ss-context-row');
      }
    }

    const status = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dash-status');
    if (status && !status.dataset.polished) {
      status.dataset.polished = '1';
      status.title = '当前思维链样式 / 展开状态 / 可见状态';
    }
  }

  function enhanceHushenUI() {
    const panel = topDoc.getElementById('ss-hushen-panel');
    if (!panel) return;

    injectFoxUiPolish();

    // 给狐析模块卡片加 class 与序号
    const inputs = [...panel.querySelectorAll('.ss-hushen-input')];
    inputs.forEach((input, idx) => {
      const card = input.closest('div[style*="background"]');
      if (!card || card.classList.contains('ss-hushen-card')) return;

      card.classList.add('ss-hushen-card');

      const badge = topDoc.createElement('span');
      badge.className = 'ss-hushen-index';
      badge.textContent = String(idx + 1).padStart(2, '0');
      card.appendChild(badge);
    });

    const actionRow = panel.querySelector('#ss-hushen-analyze-all')?.parentElement;
    if (actionRow) actionRow.classList.add('ss-hushen-actions');
  }

  function enhanceHusouUI() {
    const panel = topDoc.getElementById('ss-husou-panel');
    if (!panel) return;

    injectFoxUiPolish();

    const root = panel.firstElementChild;
    if (!root) return;

    [...root.children].forEach((child) => {
      const text = child.textContent || '';
      if (
        text.includes('总开关') ||
        text.includes('搜索参数') ||
        text.includes('搜索来源') ||
        text.includes('请求 API') ||
        text.includes('搜索预设') ||
        text.includes('管理注入内容')
      ) {
        child.classList.add('ss-husou-card');
      }
    });

    polishHusouCheckboxes(panel);
    foldHusouCustomSearchAdvanced(panel);
  }

  // ==================== 主面板排序 + 额外内容分割线 ====================
  function reorderDashboardSections() {
    const dash = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dashboard');
    if (!dash) return;

    const header = dash.firstElementChild;
    if (!header) return;

    // 删除旧分割线，避免重复打开面板时叠加
    dash.querySelectorAll('.ss-extra-separator-title, .ss-extra-separator-box').forEach(el => el.remove());

    const pairs = [];
    const children = [...dash.children];

    for (let i = 1; i < children.length; i++) {
      const title = children[i];
      const box = children[i + 1];

      if (!title || !box) continue;

      const titleText = (title.textContent || '').trim();

      // sectionTitle 生成的是标题 div，后面紧跟 box
      if (
        titleText.includes('思维链控制') ||
        titleText.includes('快捷开关') ||
        titleText.includes('预设选项控制') ||
        titleText.includes('杀八股') ||
        titleText.includes('自定义内容编辑') ||
        titleText.includes('自定义文风文章分析') ||
        titleText.includes('大总结') ||
        titleText.includes('拷打模式') ||
        titleText.includes('狐构') ||
        titleText.includes('狐忆') ||
        titleText.includes('狐析') ||
        titleText.includes('狐搜') ||
        titleText.includes('平行世界') ||
        titleText.includes('小说模式') ||
        titleText.includes('配置备份')
      ) {
        pairs.push({ title, box, text: titleText });
        i++;
      }
    }

    const order = [
      '思维链控制',
      '快捷开关',
      '预设选项控制',
      '杀八股',
      '自定义内容编辑',
      '自定义文风文章分析',
      '大总结',
      '拷打模式',
      '狐构',
      '狐忆',
      '狐析',
      '狐搜',
      '平行世界',
      '小说模式',
      '配置备份',
    ];

    const used = new Set();

    function take(key) {
      const item = pairs.find(p => !used.has(p) && p.text.includes(key));
      if (item) used.add(item);
      return item;
    }

    const ordered = [];
    for (const key of order) {
      const item = take(key);
      if (item) ordered.push(item);
    }

    // 剩余未匹配模块保持原相对顺序，放最后
    for (const item of pairs) {
      if (!used.has(item)) ordered.push(item);
    }

    // 重新挂载
    for (const item of ordered) {
      if (item.text.includes('大总结')) {
        const sepTitle = topDoc.createElement('div');
        sepTitle.className = 'ss-section-title ss-extra-separator-title';
        sepTitle.textContent = '🧩 以下模块均为附加内容，可不进行配置，按需开启即可。 ';

        const sepBox = topDoc.createElement('div');
        sepBox.className = 'ss-section-box ss-extra-separator-box';
        sepBox.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(232,120,74,0.04);border:1px dashed rgba(232,120,74,0.22);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;color:#f0a070;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;text-align:center;';
        sepBox.innerHTML = '🦊 下面的板块都是额外内容，全部默认关闭。如果你只是单纯想使用预设，不需要配置下面的任何内容，直接开始游玩即可。';

        dash.appendChild(sepTitle);
        dash.appendChild(sepBox);
      }

      dash.appendChild(item.title);
      dash.appendChild(item.box);
    }
  }

  function polishHusouCheckboxes(panel) {
    if (!panel) return;

    panel.querySelectorAll('label').forEach(label => {
      const input = label.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      if (!input || label.dataset.ssSwitchified === '1') return;

      label.dataset.ssSwitchified = '1';
      label.style.display = 'flex';
      label.style.alignItems = 'center';
      label.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
      label.style.gap = '10px';
      label.style.padding = '7px 9px';
      label.style.border = '1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.12)';
      label.style.borderRadius = '10px';
      label.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.025)';

      input.style.display = 'none';

      const sw = topDoc.createElement('span');
      sw.className = 'ss-husou-switch';
      sw.innerHTML = '<span class="ss-husou-switch-on">开</span><span class="ss-husou-switch-off">关</span>';

      label.insertBefore(sw, label.firstChild);

      const update = () => {
        sw.classList.toggle('is-on', input.checked);
        sw.classList.toggle('is-off', !input.checked);
      };

      update();

      input.addEventListener('change', update);
    });
  }

  function foldHusouCustomSearchAdvanced(panel) {
    const section = panel.querySelector('#custom_search_api_section');
    if (!section || section.dataset.ssFoldedAdvanced === '1') return;

    section.dataset.ssFoldedAdvanced = '1';

    const advancedIds = [
      'search_api_method',
      'search_api_key',
      'search_api_key_header_name',
      'search_api_key_header_template',
      'search_api_query_param',
      'search_api_body_template',
      'search_api_extra_params',
      'search_api_language',
      'search_api_result_path',
      'search_api_title_field',
      'search_api_snippet_field',
      'search_api_link_field',
    ];

    const advancedFields = advancedIds
      .map(id => section.querySelector('#' + id)?.closest('div'))
      .filter(Boolean);

    if (!advancedFields.length) return;

    const details = topDoc.createElement('details');
    details.className = 'ss-husou-advanced-details';
    details.open = false;
    details.style.cssText = 'grid-column:1/-1;margin-top:8px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.13);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.025);overflow:hidden;';

    const summary = topDoc.createElement('summary');
    summary.textContent = '⚙️ 高级参数';
    summary.style.cssText = 'cursor:pointer;list-style:none;padding:10px 12px;color:#f0a070;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;user-select:none;';

    const inner = topDoc.createElement('div');
    inner.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:8px 16px;padding:0 12px 12px;';

    const firstField = advancedFields[0];
    firstField.parentElement.insertBefore(details, firstField);

    details.appendChild(summary);
    details.appendChild(inner);

    for (const field of advancedFields) {
      inner.appendChild(field);
    }

    const resultTitle = [...section.querySelectorAll('div')]
      .find(el => (el.textContent || '').trim() === '结果解析');

    if (resultTitle) {
      const title = topDoc.createElement('div');
      title.textContent = '结果解析';
      title.style.cssText = 'grid-column:1/-1;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px;color:#e8ddd4;font-size:12px;';
      inner.insertBefore(title, inner.querySelector('#search_api_result_path')?.closest('div') || null);
      resultTitle.remove();
    }

    const quickPreset = [...section.querySelectorAll('div')]
      .find(el => (el.textContent || '').includes('快速预设：'));

    if (quickPreset) {
      quickPreset.style.gridColumn = '1/-1';
      inner.appendChild(quickPreset);
    }
  }


  function injectNovelDashboardEntry() {
    const dash = topDoc.getElementById('ss-dashboard');
    if (!dash || topDoc.getElementById('ss-novel-dashboard-entry')) return;

    const title = topDoc.createElement('div');
    title.textContent = '✍️ 小说模式';
    title.id = 'ss-novel-dashboard-entry-title';
    title.style.cssText = 'font-size:10.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:#706058;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;';

    const box = topDoc.createElement('div');
    box.id = 'ss-novel-dashboard-entry';
    box.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(232,120,74,0.025);border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.1);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;';

    const openBtn = topDoc.createElement('button');
    openBtn.textContent = '📖 打开小说模式面板';
    openBtn.style.cssText = 'flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.2);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);color:#a09088;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;transition:all 0.2s;';
    openBtn.onmouseover = () => {
      openBtn.style.background = 'rgba(232,120,74,0.08)';
      openBtn.style.color = '#e8ddd4';
    };
    openBtn.onmouseout = () => {
      openBtn.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';
      openBtn.style.color = '#a09088';
    };
    openBtn.onclick = () => openNovelPanel();

    const enableBtn = topDoc.createElement('button');
    enableBtn.textContent = '✍️ 一键小说模式';
    enableBtn.style.cssText = 'flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(232,120,74,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(232,120,74,0.1);color:#f0a070;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;transition:all 0.2s;';
    enableBtn.onclick = async () => {
      novelModeConfig = loadNovelModeConfig();
      await novelApplyMode(true);
    };

    disableBtn.textContent = '↩️ 恢复默认并关闭小说模式';
    disableBtn.style.cssText = 'flex:1;padding:10px;border:1px solid rgba(139,0,0,0.3);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(139,0,0,0.15);color:#d08080;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;transition:all 0.2s;';
    disableBtn.onclick = async () => {
      novelModeConfig = loadNovelModeConfig();
      await novelApplyMode(false);
    };

    box.appendChild(openBtn);
    box.appendChild(enableBtn);
    box.appendChild(disableBtn);

    dash.appendChild(title);
    dash.appendChild(box);
  }

  // ==================== INIT ====================
  async function init() {
    log('🚀 初始化');

    // 清理旧版缩放持久化键，避免旧尺寸/位置被恢复。
    try {
      localStorage.removeItem('Xuanhu_PW_Float_Size');
      localStorage.removeItem('Xuanhu_PW_Panel_Size');
    } catch { }

    state.husouSettings = loadHusouSettings();
    state.hushenSettings = loadHushenSettings();

    // ✅ 刷新页面后立刻同步平滑流式，避免 UI 显示开但 should_stream 实际关闭
    if (state.enabled) {
      await syncSmoothStreamState('init');
    }

    // 🆕 批次 3A：初始化时加载 🦊 狐忆 配置
    foxMemoryConfig = loadFoxMemoryConfig();
    novelModeConfig = loadNovelModeConfig();

    // 🦊 初始化时同步狐忆预设条目。
    // 默认关闭预设注入时，立刻关闭条目，避免旧记忆残留到新卡/新聊天。
    try {
      if (foxMemoryConfig.injectToPreset) {
        await foxMemorySyncToPreset(true);
      } else {
        await foxMemoryDisablePresetInject();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐忆] 初始化同步预设注入失败', e);
    }
    pwState.config = pwLoadConfig();
    pwState.data = pwLoadData();

    try { foxJudgeCheckAndInvalidateIfChanged(); } catch (e) { log('[狐裁] 指纹检测失败', e); }

    try { foxJudgeRegisterSwipeRerollListeners(); } catch (e) { log('[狐裁] 注册swipe/reroll监听失败', e); }
    try { foxJudgeRegisterOutputInjectListener(); } catch (e) { log('[狐裁] 注册输出注入监听失败', e); }
    try { registerFoxJudgeInterceptListener(); } catch (e) { log('[狐裁] 注册独立拦截器失败', e); }

    state.outlineFilterSettings = loadOutlineFilterSettings();

    // 默认 0 = 无楼层限制。
    // 如果用户设置了 N，则 N 只统计 AI/char 楼层，不统计用户楼层。
    {
      const v = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(CONFIG.OUTLINE_CONTEXT_FLOORS_KEY) ?? '0');
      state.outlineContextFloors = Number.isFinite(v) && v >= 0 ? v : 0;
    }

    state.outlineText = outlineLoadCurrentText();

    // 🦊 初始化时立刻按当前角色卡本地大纲同步预设状态。
    // 默认关闭预设注入，避免切换角色卡后旧大纲残留在预设里。
    try {
      await outlineSyncPresetByConfig(state.outlineText);
    } catch (e) {
      log('[狐构] 初始化同步预设状态失败', e);
    }

    const savedOutlineLast = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(outlineGetLastAnalyzedKey()) || '-1');

    state.outlineLastAnalyzedId = Number.isFinite(savedOutlineLast) ? savedOutlineLast : -1;
    // 🆕 批次 3C 修复 v2：注册推进监听器（用 GENERATION_AFTER_COMBINE_PROMPTS）
    if (foxMemoryConfig.autoPush) {
      registerFoxPushListener();
      log('[推进] 自动模式已注册（capture 阶段拦截）');
    }
    // 🆕 记忆自动分析：每次回复结束自动提取记忆
    if (foxMemoryConfig.autoMode !== 'manual') {
      registerFoxMemoryAutoListener();
      registerFoxMemoryRepairListener();
      log('[记忆自动分析] 已注册，模式:', foxMemoryConfig.autoMode);
    }

    // ✅ 狐构动态修正独立监听。
    // 不依赖思维链总开关，不依赖主 onGenEnd。
    registerOutlineAutoListener();
    pwRegisterAutoListener();
    husouRegisterListeners();
    // ✅ 预设切换/更新后再次同步平滑流式
    try {
      const eo = getFn('eventOn');
      const te = getFn('tavern_events') || tavern_events;

      if (typeof eo === 'function') {
        if (te?.PRESET_CHANGED) {
          state.eventHandles.push(eo(te.PRESET_CHANGED, () => {
            setTimeout(() => syncSmoothStreamState('preset_changed'), 300);
            try { foxJudgeCheckAndInvalidateIfChanged(); } catch { }
          }));
        }

        if (te?.OAI_PRESET_CHANGED_AFTER) {
          state.eventHandles.push(eo(te.OAI_PRESET_CHANGED_AFTER, () => {
            setTimeout(() => syncSmoothStreamState('oai_preset_changed_after'), 300);
            try { foxJudgeCheckAndInvalidateIfChanged(); } catch { }
          }));
        }

        if (te?.SETTINGS_UPDATED) {
          state.eventHandles.push(eo(te.SETTINGS_UPDATED, () => {
            setTimeout(() => syncSmoothStreamState('settings_updated'), 300);
          }));
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      log('[平滑流式] 注册同步监听失败', e);
    }
    log('[狐搜] 当前角色卡ID:', getCurrentCharId(), '狐忆角色卡ID:', getCurrentCharId());
    await initUI();

    window.addEventListener('pagehide', cleanup); window.addEventListener('unload', cleanup);
    const initTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
      state._timers.init = null;
      await setBeautyStyle(state.currentStyle, state.isExpanded);
      await forceRefreshAll();
      bindEvents();

      if (state.enabled) {
        if (!isStreamingEnabled()) await setStreaming(true);
        log('✅ 已启用');
      } else {
        log('待开启，但狐构/自动分析监听已启用');
      }
      updateBubbleUI();
      log('🎉 完成|', buildStatusText(), '|流式:', isStreamingEnabled());
    }, CONFIG.INIT_DELAY);
    state._timers.init = initTimer;
  }

  if (typeof SillyTavern !== 'undefined') init();
  else { const ck = setInterval(() => { if (typeof SillyTavern !== 'undefined') { clearInterval(ck); init(); } }, 500); }
  log('📦 脚本加载完成');

  function pwMakeResizable(targetEl, opts = {}) {
    if (!targetEl) return;

    // ✅ 移动端 / 触屏 / 小屏幕禁用：避免触屏误触
    try {
      const isMobile = topWindow.matchMedia?.('(max-width: 768px), (pointer: coarse)')?.matches;
      if (isMobile) return;
    } catch { }

    // ✅ 只允许在小悬浮窗（pw-state-float）上挂缩放手柄
    if (targetEl.id !== 'pw-state-float') return;

    // 移除旧手柄
    const existingHandles = targetEl.querySelectorAll('.pw-resize-handle');
    existingHandles.forEach(h => h.remove());

    // 确保有最小尺寸限制
    targetEl.style.minWidth = '260px';
    targetEl.style.minHeight = '200px';
    targetEl.style.boxSizing = 'border-box';

    const handleCss = `
      position: absolute;
      z-index: 1000006;
      pointer-events: auto;
      background: transparent;
      transition: background 0.15s ease;
    `;

    const handles = [];

    for (const h of handles) {
      const handle = topDoc.createElement('div');
      handle.className = `pw-resize-handle pw-resize-${h.name}`;
      handle.style.cssText = `
            position: absolute;
            ${h.top ? `top: ${h.top};` : ''}
            ${h.bottom ? `bottom: ${h.bottom};` : ''}
            ${h.left ? `left: ${h.left};` : ''}
            ${h.right ? `right: ${h.right};` : ''}
            ${h.width ? `width: ${h.width};` : ''}
            ${h.height ? `height: ${h.height};` : ''}
            cursor: ${h.cursor};
            z-index: 1000006;
            pointer-events: auto;
        `;
      handle.setAttribute('data-resize-dir', h.name);
      handle.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

      Object.assign(handle.style, {
        position: 'absolute',
        zIndex: '1000006',
        pointerEvents: 'auto',
        background: 'transparent',
        touchAction: 'none',
      });

      if (h.top) handle.style.top = h.top;
      if (h.bottom) handle.style.bottom = h.bottom;
      if (h.left) handle.style.left = h.left;
      if (h.right) handle.style.right = h.right;
      if (h.width) handle.style.width = h.width;
      if (h.height) handle.style.height = h.height;
      handle.style.cursor = h.cursor;

      handle.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { handle.style.background = 'rgba(96,210,255,0.18)'; });
      handle.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { handle.style.background = 'transparent'; });

      targetEl.appendChild(handle);
    }

    let isResizing = false;
    let resizeDir = '';
    let startX, startY;
    let startWidth, startHeight;
    let startLeft, startTop;
    let startRight, startBottom;

    const onResizeStart = (e, dir) => {
  
    };


    const move = (e) => {

    };

    const end = () => {

    };

  }
  function pwStateFloatConfig() { return null; }
})();
